**Your Democratic Supporter Membership has EXPIRED!**

name: Voter Action Project Team
subject: The consequences are clear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Knocking out this leg of the Voting Rights Act -- by weakening Section 2 -- would almost certainly reconstitute state legislatures, city councils, judicial districts, and every other type of political boundary in which racial minorities could be cut off from having a voice in their government.
This kind of change would silence untold numbers of voters and spiral our fight for voting rights back sixty years. RUSH $15 or more right now to help protect what the VRA stands for and defend our fundamental right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=101925_4&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Mother Jones: Republican Justices Appear Poised to Destroy What’s Left of the Voting Rights Act [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=101925_4&amount=25] unt=25]
We'll hand this straight to Mother Jones, Team: " The Supreme Court, with its six-to-three Republican-appointed majority, appears ready to kneecap what remains of the Voting Rights Act’s protections for minority political representation. "
The descriptive language seems harsh, but the objective of these justices seems clear -- a complete dismantling of our seminal civil rights law . We've said it before and will say it again, but it's been clear long before the MAGA movement that Chief Justice Roberts has seen the removal of the VRA as one of his top goals for his time on the Court. It appears he may be on the cusp of succeeding.
During this week’s oral argument in Louisiana v. Callais , at least five conservative justices seemed ready to handicap the VRA so that it will no longer stop white majorities from locking racial minorities out of elected office through racial gerrymandering.
The consequences are simple to understand and grave for voter participation. The harder we make it to vote, the more politicians make voter participation feel worthless, the less people actually take part. Needless to say, the less people who participate, the less our democracy and our government looks like the people it's supposed to represent.
Team: We have to spread the word about this case and the consequences of dismantling the Voting Rights Act. Fuel our work with $15 or whatever you can today and help us defend the right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=101925_4&amount=15]
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=101925_4&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=101925_4&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=101925_4&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=101925_4&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=101925_4&amount=250] Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=101925_4&amount=35]
At issue in the case is Section 2 of the VRA, which requires that racial minorities have an equal opportunity to meaningfully participate in the electoral process. This provision has been used to strike down districting schemes and maps that prevented Black voters and other racial minorities from electing their preferred representatives. Since 1965, Section 2 has given people of color a seat at the table, from school boards to the halls of Congress. It appears this 60-year era is coming to an end.
“ Race is a part of redistricting always ,” Justice Sonia Sotomayor said, addressing the solicitor general from Louisiana, who was arguing against an existing map that had enabled the election of two Black members of Congress in his state. “ What you’re saying to us [is]...‘You can use [race] to help yourself achieve goals that reduce particular groups’ electoral participation, but you can’t use it to remedy that situation .’”
Striking down the last remnants of the Voting Rights Act is exactly why the Supreme Court held this case over from last year. Gutting Section 2 would take us backwards in time and allow racial gerrymandering to be a standard practice, silencing more voters. Just like the redistricting fights across the country, this is all about whether the party in power can choose their voters in order to stay in power in perpetuity.
We simply can't afford to go backwards like this. Will you chip in with $15 or more to help us fight back against these partisan efforts to silence voters? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=101925_4&amount=15]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=101925_4&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=101925_4&amount=20]

name: Kathy Barnette
subject: They want you silent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BE BETTER AMERICA PAC
body:
If we stop talking, America dies

|
---
Patriot,

While the other side foams at the mouth and burns down cities, we pray.

We teach our children that they were born with a purpose, and we engage in conversations with fellow Americans because we _must._

_What they did to Charlie was meant to chill every one of us into silence. To make us afraid to speak the truth in a world that rewards lies._

But let me tell you something, Patriot, it won't work.

Their goal is FEAR, but our weapon is FAITH.

We will not be canceled, shamed, or silenced for loving our country and our God.

**I refuse to let that happen. DO YOU?**

**[Stand with me today as I fight to ensure the truth is NEVER silenced in America.](http://links.bbapac.com/u/click?_t=5784e5e40dc94351a7bcbabf677d3bf7&_m=d7f8b6dc35bb4edb931c5aa22f1aa61c&_e=1wZVQXyVDKOQVWcee3cBpwJJzxAMkAifHnGJ50k_jJRwwL3B4ovQN2A-cW_hnA9l8YCrUKzNEwFt9LDTe0HbBsad1I2lt4HGfEaIvYRAD5001-5VSJkNtxqwKOOGQ3PNqq2ipU4eizDB9yoM3eW16RS71dAA3TWr-tn0Qxd6WrPL_OEAWku0E91qbN7lgAbMQQHjetcW_aDgYV3qEoSH26q84AM0RieqvnqB3ELZQViP5bSayrRl5m_6QpEZ6BeE9sgwi4fLo1gafcqTd0O86-53v4HiTWaCwjb7gYINmUBj0o3p6fVopevYGzGGnLn_4hY10QhpHf6cOt74VqMG9SUTOGo8w_lpp5KQ1YAMmAxxhIyNRwGEgvKRh4kw4kalJTIEQbRNe0dMV0RLlfNgLt_YYyGTNyK1hXkAnw7DjTFOYplDTSkxPTqY_ERE6IFyuGQhmDAgfyxheP_HABRoN1xvIo6NdPE4wm8nhH7M5HjSTAnu1lWNhC4U0ZzAecHyk6xo9zriNwRKpSDURWPRYwHdAQNha3m95UoT3n3UwCI%3D)**

subject: The most impactful thing you can do today:
body:

Derek, Election Day is just weeks away, on November 4. What kind of America do you want to wake up to on November 5? Donald Trump will be hoping for good news. He wants to flip the New Jersey governor’s mansion. He wants California’s redistricting amendment to fail. name: Donald John Trump
subject: I believe He saved me for a reason.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
This is why I think He did it.
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
**I was never supposed to be President.**
Friend,
I was never supposed to survive the bullet of an assassin, **BUT I DID.**
I was never supposed to be President of the United States again, **BUT I AM.**
I was never supposed to Make America Great Again, **BUT I WILL NEVER SURRENDER!**
The great behemoth known as the Democrat Party threw everything at me: Hoaxes, Witch Hunts, Impeachments, Election Interference, Raids, Arrests, and so much more!
But the steady compass of Faith has guided my hands through it all.
NOW, the government is completely shut down, and they think **MAGA IS DONE.**
_We can’t take our foot off the gas!_
I was saved for this one reason: to Make America Great Again.
I was made for this, **BUT MAGA IS POWERED BY YOU.**
_That’s why I’ve launched a 24 HOUR TRUMP FUNDRAISING BLITZ, and I’m asking everyone to chip in $15 to make it one for the record books!_
Every time they count us out – count YOU out – we come back bigger, better, and stronger than ever before.
This is our moment to show the world that we will NEVER back down, NEVER give an inch, and NEVER SURRENDER in our fight to save this country.
**_[So if you’re with me all the way to the end, join with MILLIONS of your fellow PATRIOTS by chipping in $15 to keep the wins rolling in!>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**

[GIVE $15](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

Donald J. Trump

name: Jena Griswold
subject: Supporting CO workers. Always.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2510-q4-jg?refcode=251019-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2510-q4-jg?refcode=251019-email]
Peter -
Over the past few weeks, I’ve had the honor of meeting with union members and earning the endorsements of 15 labor unions from across Colorado – from construction workers to public service employees and first responders.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2510-q4-jg?refcode=251019-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2510-q4-jg?refcode=251019-email]
Photo from the Southern Labor Council Meeting
Meeting with union members reminds me why I stepped into public service in the first place: to fight for fairness, dignity, and opportunity for every Coloradan.
When I hear about the challenges working families face — from rising costs to corporate greed – I’m more determined than ever to ensure our state stands on the side of workers. As Attorney General, I’ll do just that.
I’ll hold corporations accountable when they illegally exploit or endanger workers. I’ll protect the right to organize and collectively bargain. And I’ll defend laws that ensure fair pay, safe workplaces, and equal opportunity for all.
Colorado’s workers built this state, and they deserve an Attorney General who will always have their backs.
This campaign is powered by people like you who believe in fairness and the Colorado way of life. Will you join me in standing with Colorado workers? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2510-q4-jg?refcode=251019-email]
Thank you for being part of this movement,
Jena Griswold

name: GOTV PAC
subject: If we win these two states, Trump’s in trouble
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
All eyes are on New Jersey and Virginia.
In both states, voters will soon elect new governors, and these races will reveal whether Trump’s political strength is growing or collapsing under the weight of his own chaos.
Four years ago, Republicans gained ground among working-class voters, but this time, the cracks are showing. Trump’s mass layoffs, his shutdown, and his obsession with revenge have turned the very voters he once energized against him.
These races are the first real test of the second-term Trump GOP. If Democrats win big, it will send a national message that Trump’s movement is losing steam before 2026 even begins. If we fall short, it signals the opposite.
This is about momentum. The road to flipping the House runs straight through these early elections, so will you chip in $25 now to help us boost turnout in Virginia and New Jersey, and show Trump that the people are ready to fight back? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email10162025]
Chip in $25 to power GOTV PAC → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email10162025]

clean_body: [] Peter , All eyes are on New Jersey and Virginia. In both states, voters will soon elect new governors, and these races will reveal whether Trump’s political strength is growing or collapsing under the weight of his own chaos. Four years ago, Republicans gained ground among working-class voters, but this time, the cracks are showing. Trump’s mass layoffs, his shutdown, and his obsession with revenge have turned the very voters he once energized against him. These races are the first real test of the second-term Trump GOP. If Democrats win big, it will send a national message that Trump’s movement is losing steam before 2026 even begins. If we fall short, it signals the opposite. This is about momentum. **We can’t let this continue.** **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvY5hIpYyZFo4TAxtBXDcsHs7iGep3vX1mO61FC5l6ShoF8qNbty1owa-CTafcrEu7lDNL6zL7--wpC4dVQvQzxC0HuWNHC6nW3GmQuh4JFFgCNAnC1aKwpEiB487wM7EvRr8Ukbh_TTE7nA8Cpzq5IzNbHLmwJ_vVDK32srvzHiFWWkIGtqJhyR1obIf5uhTqxNphdlL7WcPUETYuSnBNkyYOHtvHizbruti3gGaZ0Uu7kKEevDGnYqg6z5jW4BYQOMVhwEpZurJBvsRCxYlIGEjxWLq6GdNP10g4ceKEF9M6DIbGigdzDgD6ajvNDZH1KMMG3yNZEDjVAJJcvLliZPnXzfwKsmWNVgCXU6owmDB1HWUQrgx_0MWepxa5LUc4/4kw/Lf_VTSZpSqm_0wnAp-mvpw/h0/h001.N-7yEXYgr8amT-lASGK3KOQ0lAUFZknDqf4nPIc86Ss)****[Chip in to STOP Trump and DEFEAT Republicans who have enabled Alligator Alcatraz. * * *
“Alligator Alcatraz,” Trump’s nightmare immigration camp in the Florida Everglades, was supposed to be shut down. A federal judge even ordered it closed for environmental and human rights violations. But thanks to a pair of Trump-appointed appeals court judges, it roared back to life – a 3,000-capacity “black site” where people are being disappeared, families broken apart, and detainees denied even the most basic rights. Over 1,200 people held at Alligator Alcatraz have gone “missing” – they’re gone from the camp, erased from ICE’s database and their families and attorneys can’t find them anywhere. This is not a distant story. _This is happening right now, and the cruelty is intentional._ **Cedar Key Progress is fighting back with our Alligator Alcatraz billboard, shining a national spotlight on this lawless, inhumane operation. But we can’t do it without your help.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvY5hIpYyZFo4TAxtBXDcsHs7iGep3vX1mO61FC5l6ShqpnaPcZr33HNYKyBGRYNn2kP_CU6_hGcL6UufeKgT8pXxquAOsSH8-_YkEPotqtc-idqgFFbVRm-5ec4h15c6PHf3O1GUVXp5dt9Py25QQZic3fofJ8wNkfzC0Yg-JbeVAnmTaJ967L9jKE4Fb_9ArdiD52XlpBeNsCajHtJvHKdA3k2CFNdj6KvMymHd56VOjxznWHeBUFlzW_u-Z4iG-ZdK2RrW8NbSqiJyOm6eXy61RzPa8BTxvs79KCdQN_0OoPof13ASyg5Da6vDxbOn36H0K4F0lb0EHEwCUvweSOfGiYkfE-F6ksDMh7wOpofYz9czjaWWzRbPri1c-3_q4/4kw/Lf_VTSZpSqm_0wnAp-mvpw/h2/h001.SzWbUO9oAGnIgbPqL7UOkT09bMFc-q0wfMYjOAK5XUo)**[Chip in today to TAKE BACK Congress and hold power accountable, expose injustice, and demand these atrocities stop.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvY5hIpYyZFo4TAxtBXDcsHs7iGep3vX1mO61FC5l6Shh12GOEY39X9dNMscoSRvgBNGmcpd6qTyPUWCVZLJXV4hcHSPAn2kcTovbk8mpLz4pCgOS9U5PtDPEM8KUelAaX1mJWIDvWx2dL7DCvS9IxVfXaN4joHuE95O6E5dJIXh8_wgsbPYjYU1qbn9DkNJytfzyiwYA27Uz_hbWlJUWMC3u9HTFz0CnDLzXHthHkYYXTUS_x-0HadhanYRvrVQswEEYzBtsK964gKSxaOqwM4FMw_QGzyqz1VvyJM8IMeCGxi7DXb6E4VO6bwD4pyb1UB7oocck4nNfWhbSqKXti1hf7cBPX0xUSywEiXj34Yvyusz63jdPwIhtUQmK1b0XI/4kw/Lf_VTSZpSqm_0wnAp-mvpw/h3/h001.6RLCG3371y6Uv1NhOU4GuHniWdU-WJTSA8TPfdKljuc)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: The cruelty is intentional. | | | We can’t let this continue. “Alligator Alcatraz,” Trump’s nightmare immigration camp in the Florida Everglades, was supposed to be shut down. A federal judge even ordered it closed for environmental and human rights violations. But thanks to a pair of Trump-appointed appeals court judges, it roared back to life – a 3,000-capacity “black site” where people are being disappeared, families broken apart, and detainees denied even the most basic rights. Over 1,200 people held at Alligator Alcatraz have gone “missing” – they’re gone from the camp, erased from ICE’s database and their families and attorneys can’t find them anywhere. This is not a distant story. This is happening right now, and the cruelty is intentional. Cedar Key Progress is fighting back with our Alligator Alcatraz billboard, shining a national spotlight on this lawless, inhumane operation. But we can’t do it without your help. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. We can’t stay silent. People’s lives are at stake. \- Cedar Key Progress | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. Friend,

name: Zoe Lofgren for Congress
subject: Prop 50 puts the power back in the voters’ hands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117595765/577046692/-1473124489?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-10-19_CAF_RDG_ES-33600_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGQyYjM0Ni01NGFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DvV-56iQXCtngQfJGE3Qt91sKtfRMdT10yxL79bpvZU=)

| | |

Dear Peter, When Donald Trump commanded Texas Republicans to redraw their maps in order to secure five new Republican seats, Zoe Lofgren led the charge to push back against this illegal power grab. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
Hi there,
This is Camille Alcala, Finance Director for the California Democratic Party with your 10/19 update:
Our organizers are working around the clock across California — knocking on doors, calling voters, and mobilizing communities ahead of the November 4th election. We fully support Governor Gavin Newsom’s Proposition 50 effort and know it’s our last opportunity to stop Donald Trump from stacking the deck in his favor for next year’s midterm elections.
We’re fighting to pass Prop 50 while also preparing our campaigns to flip the U.S. House. Because Prop 50 changes Congressional maps to counter Trump’s gerrymandering plot, we’ll need to move faster than ever before to hire organizers, open regional offices, print literature, and flip seats from red to blue.
Your generous support today fuels those organizing efforts. Your $ donation could be the funding we need to pay organizers, print voter materials, expand volunteer training, and keep our voter protection programs running strong through next year’s midterm elections.
Can you make a donation of $ or whatever you can to keep this work funded and on track? My personal link is below and I hope to see your donation come in.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-oct25-redistricting?&refcode=&amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-oct25-redistricting?&refcode=&amount=]
Thank you for standing with us and powering the grassroots organizing that wins elections and will flip the U.S. House blue.
With gratitude,
Camille Alcala
Finance Director
California Democratic Party

DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=&amount=20.24]
Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action.

name: Jake Warner
subject: Supreme Court heard free speech case
body:
The fight to keep men out of women’s sports isn’t over.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhhdeun8qg2fbbnu4eunfa4o70p4r73k1hiu1a1g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cjim2ob2chh2bs)
Dear Fellow American, Trauma. Addiction. Depression. Personality disorders.

This world is full of people who need a trusted person to guide them through their mental health issues.

Kaley Chiles is a licensed counselor and committed Christian. Many of Kaley's clients come to her because they share her Christian worldview and faith-based values.

But Colorado law bans counselors from having private conversations with young clients that could help them regain comfort with their God-given sex--rather than pushing them one step closer to dangerous gender-transition drugs and surgeries.

Kaley has already had to start censoring herself to avoid potential fines of $5,000 for each offense and even the loss of her license.

This law violates freedom of speech. The government has no business censoring conversations between clients and counselors.

We are working with Kaley and other counselors to stop this government censorship. We're excited the U.S. Supreme Court heard oral arguments for this case on October 7th.

Will you stand with Kaley?

Click this link to stand with Kaley Chiles and her constitutional right to speak with clients about their shared faith-based values.

[https://adflegal.org/support/chiles-case-statement/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5iffl76l2gkr80gifsse7spl1iesbgf41vrpr70_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cjim2ob2chh2bs) For freedom, **Jake Warner** Senior Counsel

---
Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260

---

Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily
---

# [Something Has Shifted Inside the Walls](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=176620384&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc2NjIwMzg0LCJpYXQiOjE3NjA5NDIwOTgsImV4cCI6MTc2MzUzNDA5OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.zi2oAlJgOc-S-Xj0y8iFZ30Pbt2sAdoUP3khpKa9cjg)
### The sudden clampdown inside ICE detention raises chilling questions -- and demands our attention now.
| | [Melissa Chaudhry](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---
| Oct 20
---
| [](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=176620384&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc2NjIwMzg0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2MDk0MjA5OCwiZXhwIjoxNzYzNTM0MDk4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzI2MDExMSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.h5Y3Rg5a9BIkUasYRvw0zM-FdKO4eKQVj7MYSoUcPPc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=176620384&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc2NjIwMzg0LCJpYXQiOjE3NjA5NDIwOTgsImV4cCI6MTc2MzUzNDA5OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.zi2oAlJgOc-S-Xj0y8iFZ30Pbt2sAdoUP3khpKa9cjg&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=176620384&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc2NjIwMzg0LCJpYXQiOjE3NjA5NDIwOTgsImV4cCI6MTc2MzUzNDA5OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.zi2oAlJgOc-S-Xj0y8iFZ30Pbt2sAdoUP3khpKa9cjg)
---
| | [](https://substack..gy6sN3wwnWNBY4D1qNWf9dgmPN6Z20ljFuD1z9qUSrM?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/melissa4congress/p/something-has-shifted-inside-the?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

An hour ago - 10pm on a Sunday - my husband Zahid called from inside the Northwest ICE Processing Center in Tacoma. His voice was tense. The pod was on lockdown.
They had taken **twenty men overnight** -- nearly a fifth of his unit -- without warning or explanation. The tablets used to call family had been confiscated. Guards were hovering, pressuring him to hang up the phone. In two months of detention, that has never happened before.
He didn't know where the men were being taken. ICE doesn't tell them. But everyone inside knows what it means when they disappear without notice: deportations, or **transfers.** Often across the country. Sometimes to facilities far worse -- hotter, more isolated, stripped of family contact and medical care.
And for a man like Zahid -- a 100% disabled, wheelchair-using U.S. Army veteran under a federal stay of removal, _who shouldn 't even be there in the first place _-- a transfer could be catastrophic. It could sever access to his Madigan Army Medical Center specialists. It could strand him beyond reach of family, legal materials, and the public eye.
Until last night, the guards themselves had said a transfer was _" vanishingly unlikely."_ Now, suddenly, everything feels different. The energy inside the facility has changed. Pressure is tightening, systems are being cut off, and the usual rhythm of communication -- even basic phone calls -- is being disrupted.
It feels like those in power are tired of playing by the rules. Like those at the top of the food chain in this country have figured out they won't be able to win fairly, so they're flipping the game board on the rest of us.
We're doing everything we can to play by the old rules. The ones that were promised to bring us justice. Swear to God, I've completed...what...over a dozen complex legal filings across three different legal forums (about to be four...), investing hundreds of hours to do work it would cost six figures for a lawyer to handle. (And a lawyer would
1\. be able to take paperwork in to him, which I can't, which would be EXTREMELY helpful - and...
2\. take weeks or months to even get up to speed on the case - time we absolutely could not have afforded, when we have 10 days to respond to a filing from the opposition and lose 5 of those days while their filing makes its way through the mail to us.)
So we've been absolutely maximally efficient, and hitting as hard and complete as we can, collating copies and aggregating exhibits, feeling like Fedex and USPS "Express Overnight" is a second home, sweating over the details of certificates of service, constantly in a whiplash state of either frantic effort or endless waiting... and it feels like it won't even matter. It feels like salmon swimming upstream with every ounce of our effort, with the full force of the river crashing against us every moment, straining day and night to make progress toward those promised sweet highland homewaters, and maybe like the salmon we're destined to die just at the moment we finally arrive.
Wallahi, I would love to be wrong.
Zahid has helped over 30 people apply for bond, inside. Folks without sophisticated understanding of the (extra-)legal system they're trapped in, who didn't even know it was possible. A solid handful have already had their bond hearings under the new rules -- which make the "no jurisdiction" finding (that Zahid was given) unlawful -- and have been given bond and been released. Alhamdulillah, may Allah reward him for assisting them... and he still languishes.
I've - we've - he's - petitioned for a second bond hearing, under the new rules, arguing the first hearing is null and void because it didn't seriously consider the equities - his longstanding community ties, his medical needs and family ties, no flight risk or danger to the community. He should get a new hearing, and he should get released, and that should happen within the next two weeks based on our filings.
But if they move him to Alabama in the meantime??
or Alligator Alcatraz, where over 1200 people have _simply vanished_? (Or, if you were able to catch wind of the washed-up bodies and other evidence of "Operation Floating ICE" a couple of months ago - before the videos were scrubbed from social media - dropped out of the back of military planes over the ocean, in classic "Pinochet Air" flights that Republican congressmen [openly called for](https://substack.com/redirect/d297fad3-3bef-430e-93b0-03a11b812168?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in _February_ _2024_?)
or the "Lone Star Lockup," located on an isolated, heavily secured military base in the Colorado desert, with [conditions so terrible](https://substack.com/redirect/fcc8dfb3-e8b0-499d-b794-c8e1d5520bba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) detainees are **dying** , and others are starving rather than eat the soiled food and drink the contaminated water, and even Congresspeople are being denied their Constitutional right and duty to enter and conduct oversight?
* * *
This isn't just about one man. It's about the deliberate use of opacity -- the way bureaucracies can hide human beings behind walls and paperwork until they vanish from view. And it's about what happens when people who have already suffered beyond measure are pushed one step further, just when justice is within reach.
For months, we have done everything by the book. Every court filing, every exhibit, every certification of service. The Ninth Circuit has Zahid's case under review; the law is clear that he cannot be removed while that process is ongoing. Yet the sudden escalation inside Tacoma - and elsewhere- raises the disquieting question: **what happens when the system itself stops following its own rules?**
[ Sign Zahid's petition for medical care](https://substack.com/redirect/b1db9d85-3201-488d-a5a9-64d6a7a65a45?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Jake Warner
subject: Kaley Chiles stands firm on biblical worldview
body:
The fight to keep men out of women’s sports isn’t over.

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5thnr2h0u4b21ib9jme6g5qn765kulppvojt7o8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cjim6oj2chh2bs)
Dear Fellow American, Trauma. Addiction. Depression. Personality disorders.

This world is full of people who need a trusted person to guide them through their mental health issues.

Kaley Chiles is a licensed counselor and committed Christian. Many of Kaley's clients come to her because they share her Christian worldview and faith-based values.

But Colorado law bans counselors from having private conversations with young clients that could help them regain comfort with their God-given sex--rather than pushing them one step closer to dangerous gender-transition drugs and surgeries.

Kaley has already had to start censoring herself to avoid potential fines of $5,000 for each offense and even the loss of her license.

This law violates freedom of speech. The government has no business censoring conversations between clients and counselors.

We are working with Kaley and other counselors to stop this government censorship. We're excited the U.S. Supreme Court heard oral arguments for this case on October 7th.

Will you stand with Kaley?

Click this link to stand with Kaley Chiles and her constitutional right to speak with clients about their shared faith-based values.

[https://adflegal.org/support/chiles-case-statement/](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6bto0qihjtqfokj6pjvnefhg1m08i2rmmlln7h0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cjim6oj2chh2bs) For freedom, **Jake Warner** Senior Counsel

---

Hamas accuses the IDF of violating the ceasefire while it seeks vengeance against its sworn enemies in Israel and Gaza. | [](http://trk.libertyledger._ZD01In0/KrTEvdHDKaPuC3QOkX3LVA)

In a daring Sunday morning robbery, [three masked thieves broke into the Louvre](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL3ypCAQxJ8GM7ZgxK-A4BKzvfRCi4VhnT0UC3At3_6Ke4V_Msl0_6q7_zyXp6FA-_u32VAXH5cdrxywFEzLBy8MK1IuudB2hjPbFe3fbBcQ0HEpOIjFGQr3ohqnPSJg26CWQy-mTvWgmlUPqPwEvWitESMMLz9N1rlWWiV7NwyuIV1pUoCQQrSqfYxjB0ZgJ-UwjtZ3TAl0VGJ6fCLtZUUf7vjF9LBxa4JeSzkya38xmBnM-33EXOqLwVzBDGYp6pkYzFdMwfFakcEc4vlNyLcz47lx2vlhEmVuQ8zouPEFE0_x9cJ0c5_MbjFze4ZyVhPtlKsgm7uymqTdcVEIlPuBKfHeDIX_AcuPVv1q-BcAAP__KouMtg) Museum in Paris and stole nine priceless jewels once belonging to Napoleon’s family.

# Monday, October 20, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1967, Roger Patterson and Robert Gimlin allegedly caught Bigfoot on film in Northern California. Patterson claimed until his death in 1972 that the creature in the film was real, while Gimlin declined to speak publicly about the film for decades. [Take a look at the video here.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykz0Fu6yAQgOHTmF2sYQzEXrB4m-zypKqtKnWDCAyBFEJkcKLcvmqv0AP8v_R9HM3Rppyu5_-2kO6hmis9WqbeaTUXelCOlFpvPZUtb81Fcl_NGQSUOw47BONtyk8jmNeBCGlipPlewSKFQsGiFsscvKcwKa4cB1rQWoQTSUuSLxxZ0j83DggcYBLTOM8SLZDkfD_PLshBAPnU6zpearr2SCE_653W0dXCso6939ow_RvwMODhWbe-jSca8PCioLweS3z7fGer9rdHyjk1tR8EnItN-bfvf0LfNX4HAAD___ZCalc) Today’s top story in _The Flyover_ sounds like something out of _Ocean’s Eleven:_[a real-life jewel heist](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL3ypCAQxJ8GM7ZgxK-A4BKzvfRCi4VhnT0UC3At3_6Ke4V_Msl0_6q7_zyXp6FA-_u32VAXH5cdrxywFEzLBy8MK1IuudB2hjPbFe3fbBcQ0HEpOIjFGQr3ohqnPSJg26CWQy-mTvWgmlUPqPwEvWitESMMLz9N1rlWWiV7NwyuIV1pUoCQQrSqfYxjB0ZgJ-UwjtZ3TAl0VGJ6fCLtZUUf7vjF9LBxa4JeSzkya38xmBnM-33EXOqLwVzBDGYp6pkYzFdMwfFakcEc4vlNyLcz47lx2vlhEmVuQ8zouPEFE0_x9cJ0c5_MbjFze4ZyVhPtlKsgm7uymqTdcVEIlPuBKfHeDIX_AcuPVv1q-BcAAP__KouMtg) at the Louvre that has Paris reeling. It’s the kind of headline you almost wouldn’t believe if it weren’t true. Meet today’s sponsor, [Hear.com](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkT9v3DAMxT-NvN1B1h__GTxcc_CWTgE6ErRE20wl-2DJMe7bF87QIl3D8T2SePzx1yu8Igdepp8YqcvjCgsdKVDOtME7HRRm4pRT5riHPbmZ3O_kQEllL6W8KAkeOTzBFL4biRTpgrqyrmRrTaVMMXfeWkseNVkqUXk0tcO2rsrGtV6jqwruzm2lVLKUUht9bRqrUJIty7pp3GiFkeQ5r9v1feUlzzSG5_pB29WtsQjdnPMjCX0TqheqP47jOhN-mkL1Xqh-oJTh1HiZANkn8JxkA7igak3tzkHdo8tC328vb_KsVurK3F7ehKowPoT-secIad03R0Lfh6f_YkTyvEeh7ziOHBgzfbEdxgfytAh93xPQAhjOPPC3G4anP5VL4GnOwx6Gi1_3IRD8uxZOQicp-D9jsXX-cXAInKpaGDlF5PAJJ3_rox-d-hMAAP__Pb20fA), and their game-changing device, ushering in a new era of mental clarity.

## Fighting, Airstrikes Threaten Israel-Hamas Peace
Israel launched [airstrikes across Gaza on Sunday](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQxvGnMVvQ-TAGBg9d2NK1I3Lsc7jEBIqduLx9lb5C50_6Sd__6zydLUd-XD_tQiaHdXpQSZFypn26UaE4E6ecMi_P-ExuJndPbkLA9iThhDB5y_GYVOVNIEJqKjKy0zC0SqOqZgNa--BtGJQm6AfZDBZVCy4gBKfxUrF5axIQJECjmrrvW7RArZRd37vQCgXkOa97fVv5kWcK8VhftNduXapo5py3JJoPgaPAsZRSXy7uvQkc32cEjpFfJHB0eN9-uuP4HrZc7cZvhWPkpDuh4LpYjn9i_leGl8HfAAAA__-RhHDE) after blaming Hamas for an attack near Rafah that killed two Israeli soldiers, calling it a “blatant violation” of the ceasefire. Gaza health officials said a senior Hamas commander was killed during the strikes. [Hamas denied](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OqzAQhZ8GOiN7MH-Fi9vQ5bZbosEe8CQGItsJyj79in2Fbc-Rjs73fd2mG3Lgff2PG5m8HNNOZwqUM8XpTicFT5xyyry9witZT_aR7AQSGqGkADk55PCZdOnMQgRUl2RU18qh0S3o0hvQKEnNEq1rm74D1Q12GJYardI4d33J5lpTEqSSstZ11fcNoKRGqa7v7dIUWpLjfMTqfvCePS3hc7wpVvbYymB8zs9U1P8KGAsYz_Os9tleFFd_JUcMroBxY-cCCcKUCxg5RaQgUo78oCRW_EbhccMk5khoPe-rsISJFo4kot0R6l5DXUbjnieHwKntCi3XDTn8Psl_0vc28BMAAP__386FUg) ordering the Rafah assault, claiming the gunmen involved were part of a rogue or rival militia and insisting it remained committed to the truce. Hours later, [Israel said it had resumed enforcing](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGu2zAMBdCvkTcFEi0nzuChi7fXtaPBJ9ExEzoKJCaG-_WF-wtv4ULg4N7752v6QhZ-3n7jSoPOeXrSVoVUqUx32kgW4qpVeX3Lu8aF4qPGCRx01jsLbkrIsk-hScNMBNQ2NPjL2V27cIbQLIO_hoBXn-AC327uMXy7DhFd33btuYvU8HBo3oHzzrWhPfV9B-io8_7S93HuTHCUWHM53TM_daFZ9vyhcop5bWRYVF_VtL8MjAbG5_7KVY-XgfGADYzeHedqYNxykWSPigZGrgVJbNXCD6r2hn_R4qxU7IIrVosidKMku_1wFlRKNhJWmrmQ3VgXu75F-SVkURXj40CbMqTXxiJczxcT3G1Flv9J9Ufzfgb4FwAA___N0Y-z) the U.S.-brokered ceasefire, but the day’s bloodshed has raised doubts about whether President Trump’s peace deal can hold.
## $35 Billion Obamacare Scam Exposed
Federal probes have revealed that pandemic-era expansions to Affordable Care Act subsidies led to an estimated [$35 billion in fraudulent enrollments](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uhDAQhJ8GOiNjzF_hIg3dpU2J9uzl2Mtin_DeocvTR-QV0o1mRqPR93WZL0BM8fYJGzpZ0hzxyIwiuM93PJBXpCxZaHvyM_sV_Xf2s9GmVbVWRs8BiN-zLYNbEA02Jbq67_TY2s7YcnWLtrUfg_FgfTOErvN2hA50F_p-HPulJHeu1droWuvGNtUwtAY0tnXdD4Nf2sJqDCRpr-6Joqy48Du9cK982kp2q8gjF81HYabCTMdxVLLileEHz0JhJp_4ucVcmCk9KFKKp7rCBh52zIpBMIvKHmIAVpQVqKZVV2KmFNVtTWcqaX-XuwuP4_Rz1xdW3zYg_nsh_0L3cuY3AAD__y5PhLs), with 12 million people in 2024 filing no claims despite being insured. [Miami-Dade County in Florida](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGSpCAUgOHTaIYFT1EJCDYx6003tF7Do329KF2AbfXtp2auMBf4_6rv3229IUc-Hn9xJ1tDWg-6SqRaKa9PuihuxKWWyvsZz-I2cv-LW0GCFkoKkKtHjp91aL0NREB9S1ZNozR6GGFoNzuaO4Te4KSVk2OYDShA3WuNRhtFpmX7XVMSpJKyH_punjWgJK3UNM8u6GaQ5Lmm3D0TH3WjED_pTblzaW-j3Wp9lab_08DSwHJdV-e4fsQznfnA2KX8aGDBXNlFamBJd9zRYSZRznthz1REyHh6EWLK7FHwUc5MubTZ-tfFMXIZp2aQjx05_kzrr6TeFr4CAAD__yS7fps) has drawn particular attention, reporting more low-income enrollees than census data shows exist, with schemes involving brokers bribing homeless individuals or enrolling people without consent. National watchdogs say up to 6.4 million enrollees this year may be "phantom" sign-ups, costing taxpayers billions. The Biden-era subsidies are [set to expire Dec. 31](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOnDAQhp_GdF7ZY2DZwsVGEU10SZEiJfLaA8zF2MgeDt3bR-QVrhvpkz7N__15m94cRUrLT7eh5TlPCc8akRnL9I4nxhWpcmXajnhUv6L_W_0ECjqplQQ1BUfxc2qbYGdEQNOg1fdePbq2h7ZZbWeGYDRoNQz3QXv_eMBLGR96o_qX66Ahe9m0AqWVMq25DUMHTmGn9X0Y_NyJVmEgzuX2ninxinP8zB9Ybj5vTbQr816FeQoYBYzned62mi4mYMQkjypgvEYJGPcciclfp89pKVirpCrLkRKlReaDZZ4l04aSswzoKaDkFeXsGC-UX25z3hWU9XhVCoSXyxX5fOpfP3bPwozZUxDm-7crKp71N5a9KTbsJ8VItb-LVi2bo_j_ff5S8w8L_wIAAP__GC2XGA), and their extension is a central point of contention in the ongoing government shutdown. Democrats support renewing the aid; Republicans cite the fraud as a reason to end it.
## Thieves Pull Off Louvre Jewel Heist
In a daring Sunday morning robbery, [three masked thieves broke into the Louvre](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL3ypCAQxJ8GM7ZgxK-A4BKzvfRCi4VhnT0UC3At3_6Ke4V_Msl0_6q7_zyXp6FA-_u32VAXH5cdrxywFEzLBy8MK1IuudB2hjPbFe3fbBcQ0HEpOIjFGQr3ohqnPSJg26CWQy-mTvWgmlUPqPwEvWitESMMLz9N1rlWWiV7NwyuIV1pUoCQQrSqfYxjB0ZgJ-UwjtZ3TAl0VGJ6fCLtZUUf7vjF9LBxa4JeSzkya38xmBnM-33EXOqLwVzBDGYp6pkYzFdMwfFakcEc4vlNyLcz47lx2vlhEmVuQ8zouPEFE0_x9cJ0c5_MbjFze4ZyVhPtlKsgm7uymqTdcVEIlPuBKfHeDIX_AcuPVv1q-BcAAP__KouMtg) Museum in Paris and stole nine priceless jewels once belonging to Napoleon’s family. Disguised as construction workers, the gang used an aerial lift to reach a second-floor window in the Apollon Gallery, then cut through glass cases with power saws to grab tiaras, necklaces, and earrings, before escaping within 10 minutes on motor scooters. See the [security camera footage here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1y6jAQQOGnkTuY3dWPrULFvYU7UmWS0iPkNRaRMWMtEN4-Q14h7Sm-4nwehkPMJV9Ob3HhINM6XPhRC4vwNpz5wWXmXKVKXm7lVtPM6aumgYDsDmFHMIwxl-dgmjFMzMS64YCtA2-NI9PMgV3CSCPGozWts4xjh54NJmfAHidscnhpCAQIoI3ed52lCGwR265Lk1UGeMyybvvzmi8y81Se6523fVqXpoRZ5FqV_qeoV9R_v6qi_n9_eP9Q1FeJcquKevSt97rVGrX3pLWzvtnCeH3kUnJ1rTJwWmIuv6r8acU90E8AAAD__8-qboM). Among the treasures were pieces once owned by Empress Eugénie and Queen Marie-Amélie, described by officials as of “inestimable heritage value.” [Watch a report here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykULuu5CAU-xrSEcEJ5FFQbJPubrtlROAwOXdJGAFJdP9-NTOfsIULy5Zt-c_X8mUp0vH4bXc0NaTlwLtErBXz8o03xg2p1FJpP-NZ3Ibub3ELCNBcCg5i8Zbiz6IabwIiYNegkUMvJq16UM1mvBcaO9WvOPV-lKtdcXKwjko776weGzKvNClASCE61bXjqMEK1FIO4-iCZkqgp5py-53oqBuG-JMuzK1LexPNVuuzsO4Xg5nBfN93G7I9HIJ6GRjMeDCYL_KYGMyfLjnxLd3ck-frmR_R5sKfZ4w8hcDrhi-EytOHeHTWI6eDD3yn46xYuK1vKabzythk4583xUilH5gSj91SfM-r__XpZeBfAAAA__-Yfovf). One damaged crown was later found outside the museum, evidence of their rushed getaway. The heist has outraged French leaders, with some calling it a “national humiliation.”

It's the Horizon IX from [hear.com](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykj72O8jAQAJ_G7kDr9V8oXHwNHV97pWWcDV7OSVBsiHj70_EK1440I83XJV4SV15u_9NMoU9rXGhvlXqnLd5pp1qIW2-d52d9tlwof7ccEdAeFBwQ4pi4vqORY5iIkLSkoLyDkzUOjSwhn7S2Ga6WrB_8SMldNWYgryd0LifJ4bemAEEBaKOPw2AxAVml_DDkyQoDNHJft-N95aUXmup7fdF2zOssayi9P4T-J_As8FwofbjAs9zC-Ni5Vm7OCwO3OXH9OP1Po6-APwEAAP__EetmIg), and it's changing lives (and minds) across the country. The secret lies in [Horizon IX's groundbreaking dual-processing technology](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkT-PnDAQxT-N6XZlbMyagmJ1K7pLdVLKkf8MMBcDK2wf4ttHPq0SKW2mfO9p_vzm5zu8Gwq0Tj_Mgn0aN1jxiAFTwh0-8cAwI8UUEy055OhmdL-iA8GFutT8Ijh4Q-GEpvL9iChQVtjXt5Z3qmlFU8298rrj3na1QCWdqZ0RrdWd0s4qq6WvqC_dai54zbls5FVrJQxHVdc3rd2oWMPRU9r26-dGa5pxDOf2hfvVbUsV-jmlZ2TyzsTAxHAcx3VG820yMXgmBosxQdFoncCQj-Apcl3ycjAuMfm4v33wUh2XbXN_-2CizWmBuOXdIZMPe_qXtKCnvDD5MONIgUzCl-HM8jQ0rUw-cgRcwYQyFP7kwJ6-KJdA05xsDvbit2wDwt-ToGAoOODfjaq998-DQqDY3ljDp8VQ-CaQ_uttX734HQAA__8JeqvO). clean_body: In a daring Sunday morning robbery, Museum in Paris and stole nine priceless jewels once belonging to Napoleon’s family. | | | | | | Monday, October 20, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1967, Roger Patterson and Robert Gimlin allegedly caught Bigfoot on film in Northern California. Patterson claimed until his death in 1972 that the creature in the film was real, while Gimlin declined to speak publicly about the film for decades. Today’s top story in The Flyover sounds like something out of Ocean’s Eleven: at the Louvre that has Paris reeling. It’s the kind of headline you almost wouldn’t believe if it weren’t true. Meet today’s sponsor, , and their game-changing device, ushering in a new era of mental clarity. | Fighting, Airstrikes Threaten Israel-Hamas Peace Israel launched after blaming Hamas for an attack near Rafah that killed two Israeli soldiers, calling it a “blatant violation” of the ceasefire. Gaza health officials said a senior Hamas commander was killed during the strikes. ordering the Rafah assault, claiming the gunmen involved were part of a rogue or rival militia and insisting it remained committed to the truce. Hours later, the U.S.-brokered ceasefire, but the day’s bloodshed has raised doubts about whether President Trump’s peace deal can hold. $35 Billion Obamacare Scam Exposed Federal probes have revealed that pandemic-era expansions to Affordable Care Act subsidies led to an estimated , with 12 million people in 2024 filing no claims despite being insured. has drawn particular attention, reporting more low-income enrollees than census data shows exist, with schemes involving brokers bribing homeless individuals or enrolling people without consent. National watchdogs say up to 6.4 million enrollees this year may be "phantom" sign-ups, costing taxpayers billions. The Biden-era subsidies are , and their extension is a central point of contention in the ongoing government shutdown. Democrats support renewing the aid; Republicans cite the fraud as a reason to end it. Thieves Pull Off Louvre Jewel Heist In a daring Sunday morning robbery, Museum in Paris and stole nine priceless jewels once belonging to Napoleon’s family. Disguised as construction workers, the gang used an aerial lift to reach a second-floor window in the Apollon Gallery, then cut through glass cases with power saws to grab tiaras, necklaces, and earrings, before escaping within 10 minutes on motor scooters. See the . Among the treasures were pieces once owned by Empress Eugénie and Queen Marie-Amélie, described by officials as of “inestimable heritage value.” . One damaged crown was later found outside the museum, evidence of their rushed getaway. body:
News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong.
| | | | |
---
| Letter from the Chair
---
As we enter Day 18 of the government shutdown, the American people are feeling the squeeze -- federal workers remain unpaid, essential services are disrupted, and economic uncertainty looms. Yet instead of focusing on resolving this crisis, Democrats have chosen to stage a theatrical "No Kings" rally -- a blatant attempt to divert attention from their refusal to negotiate in good faith. Their true aim? To nullify the will of the American people as expressed in the 2024 election, pushing an agenda that prioritizes illegal immigrants over hardworking citizens.
This isn't democracy -- it's political sabotage. Democrats are holding the nation hostage, willing to inflict as much misery as necessary to pressure President Trump into caving to their radical demands, such as providing healthcare for illegal immigrants. At a time when Americans are struggling, this obsession with rewarding lawbreakers is not just misguided -- it's an insult to every citizen who values fairness and the rule of law.
President Trump stands firm -- alongside the House and Senate -- defending the mandate given to him by voters. The Democrats' tactics reek of desperation, not leadership. We can only hope their reckless posturing doesn't escalate into violence, as these divisive stunts risk inflaming an already tense situation. It's time for Democrats to stop the theatrics, end the shutdown, and put America first.
Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party
---

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1541, Spanish explorer Francisco Vázquez de Coronado, in a letter to the king of Spain, described the vast [Llano Estacado](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGu4yAQgOHT4C7WMDixKSi2cZdtt7QmMLbRjiECNk5uv3rvCu8C_y99f-7LnaLEtP2mg117r3lJfFbh1rgsay7HPyHNVOTzyi2mjVJIqywIeL1ouCAsgaJ8lqEL7gHB6o6dHm9grxNMQ7c7_RjRMAEEE4YRrAEz2SFMbIxevfVddF8xDQhag0bsR69v1voRLHirkdUAHGLLpW87N35TXeWTX1x6n49O3N7asyrzS-GscD7Ps291p5wkJu5z2RTOO6XwyPmvwplTK5GrwlmEUr5wbeQp5K648DyjSKy3UQ2wHRTl-9B-5vJy-D8AAP__h353fQ) (”Staked Plains”) region in the Texas Panhandle and eastern New Mexico as a wilderness "with no more land marks than if we had been swallowed up by the sea." ## Murder Suspect Drives Car into Buc-ee's
A suspect in a triple homicide in Mabank [crashed into a Buc-ee’s](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u2zAQBk9DdWss17JkFSrcKGleUqYUaHJlLcAfgaQtK6cPnCu8-gM-zMyfr_nLiJf4-GUCj_W9pDnyXjzXynleUg5PbzSb7I9XqhIfJrq4-JmQLqARCGdnxB9z27jxjm7QDY-673C4XPHaNuvYItt739HFEZFGvNp721J_PvfcGzpTI-PnTCOh1qiJTr3V3TDYHge0gyZWLbKTmvKprlz5bcrij_TifLIpNH5ca92KOt8UTYqmfd9PocTPpmjiCM-iaPpIKZpslsCKpmAirKlsUo2Xv-zALJUzuCwviQ-QWBNwjFLg_rTADAXKs2xsK0iEmmXzDGsKYsUxbMmLZSjmUDSZDLeb_v2zu_5o8ui2XbyX0vWqxUcw4v9D1--lfo30LwAA__8IFJPS) in Ennis on Friday morning, hitting a pedestrian. The driver was hospitalized after shooting himself in the head. The Henderson County Sheriff's Office identified 29-year-old Christopher Kyle Reid Jr. as a suspect in a Friday morning shooting that killed a man and two women and injured two other men. Deputies [responded to a 911 call](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2S3CAUBODToAzV4wGSCAicKFunDlX8PGbwIrSF2NHO7V0zV3DYSVd__edj-3C55Hr77Xay_ScdW6XrLNQ7tS0dbf8uTpBr5fk4eq43V2NNZUNAzQVwhC26XJ6bGqL1EI0YyIp5AqMXWNRwt2KJ0vhZpwTJT5J0lEGClgml0DKFIdtXmQAEIUAgjnMQkzFhBgPBCCSmgGLuRxv7nTr9uDOV5_GgNoZjH4q99_51MvmL4cpwva5rDP4UZuwPhqtrPYdCDNeXi-EaWt5fUfLPXApFjjzXv9-NIs-V7867-snP-_HWMlw1CB5jUAKl49PiiStMintDgdMstZqc99EsQ7Px68ql5HOamYLb7nJ5L-z_9-vD4r8AAAD__96GiWY) from a residence around 2:30 a.m. At about 5 a.m., Reid [drove a minivan](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGuozAQRb8GuonGE4KhoNiG7m27JRrscRjJmMh2wst-_SrvF7a8utKVzj1_vpYv1qjp_pt3mep3OJYkZ4lSq-QlHHl_RjbCOb5fR9V05-RTiAsh3cAgEC6eNb6XrvXTin40rUzG9jjeBhy6dptuvRMyPV9RaDXBebbrOohH33sjJrQ6fcYMEhqDhuhinenH0Vkc0Y2GpOlQvNYjX-omVb65hPg-XpIv7tjbOG21Pkpz_dXQ3NB8nuflDMyfsqGZc1UXpaH5w9XQ7LLun1izPqLA_sxeMpRneYirsB3loZWj_hUPHKpkcJnLpukOmuoB69OBSAFNIClpgbIdP8fApnuRGBqaabCw9rZjYoIrBg_daK8wDNaCCegYcVjdSG2e_OPUGLX0tunwvrPGH6j6fypeE_0LAAD__8PcnlA) into the convenience store's southwest entrance, hitting a woman in her 30s from Oklahoma. She was hospitalized with non-life-threatening injuries. Sheryl Noble, who lives near the home where the shooting occurred, said she was awakened around 2 a.m. by a man pounding on her door, asking for help and saying his brother had shot him. "_I was scared. Still shaken up_ ," [she said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHO4yAQRk-DO6KZiWNMQbGNu3_bLS0M44CEIQISJ7dfZa-w9Sd9eu_9-Vl_bEwx33_bg01_72XNfLbEvXNd91KPZ7LItqbPq_SY7zb7vKeVgG4SQRKs3sb0WcfBmw28xoENqgn0bYZ5HILZFc48K4QNQSmPemZgy-OE24a36TZE8z1DIEAEJLooh5PWToEGp5FYjMA-9lIvPXDnt217-pQX14srx5BM6P3RxPWXoEXQcp7nJW_O7-d3FrR8fQQtqTibBC29xkdieTyr5yrbsz3YdemqbYGbjLkXyTnHJrenk8xNtlBKbzLEo3HaZcyyB5aBrRe0XPX1Os4kaBmq8Y8zphTbpMQI98PG9I-w_1_Xl6G_AQAA___QVI0P).
## 12-Year-Old's Scuba Death Scrutinized
The family of a 12-year-old girl who died at a scuba training site in Terrell two months ago is still [looking for answers](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFvwyAQBeBfY29EB3GwGRi6ZEvXjtYFDhvpDBEmTtxfX7nqP-j-6em993Ubbxg5pukTF7L1HfKY6LUy1UplDLksT0ZJWHjfco1pwuRT4FGBuggJQsHoMfI-dq23d_BGtmRlr8FcBhi6drZnbc7aoHIu0H3QA8oATg8ajPakXWijPcIkKJASpFKn3kltjOvBgDNSUdMB-VhzOdWZKr1xDbznjcrJ5aVlO9f6WJvzR6Oujbr6uNGCE37HRAdo1HV1zzsKH7eYJnHM-2PC5eXxrFSEx4qC81pFyMz5dUBPWGeRg5BK7IRFZPbC74xJzFhKXHNqi_WPV2SOq-6bDqYFI_-2qv_7crPqJwAA___HKYtr) about what happened to their daughter. Crucial evidence from the incident has not been analyzed, and one of the instructors said a dive computer was “lost,” according to an attorney representing the family. Dylan Harrison visited the Scuba Ranch on August 16 for her [certification dive](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkM2OrCAUhJ9Gd5gDojYLFnfjru92lua0HJQEoQdof95-4rzC7CpfKlWp-npOT3TeheU_bqTLaeMU6MieSqE02Zi2j0dOmPy1x-LCgsEE6ycBomMcmIDJoPPXJGujX2AUr0nzoQfVPeAh61Xjo32JwXa9VWZuuVKAylLXd1a2KLuhdvoO4yCAc-BCNMPMe6XmARTMiguqJJBxJaamrFToxGz9FXdKzRy32uu1lHeu2n-VGCsxHsfR2HjKe8ZtqMR4y0qMef68kNH5plTY94dycTFkFsMSXViYC_uNFrwxM5fHwFZMyeUY6qTN-3Deu9wPlYRlQ-d_68vfTtu1-AkAAP__pJ-Dsw) in a private lake. During her dive, she was separated from her group, which consisted of eight students, a dive master, and a dive instructor employed by the Collin County Sheriff’s Office. Dylan’s body was found at a depth of 43 feet after her group surfaced and asked for help. According to attorney David Concannon, the dive computers worn by the dive master and instructor were not immediately collected, and one of them has since been [lost in the lake](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOnDAQhJ8GOp92FzigcJGG7k-bEhl7DZaMfTJ7_MfbR0TJE6TdnW80M7--5i8TYkjrT7Ozlo_Pc-LvI7IIl9nnsr-jQTYlXmeWkFaTXPJxJqBOISiC2ZkQr7mtnV7AjVizxv4JYzfA0NabRt8TdD3arl8sOmo80NJwQ467YcGhDvo2QyBABCR69Baf42h7GMGOSFy1wC5ILg_ZWPhjDh-vfHJ52LzXUW8ir6NqflQ0VTS5cHJJLPezoumw78Wou1NF08YmyqYO41muW8tGtr-Msnl_vYWL4jM4TpZVWFMu7JTx9xnpKipHd6h_WF20e32HGMPx7KsW1t2E-CeU_N-Up6bfAQAA__8RLIlp). Concannon claims the Kaufman County Sheriff’s Office has yet to analyze the data from Dylan’s dive computer, despite acknowledging the incident is an open criminal investigation. "_There's a family that is grieving terribly, and they don't have answers_ ," [he said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unTAQhJ8GOqO1Y_4KF2nobtqUaK-9wEqLfWR84PD2EXmF200xGs33_f2av5CF4_oHd3Lls6Q50nUIlUJ5XlLe34KaMMt9psJxxRjiIrMB0yoNysAckOWebR3cN4RR1-R038HYDjDYenOjHgY9EGHnfdtBQIsIvg3WejT94Gt2z5gGA1qDNqbpve7G0fcwgh-1ocoCBS4pN2WjQh88FrnTSbnxaa_FbaW8jurX78pMlZmu62qW9LEPxlOozPTEykw-vz2jKDo5UPSkJB1FHf79jSoQlk1xPOkovGLhFJU26ibMKklQK2epswuvi0X46PrKwrojy_8P5WfmTmf-BQAA__8fMISs).

It’s Not Random** The BBC caught scam call center workers on hidden cameras as they laughed at the people they were tricking. One worker bragged about making $250k from victims. The disturbing truth? Scammers don’t pick phone numbers at random. [They buy your data from brokers.](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D3O4yAQxvHT4C7WMHZwKChWWrnLtluiMQwOEoYIk6_brxztDd7yN8Xor-fv1V4pppjXP7Sxae9QbObXnrg1rjaUuj0SSaaaPs_SYl4p-xySRcDzScIJwXqK6WPHzpsFvJYdGzkp0OcLXMbuZpwnmi6LQpAgaVEkl7NXfuERtZrGoYvmeCYBQUqQiP3kpNLaTaDBaYksRmAfW6l9u3HjN-0hfcqTa-_K1iVza-2-i-GXwFng7JlSH7Mra459LAJnCsE6McwlBK42ejH8VgLVcf5CDtPhR03_LVDt5VEdH6i8xpIpHYFdNf7-iinFXU1ihHWjmL4V7WfbPQ3-CwAA__9pzIA5) Once your data is out there, it’s not just calls. **➤ Conroe-based** real estate developer Clearlake Asset Management is building a five-story luxury condo in Galveston's West End with a rooftop recreation area modeled after those on cruise ships. Solarus will include pickleball and basketball courts, miniature golf, and jacuzzis. ([More](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpCAURp9GO8zl6gxSUGxj92-7pWHgqiRXMIA68_ab2VfY9vuSk5Pz52f-sYFDXH_bnUx9L2mOdBemWinPS8r7yVaSzfy5Ug1xtdHHhWcEfAgJAmH2NvBnHlpvXuC1bMlI9QT9GGEc2s2M_UM5jeTkOCrULzl4p_oBPAyjo9fYBvOFSUCQEiRip5x8au0UaHBaIjUDkA815a5uVOlty8KfdFHuXNpbNlutR2n6Xw1ODU73fXduyyl-3wan9eRFuGRLbXCyuQbH9J0tX1RqisKl6NMeYjj3Ilw-QyFRtnCIktjmswiUoHql--7YjjYbf9yBOZSnagZYdxv4n0f9v3qXwb8BAAD__yXhhKQ)) **➤ Last Energy**, an Austin-based manufacturer of modular nuclear reactors, will install its PWR-5 reactor at Texas A&M's RELLIS research campus as part of a pilot project. Experts say there are several steps you can take:
* Use a VPN all the time
* Buy a burner phone instead of a smartphone
* Use a secure email service instead of Gmail or Yahoo
* Delete your social media accounts and associated data

clean_body: Over 400,000 fans descended on Austin's Circuit of the Americas for yesterday's Formula 1 United States Grand Prix. The race coincided with an announcement from F1 that Austin will the event through 2034. | | | | | | Monday, October 20, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1541, Spanish explorer Francisco Vázquez de Coronado, in a letter to the king of Spain, described the vast (”Staked Plains”) region in the Texas Panhandle and eastern New Mexico as a wilderness "with no more land marks than if we had been swallowed up by the sea." Today is the first day of early voting for the constitutional amendments election and local bond and tax rate elections. In 2023, voter turnout for the constitutional amendments election hit a at 14.4%. If you're tired of mystery calls and spam texts and feeling like your personal information is floating around online, this eye-opening report explains why it's happening and how today's sponsor, , can help stop it. Busy day? Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog—your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Murder Suspect Drives Car into Buc-ee's A suspect in a triple homicide in Mabank in Ennis on Friday morning, hitting a pedestrian. The driver was hospitalized after shooting himself in the head. The Henderson County Sheriff's Office identified 29-year-old Christopher Kyle Reid Jr. as a suspect in a Friday morning shooting that killed a man and two women and injured two other men. Deputies from a residence around 2:30 a.m. At about 5 a.m., Reid into the convenience store's southwest entrance, hitting a woman in her 30s from Oklahoma. She was hospitalized with non-life-threatening injuries. Sheryl Noble, who lives near the home where the shooting occurred, said she was awakened around 2 a.m. by a man pounding on her door, asking for help and saying his brother had shot him. "I was scared. Still shaken up ," . 12-Year-Old's Scuba Death Scrutinized The family of a 12-year-old girl who died at a scuba training site in Terrell two months ago is still about what happened to their daughter. Crucial evidence from the incident has not been analyzed, and one of the instructors said a dive computer was “lost,” according to an attorney representing the family. Dylan Harrison visited the Scuba Ranch on August 16 for her in a private lake. During her dive, she was separated from her group, which consisted of eight students, a dive master, and a dive instructor employed by the Collin County Sheriff’s Office. Dylan’s body was found at a depth of 43 feet after her group surfaced and asked for help. According to attorney David Concannon, the dive computers worn by the dive master and instructor were not immediately collected, and one of them has since been . Concannon claims the Kaufman County Sheriff’s Office has yet to analyze the data from Dylan’s dive computer, despite acknowledging the incident is an open criminal investigation. "There's a family that is grieving terribly, and they don't have answers ," . Formula 1 Race Staying in Austin Over 400,000 fans descended on Austin's Circuit of the Americas for yesterday's Formula 1 United States Grand Prix. The race coincided with an announcement from F1 that Austin will the event through 2034. Red Bull's Max Verstappen from start to finish after to win the pole position, marking his fourth victory at COTA. After yesterday's win, the Dutchman trails McLaren driver Oscar Piastri of Australia by 40 points, putting him in contention to win the championship with five races remaining. Verstappen, a four-time champion, about the opportunity to win another title: "The chance is there. We just need to try and deliver these weekends until the end. We will try whatever we can." Several celebrities at the event, including Matthew McConaughey, Joe Rogan, Jay Leno, Zachary Levi, and Shaboozey. | Flying together with our sponsor Unknown Number Calling? It’s Not Random The BBC caught scam call center workers on hidden cameras as they laughed at the people they were tricking. One worker bragged about making $250k from victims. The disturbing truth? Scammers don’t pick phone numbers at random. Once your data is out there, it’s not just calls. It’s phishing, impersonation, and identity theft. : They delete your info from the web, monitor for new threats, and keep erasing your data as new risks appear. | ➤ Today is the first day of for local bond and tax rate elections and the statewide constitutional amendments election. Early voting goes through next Friday, and Election Day is Tuesday, November 4. () ➤ El Paso: The annual Amigo Airsho at Fort Bliss was canceled over the ongoing government shutdown. Military installations are "required to suspend all community outreach activities that are not related to national security or safety of life and property," according to Garrison Commander Col. Michael V. Soyka. () ➤ Houston: Steven Marks, a 58-year-old postal worker, was killed Saturday when a suspected drunk driver collided with his delivery truck. The driver, Jose Romero, was charged with intoxication manslaughter. () ➤ Pampa: Gray County Sheriff Michael "Big Mac" Ryan died Friday night of an undisclosed cause. He was first elected to the post in 2016. () ➤ Abilene: Marwan Marouf, a leader with the Muslim American Society of Dallas, has been detained since last month for allegedly overstaying his visa. Last week, authorities accused him of supporting terrorism because of previous donations to a Richardson-based group shut down in 2001 over ties to Hamas. () ➤ Dallas: Mayor Eric Johnson has requested a review of Police Chief Daniel Comeaux's unilateral decision to reject $25 million in federal funding to participate in ICE’s 287(g) immigration enforcement program. "Declining ICE's offer may mean forfeiting significant financial resources ," he said. () ➤ Galveston: The cost to replace the Pelican Island Bridge, which closed briefly after it was struck by a barge last year, could exceed $250 million, according to city officials. Five months ago, the estimate was $180 million. ------------------------------------------------------------
By Ted Cohen on Oct 20, 2025 06:48 am
Maine’s first large-scale AI data center is being planned for the former Loring Air Force Base in Limestone. Developed by Loring LiquidCool Data Center and Green 4 Maine LLC, the facility is slated to open early next year. The center, which will use advanced liquid-cooling technology, will be powered partly by hydropower from New Brunswick. [...]

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My opponent can’t even condemn murder.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bmOf/?__vbtrk=MzI4MDI0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI4MDI0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)Friend - I can’t believe I have to send you this message. But after my recent debate with Abigail Spanberger, I must say it:
If you can’t condemn murder, you can’t be Governor.
When I confronted my opponent about her ticket-mate Jay Jones' vile calls for violence against a political opponent and his family, she cowered in silence. Not once, not twice, but four times she refused to demand Jones' removal from the ticket.
This is not leadership - it's a slimy political game.
Spanberger's mealy-mouthed answers were nothing but a pathetic attempt to cover her own tracks. When I pressed her to take a real stand, she crumbled.
That's not just a failure of leadership - it's a betrayal of every American who expects their leaders to stand up for what's right. Abigail Spanberger has proven she is wholly unfit for office!
As we used to say in the Marines, “not fit to move to the next rank.”
We CANNOT let unhinged radicals like Jay Jones and Abigail Spanberger win in November.

| Peter,
A dark shadow is spreading across Pennsylvania in the run up to the critical November 4th Pennsylvania Supreme Court Retention election.
MAGA billionaires have unleashed an insidious deception campaign--pouring millions into misleading ads disguised as pro-Democrat voter guides--using blatant lies to try and trick Democrats into voting NO (the MAGA position) on retaining PA's Democratic Supreme Court justices.

We have 15 days to stop the next domino from falling. The fate of our Democracy is on the line.
Defend Our Courts is taking a stand and is working to counter the GOP's lies in this critical election. Already our Vote Yes ads and mailers have reached millions of PA voters but we are still being outspent 10-1.
Every dollar MAGA spends on lies has to be met with truth, and we're running out of time to close the gap.

My Democrat opponent already has megadonors like George Soros and CCP party members backing her. She's run up the score and created a MASSIVE fundraising gap. Now that Bill Clinton and Hillary Clinton are getting involved, I'm certain she'll find new, HUGE liberal donors. The Clintons have had ties to dirty money and have thrown their weight around, influencing the outcome of elections for DECADES. We cannot let them succeed in buying this CLOSE and CRUCIAL race! My team and I are fighting to win in November, but the truth is, we're being outraised and outspent, BADLY. If we don't turn things around IMMEDIATELY, our ads will be taken down and we won't be able to get our conservative message out. So here's my call to action: not asking you to send in $10,000; I'm only asking you to step up with a donation of a few dollars or more! If every conservative reading this rose to the occasion, I know we would close the fundraising gap, keep our ads running, and WIN this CLOSE race! Please don't sit out in this battle - I need your support now more than ever. you so much for sticking with me, Winsome Earle-SearsChristianMotherMarineConservative | . Marine. Mom. **April Chapman** is one of the boldest Christian voices challenging America's moral and cultural confusion. As host of _Unshakable with April Chapman_ , she brings biblical truth, sharp insight, and fearless conviction to some of the most controversial issues of our time.
**[PURCHASE YOUR TICKET HERE.](https://substack.com/redirect/2d43a667-8004-4dc7-a7e8-6318b3f3eef8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2d43a667-8004-4dc7-a7e8-6318b3f3eef8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The founder of **Standard House Media** , April uses her platform to equip believers and confront cultural deception with clarity and courage. She has appeared on _News Nation, Newsmax, AGTV, Channel News Asia, and The Allie Beth Stuckey Show_ --consistently reminding audiences that truth is not fragile, and faith is not negotiable.
At **[Seed& Roots 2025](https://substack.com/redirect/2d43a667-8004-4dc7-a7e8-6318b3f3eef8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**, April will explore how faith, family, and the courage to speak truth are not only cultural anchors but essential to restoring moral order in a nation that has lost its footing. Her message: **truth still matters, families still matter, and silence is not an option.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3d407eea-7edd-4989-8062-fd0e408aaa23?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

body:
We need to protect her at all costs.

New York has been on the backslide for years now with rising crime, failing schools, the highest cost of living in the country, and incompetent leadership in the Mayor's office. **Maybe it's time to give Republicans a chance to clean things up and _HUMILIATE_ the Democrats by beating them in a race they took for granted.**
---

**New York City has always been symbolic of our great nation and the American Dream. ** But now she's at a crossroads. Zohran Mamdani wants to destroy our great city with his Socialist Agenda, increasing crime and taxing everyone into poverty. Republican candidate Curtis Sliwa doesn't just talk a big game - he walks it. **New Yorkers know Sliwa, and he has their trust.** He is a renowned community leader, activist, broadcaster and founder of the Guardian Angels - a famous volunteer civilian patrol that prevented crime and promoted safety on New York subways at a time when crime was out of control.

name: Concealed Permit
subject: Your CCW Permit is approved! download here ✅
body:
Complete the entire certification process online...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22085/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/6a71e0ea368de19daa523ae21155515c991b8dc5). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22085/6374453/07c4f76fc501380345ea6aebc9884a7acef35d26/6a71e0ea368de19daa523ae21155515c991b8dc5?message_id=IjdhOWRmMDYwLTkwMDMtMDEzZS1mYjkyLTIyNjVjNGE2ZWEwNUBuYXRpb25hbGd1bm93bmVyLm9yZyI=).
---
| | [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22085/6374453/ad8f6cb55bef12abe2a22e679c919a6483273b20/6a71e0ea368de19daa523ae21155515c991b8dc5)
---
---
|
---
It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22085/6374453/ad8f6cb55bef12abe2a22e679c919a6483273b20/6a71e0ea368de19daa523ae21155515c991b8dc5). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:

* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22085/6374453/ad8f6cb55bef12abe2a22e679c919a6483273b20/6a71e0ea368de19daa523ae21155515c991b8dc5)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today! ****
---

---

name: TN House Democratic Caucus
subject: Trump blaming Democrats for his fourth government shutdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
body:
Official White House X accounts blaming Democrats for Republicans’ shutdown
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K80TGNBTBGBB73APNYTPY54M_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K80TGNBTBGBB73APNYTPY54M_1)
---
| | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K80TGNBTBGBB73APNYTPY54M_2)
---
| Dear Peter, **It’s not surprising that Trump is again shirking responsibility and blaming Democrats.** Democrats' stance is clear, keep Medicaid funded, keep healthcare costs low, and keep the government open. In the wake of the debilitating cuts to TennCare and SNAP across our state, as a result of the BBB, these additional cuts and latest threats to Tennesseans’ health are reckless.
In the latest CBS YouGov poll, 40% of Americans said that they blame Trump and Republicans for the shutdown. One in three Republican voters said that they would blame Republican congressional members. Many reports have said that behind closed doors Trump and his administration hoped for this shutdown so they could exert even more control over government programs and further the wreckage caused by DOGE.
It’s clear that Trump, Marsha Blackburn, Bill Hagerty and John Rose don’t care about the economic outcomes of their policies or this shutdown, but we will and must continue fighting for Tennesseans.
We need you in this fight with us. We will continue to speak the truth during this shutdown, so we set the record straight on who’s to blame for the disaster in DC that affects us all. It’s time to keep up our momentum and tell Republicans that the way they’re running our country is unacceptable.
Chip in $40 if you’re not a furloughed federal employee. If you are, please reach out and let us know how we can help you and your family.
---
| _**If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.**_
---
| | [ Donate $40 ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K80TGNBTBGBB73APNYTPY54M_3)
---
| Together, we can get through this.
— Tennessee House Democrats

---

name: Laura Jones for Congress
subject: Back for Round Four: Help Me Flip Texas Blue!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Jones for Congress_ _P
body:
In times like these, our country needs ordinary people willing to step up, speak truth to power, and help uplift our communities.
| | [](https://1xz3r.mjt.lu/lnk/AWsAAIFy_UkAAc6iUXoAA-Neh6MAAYKKXNoAoUWGADIMFwBo9jQk7-JyRv1KROWzmHCydDcepAAtq28/1/b4Ax9J1t-TG09MQ1G_nWsw/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xhdXJham9uZXNmb3Jjb25ncmVzcw)

# **Back for Round Four: Help Me Flip Texas Blue!**
I wanted to share some big news with you today: I am officially running for Congress in Texas’s 8th District again. In times like these, our country needs _ordinary_ people willing to step up, speak truth to power, and help uplift our communities. As a mom, a business owner, and a born-and-raised Texan, I know that real representation starts with having a voice from one of us, not a career politician. [**_My campaign and winning a seat in the United States Congress will be instrumental in achieving better representation for our communities and flipping Texas BLUE—so if you’re ready to make it happen, chip in today!_**](https://1xz3r.mjt.lu/lnk/AWsAAIFy_UkAAc6iUXoAA-Neh6MAAYKKXNoAoUWGADIMFwBo9jQk7-JyRv1KROWzmHCydDcepAAtq28/2/xrgFqd-gMUut8fjHUdzIBQ/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xhdXJham9uZXNmb3Jjb25ncmVzcw)

clean_body: In times like these, our country needs ordinary people willing to step up, speak truth to power, and help uplift our communities. | | Back for Round Four: Help Me Flip Texas Blue! I wanted to share some big news with you today: I am officially running for Congress in Texas’s 8th District again. In times like these, our country needs ordinary people willing to step up, speak truth to power, and help uplift our communities. As a mom, a business owner, and a born-and-raised Texan, I know that real representation starts with having a voice from one of us, not a career politician. | | This is my fourth run for Congress, and I truly believe fourth time’s the charm — we can do it. Together, we can make history and bring real representation to the people of District 8.My campaign is about building a Texas that works for everyone by strengthening our public schools, making healthcare affordable, investing in renewable energy, and protecting voter rights, women’s rights, and LGBTQ+ rights. We deserve leaders who listen, show up, and fight for all of us, not just the privileged few. I’m ready to be one of us—for all of us. *If you"ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | Thank you so much. I am looking forward to updating you in the coming days and to get going with you by my side.\- Laura | | | | | | Paid for by Laura Jones for Congress P.O. Box 742 Coldspring, TX 77331 Want to change how you receive these emails?.

subject: They’re trying to ban books. Again.

body:
Censorship is on the rise, and we have to fight back.
| | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K80TMJKHX06N0BNQS3PPB8AD_0)
---
| | | | Far-right groups are escalating their campaigns to remove books by LGBTQ+, Black, and other marginalized authors from our libraries. They want to decide whose stories matter—and whose get erased. This has never been about “parental rights.” It’s about power. The power to control what our children learn, what history is told, and who is allowed to be seen. But from school boards to statehouses, communities are fighting back—and winning. When we stand together for the truth, censorship loses every time. ** ** [**Read more →**](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K80TMJKHX06N0BNQS3PPB8AD_1)
** ** – Jesse, DemsGive
