| |

Friend,
This is it - the fight for Michigan’s elections comes down to **tonight at midnight.**
**“Voters Not Politicians”** and their allies on the left are already organizing, raising millions to push their agenda and weaken our election safeguards. They don’t want clear rules or accountability, they want confusion at the polls and loopholes that open the door to abuse.
We can’t let that happen. The **Michigan Citizens Only Voting Amendment** is the firewall protecting our elections but we need the resources to keep up the fight.
⏰ **The deadline is midnight. Don’t wait.** Every dollar counts in this final push.
👉 [[DONATE LINK]](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=529a3e6310&e=ecf60db114)
Together, we’ll defend Michigan’s elections and make sure only U.S. citizens decide Michigan’s future.
-**Citizens Only Voting Committee**

Friend, this is serious. **The Supreme Court’s ultra-conservative majority just signaled they’re ready to gut the Voting Rights Act.** If they follow through, it could open the floodgates to new gerrymandering across the country – and cost Democrats multiple seats in Congress. This, combined with GOP states like Texas pushing redistricting maps that silence Democratic voters, is part of a coordinated effort to lock in Republican power for years to come. **This is as blatant as it gets, folks. And this attempt to silence voters requires our IMMEDIATE attention.** [**Please rush in a $3 donation to the DASS Legal Fund today. subject: What do you think of this potential ruling?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
NPR: Supreme Court seems poised to further undercut the Voting Rights Act [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/NPR_SCOTUS_VRA.png]
The Supreme Court seems headed for another ruling that undercuts the landmark 1965 Voting Rights Act.
Once considered the jewel in the crown of the civil rights movement, the Voting Rights Act has been largely dismembered since 2013 by the increasingly conservative Supreme Court.
We want to hear from voters in your area about this news. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Do you think the Supreme Court should be "dismembering" the Voting Rights Act?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=102025_1yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=102025_1no&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=102025_1&amount=20]

# [Why MAGA Can't Handle Million of Americans Saying: "No Kings"](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=176650787&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc2NjUwNzg3LCJpYXQiOjE3NjA5NzMyNzgsImV4cCI6MTc2MzU2NTI3OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.iYwxzt1BMEftuJjoeWzjfB-pdJJNmTz2A8biXLrvn9U)
### A nationwide rejection of fascism has them spiraling.
| | [Mike Nellis](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---
| Oct 20
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=176650787&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc2NjUwNzg3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2MDk3MzI3OCwiZXhwIjoxNzYzNTY1Mjc4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDI1ODExNSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.uRgja0BiuAGm8Q_XdMvQxc9UoVtRUS3cfjbqmu15fRA&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

---

_**[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and pay our new Community Manager a living wage. Paid subscribers make it all possible--just $8/month if you're down to support](https://substack.com/redirect/9ad7304c-782a-465c-bb59-2e861588f1b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/9ad7304c-782a-465c-bb59-2e861588f1b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
MAGA world is absolutely crashing out over this weekend's No Kings protests--**7 million Americans** hitting the streets in a peaceful show of love for country, love for community, and a total rejection of the fascism they're trying to shove down our throats. I went to the Chicago protest, and it was overflowing with love, creativity, signs, and patriotism. I was stunned by how many people were carrying American flags.
Someone even pulled me aside and said they'd seen me on my show with Joe Walsh last Friday--where we talked about reclaiming patriotism from Republicans, who use it like a damn shield to deflect criticism from the harm they're actively causing to people we care about. And we need to flip that. We need to make the American flag a promise--of what this country can be.
Seeing people out there doing just that? Incredible. And to meet one of you who heard that message? Even cooler. Hello out there, if you're reading this.
Meanwhile, the MAGA influencers and politicians are losing it. Seven million Americans take to the streets and instead of taking the hint--that they are not popular--they start spiraling. Don't let them fool you: these protests matter, and they terrify the right because they blow up the fantasy that Trump is some unstoppable juggernaut, beloved by all. The bigger and more visible the resistance becomes, the weaker they get. And you can see it in how incoherent their reaction has been.
* * *
_**[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and pay our new Community Manager a living wage. Paid subscribers make it all possible--just $8/month if you're down to support](https://substack.com/redirect/9ad7304c-782a-465c-bb59-2e861588f1b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/9ad7304c-782a-465c-bb59-2e861588f1b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
They started the week calling everyone who attended Antifa and domestic terrorists. Then it was: "They're all paid protesters." Right--George Soros apparently wrote checks for 7 million people with no evidence. Then they tried to claim the protests were fake altogether. I posted a video from the Boston No Kings rally--huge turnout--and MAGA influencers, even Ted Cruz, jumped in claiming it was from the 2017 Women's March. Straight-up lying. The video's been verified from multiple angles. But they're photoshopping fake "community notes" to pretend it's fake. That's how deep in denial they are (and by the way, their posts with the fake community notes have a _real_ community note on them confirming my video is real.)
And when that didn't work, they pivoted again--this time claiming it's sad that 7 million people protested their favorite president instead of watching football. Well, guess what? I did both (and I know a lot of you did, too.) I drove to Chicago, marched with my fellow patriots, listened to Governor Pritzker's powerful speech, and then hauled ass two hours east to South Bend to watch Notre Dame stomp USC in primetime. Turns out you can do both.
What's actually sad is spending your entire weekend lying about a protest you're clearly afraid of. That's pathetic.
And here's the bigger issue: we're living in two completely different realities. There's the real world--where people are hurting, where protests are happening, where inflation's skyrocketing and the job market's horrendous. And then there's MAGA world, where Trump is the divine source of truth and nothing bad ever happens unless it's someone else's fault.
They lie about everything. They're denying these protests even happened. They deny the jobs numbers. They deny the inflation reports. (Which, by the way, they haven't even released the last one.) Just like they keep denying that Trump is in the Epstein files or that Tom Homan took a $50,000 cash bribe that's ON TAPE FROM AN UNDERCOVER FBI AGENT. They deny. They deflect. They bullshit. And then they act smug like they're winning or accomplishing anything that improves your life.
Let them. Let them keep spinning on that hamster wheel of delusion.
We've got work to do, no question. We need to rebuild a Democratic Party that delivers for real people and earns their trust back. But this weekend proved it again: there are more of us than there are of them. And what Trump and his people are doing? It's not popular. People are pissed. Pissed about an economy rigged for billionaires--most of whom are in Trump's inner circle. Pissed about ICE agents in unmarked vans kidnapping people in cities like Chicago. Pissed about a government that silences critics, attacks the press, and weaponizes the Department of Justice to go after Trump's political enemies. And so we organize. We show up. We protect our neighbors and our communities. We do the work.
We've got to stay grounded in reality. The real one. The harder one. The one that demands effort and energy. The one that doesn't turn a blind eye to what's happening in America. Because that's what they want to break--our sense of truth, our sense of each other, our sense of patriotism. But they won't. Not if we stay in community. Not if we keep organizing with love, empathy, and strength.
This weekend, we sent a message. A warning: There are no kings in America. Not now, not ever. Trump or anyone else.
Keep sending that message--in every protest, every vote, every conversation, every act of resistance, big or small. Inch by inch, day by day, we will beat these fascists.

clean_body: A nationwide rejection of fascism has them spiraling. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? A nationwide rejection of fascism has them spiraling. | | | Oct 20 | | | | | | | | | | | | : MAGA world is absolutely crashing out over this weekend's No Kings protests--7 million Americans hitting the streets in a peaceful show of love for country, love for community, and a total rejection of the fascism they're trying to shove down our throats. I went to the Chicago protest, and it was overflowing with love, creativity, signs, and patriotism. I was stunned by how many people were carrying American flags. Someone even pulled me aside and said they'd seen me on my show with Joe Walsh last Friday--where we talked about reclaiming patriotism from Republicans, who use it like a damn shield to deflect criticism from the harm they're actively causing to people we care about. And we need to flip that. We need to make the American flag a promise--of what this country can be. Seeing people out there doing just that? Incredible. And to meet one of you who heard that message? Even cooler. Hello out there, if you're reading this. Meanwhile, the MAGA influencers and politicians are losing it. Seven million Americans take to the streets and instead of taking the hint--that they are not popular--they start spiraling. Don't let them fool you: these protests matter, and they terrify the right because they blow up the fantasy that Trump is some unstoppable juggernaut, beloved by all. The bigger and more visible the resistance becomes, the weaker they get. And you can see it in how incoherent their reaction has been. : * They started the week calling everyone who attended Antifa and domestic terrorists. Then it was: "They're all paid protesters." Right--George Soros apparently wrote checks for 7 million people with no evidence. Then they tried to claim the protests were fake altogether. I posted a video from the Boston No Kings rally--huge turnout--and MAGA influencers, even Ted Cruz, jumped in claiming it was from the 2017 Women's March. Straight-up lying. The video's been verified from multiple angles. But they're photoshopping fake "community notes" to pretend it's fake. That's how deep in denial they are (and by the way, their posts with the fake community notes have a real community note on them confirming my video is real.) And when that didn't work, they pivoted again--this time claiming it's sad that 7 million people protested their favorite president instead of watching football. Well, guess what? I did both (and I know a lot of you did, too.) I drove to Chicago, marched with my fellow patriots, listened to Governor Pritzker's powerful speech, and then hauled ass two hours east to South Bend to watch Notre Dame stomp USC in primetime. Turns out you can do both. What's actually sad is spending your entire weekend lying about a protest you're clearly afraid of. That's pathetic. And here's the bigger issue: we're living in two completely different realities. There's the real world--where people are hurting, where protests are happening, where inflation's skyrocketing and the job market's horrendous. And then there's MAGA world, where Trump is the divine source of truth and nothing bad ever happens unless it's someone else's fault. They lie about everything. They're denying these protests even happened. They deny the jobs numbers. They deny the inflation reports. (Which, by the way, they haven't even released the last one.) Just like they keep denying that Trump is in the Epstein files or that Tom Homan took a $50,000 cash bribe that's ON TAPE FROM AN UNDERCOVER FBI AGENT. They deny. They deflect. They bullshit. And then they act smug like they're winning or accomplishing anything that improves your life. Let them. Let them keep spinning on that hamster wheel of delusion. We've got work to do, no question. We need to rebuild a Democratic Party that delivers for real people and earns their trust back. But this weekend proved it again: there are more of us than there are of them. And what Trump and his people are doing? It's not popular. People are pissed. Pissed about an economy rigged for billionaires--most of whom are in Trump's inner circle. Pissed about ICE agents in unmarked vans kidnapping people in cities like Chicago. Pissed about a government that silences critics, attacks the press, and weaponizes the Department of Justice to go after Trump's political enemies. And so we organize. We show up. We protect our neighbors and our communities. We do the work. We've got to stay grounded in reality. The real one. The harder one. The one that demands effort and energy. The one that doesn't turn a blind eye to what's happening in America. Because that's what they want to break--our sense of truth, our sense of each other, our sense of patriotism. But they won't. Not if we stay in community. Not if we keep organizing with love, empathy, and strength. This weekend, we sent a message. A warning: There are no kings in America. Not now, not ever. Trump or anyone else. Keep sending that message--in every protest, every vote, every conversation, every act of resistance, big or small. Inch by inch, day by day, we will beat these fascists. Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy. You 're currently a free subscriber to Endless Urgency with Mike Nellis. For the full experience or to support my work so I can keep it free for as many people as possible, upgrade your subscription. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Mike Nellis 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

Dear Peter,
---
Unite4Freedom kicks off its Halloween-themed series of Phantom Voter Reports today, showing evidence of the impact of synthetic - or "phantom" - voters in key races across the country. We begin in Palm Beach County, Florida, home of President Donald Trump and First Lady Melania Trump. Our investigation found that **12.1% of voters were unverifiable** using the same databases relied on by banks, courts, and law enforcement. No driver’s record. No social media. No bank account. No trace – except a ballot. This evidence suggests that Phantom Voters' "paranormal" influence may have swung election contests to an outcome distinctly different from the will of living, breathing voters. This raises the question no official dares to answer: Who knows who won?
---

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. | | | RFK Jr just dropped a bomb—and Washington is in panic. This isn't a rumor. Not speculation. These are facts the authorities are desperate to hide. They mocked him for saying the pandemic started in a lab. They sneered when he warned about microplastics in our bodies. They dismissed his claims of FDA corruption. But he was right. Always right. Now his latest warning is darker than anything before. Leaked documents reveal: America’s seniors are quietly being pushed into danger—mysterious illnesses, sudden collapses written off as “normal aging,” and millions funneling into risky prescriptions while the truth remains hidden. If you were born before January 1, 1965 , this is your personal risk. Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from YourCapitalMinds.com, an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. I'm reaching out to MAGA's most loyal warriors to thank them for their hard work.

You have **NEVER** turned your back on President Trump and I as we fight to **MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! **

We are so grateful for your efforts to take America back!

**WE LOVE YOU** , for all you've done for our country.

Seriously, we're honored by your endless support.

Every day, our Administration is fighting for **YOU** - and we couldn't do it without your help.

This is the **TOP MAGA PATRIOTS** of the year - the most precious resource in our movement.

**ADD YOUR NAME NOW to this EXCLUSIVE list. **

I am so grateful to you, and I hope I can continue to count on you in the coming days.

If you're still loyal to MAGA, ADD YOUR NAME NOW!

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kijewski for Michigan, 115 W Allegan St, Ste 900, Lansing, MI 48933_
body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/kevinformi/breaking-kevin-kijewski-first-to-file-for-mi-gop-endorsement-convention-as-attorney-general-4740870?e=4b10910eed)

# BREAKING NEWS
# KEVIN KIJEWSKI FIRST TO FILE FOR MICHIGAN GOP ENDORSEMENT CONVENTION AS ATTORNEY GENERAL
---
| | Dear Patriot,
I'm proud to announce [our campaign was the first to file for the Michigan Republican Party Endorsement Convention to serve as your next Attorney General](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=390ba2e2ff&e=4b10910eed). This milestone reflects our proactive leadership and strong statewide support.
Thank you for your support, which fueled our decisive victory in the [Attorney General straw poll at the MIGOP Leadership Conference on Mackinac Island ](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=2cdb1a6d4c&e=4b10910eed)and our [landslide win at the 9th Congressional District Town Hall Meeting](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=c9927d0d93&e=4b10910eed). Your efforts are unifying the party and driving a strong 2026 Republican slate.
[To turn Michigan red again, please consider contributing today before midnight](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=850a95ba64&e=4b10910eed) to ensure we maintain our momentum, protect our values, and deliver real results for Michiganders. 🇺🇸

Thank you for standing with Michigan! Kevin KijewskiCandidate for Michigan Attorney General

name: DNC Community Engagement
subject: Democrats Are Overperforming in Key Elections in Warning Sign for GOP
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f2589913a0&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
|
---
| |
**MEMORANDUM**
TO: Interested Parties
FROM: DNC Chair Ken Martin
DATE: Monday, October 20, 2025
RE: Democrats Are Overperforming in Key Elections in Warning Sign for GOP
* * *

Democrats enter the final sprint to critical elections in New Jersey, Virginia, Pennsylvania, and California in pole position. Elections across the country in 2025 paint one clear picture: Voters are rejecting Trump’s Republican Party, and Democrats are overperforming and winning across the map, in red, purple, and blue states.

The DNC is investing record amounts for an off-year cycle to take advantage of and build on this trend.

**Our Strategy is Working**

Throughout the year, the DNC has made historic financial investments or orchestrated organizing efforts in Virginia, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, California, Ohio, Missouri, Mississippi, New Hampshire, Wisconsin, Georgia, Maine, Iowa, Nebraska, Florida, Alabama, Texas and New York.

These efforts are leading to a surge in Democratic overperformance. From state legislative races in Iowa, Pennsylvania, and Georgia, to special Congressional elections like Rep.-Elect Grijalva’s resounding win in Arizona’s 7th Congressional District or John Ewing Jr.’s victory in the Omaha Mayoral race, **Democrats have won or overperformed the top of the 2024 ticket in 45 out of 46 (98%) key elections this year — by a whopping 15 points on average in special elections.** This exceeds our overperformance and win rate in 2017, ahead of the blue wave year in 2018 when Democrats retook the House of Representatives, by over ten points.

**By the numbers:**
* In 2025 so far, Democrats or Democratically-aligned candidates have won a total of 1,146 partisan seats and 459 non-partisan seats.
* Democrats have won 132 mayoral races (and comparable executive offices in cities and townships) across the country in 2025 alone.
* **Democrats have won nearly two-thirds of the congressional and state legislative special elections so far this year.**
* And Democrats have vastly overperformed the top of the 2024 ticket in special elections this year in areas where we didn’t win last cycle.

**Our Message is Breaking Through**

Democratic candidates up and down the ballot have effectively focused on affordability while painting their opponents as too extreme and too closely aligned with Donald Trump. When voters hear about Donald Trump and Republicans’ massive cuts to Medicaid to pay for permanent tax handouts to billionaires, Trump’s erratic trade policies that are skyrocketing costs and devastating small businesses and farm communities, and Republicans causing and then refusing to stop health care premiums from [doubling](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a05012388f&e=d6c5c7d7ec) next year for 22 million Americans, they put their trust in Democrats who are fighting to save health care and lower costs.

_**Below is a list of some of Democrats’ major wins and overperformances in 2025:**_

**Arizona**
* In Arizona’s 7th Congressional District special election, Democrat Adelita Grijalva resoundingly beat her Trump-backed opponent by a whopping 40 points, a double-digit overperformance to the top of the November ticket.

**Connecticut**
* In Connecticut’s House District 40 special election, Democrat Dan Gaiewski overperformed the top of the November ticket by 16 points.

**Delaware**
* In Delaware’s Senate District 1 special election, Democrat Dan Cruce overperformed the top of the November ticket by 10 points.

**Florida**
* In Florida’s 1st Congressional District, Democrat Gay Valimont overperformed by 23 points in a Trump +37 district, marking Democrats’ best performance in the district this century and flipping Pensacola for the first time in decades.
* In Florida’s 6th Congressional District, Democrat Josh Weil secured a massive 16-point overperformance in a Trump +30 district.
* In Florida’s Senate District 15 special election, Democrat LaVon Bracy Davis overperformed the top of the November ticket by 22 points.
* In Florida’s House District 40 special election, Democrat RaShon Young overperformed the top of the November ticket by 15 points.

**Georgia**
* In Georgia’s Senate District 21 special election, Democrat Debra Shigley secured a massive 11-point overperformance in a Trump +34 district after forcing Republicans to spend more than a million dollars defending this deep red seat.

**Iowa**
* In Iowa’s Senate District 35 special election, Democrat Mike Zimmer flipped a district Trump won by 21 points, overperforming the top of the November ticket by 25 points.
* In Iowa’s House District 100 special election, Democrat Nannette Griffin overperformed the top of the November ticket by 24 points.
* In Iowa’s Senate District 1 special election, Democrat Catelin Drey flipped a district by 10 points in a Trump +12 district, breaking Republicans’ supermajority in the state Senate.

**Maine**
* In Maine’s House District 24 special election, Democrat Sean Faircloth overperformed the top of the November ticket by 18 points.

**Minnesota**
* In Minnesota’s Senate District 60 special election, DFL candidate Doron Clark won the election by a margin of 91-9, overperforming the top of the November ticket by 14 points.
* In Minnesota’s House District 34B special election, DFL candidate Xp Lee beat Republican Ruth Bittner by over 20 points, filling the seat of former Minnesota House Speaker Melissa Hortman who was tragically killed in June.

**Nebraska**
* John Ewing Jr. clinched a victory in the Omaha Mayoral race, unseating the longest-serving Republican-aligned incumbent mayor in the country by an overwhelming majority.

**Pennsylvania**
* Dan Goughnour secured the Pennsylvania House majority for Democrats, winning in House District 35 by nearly 30 points, a 13-point overperformance.
* Democrat James Malone claimed an upset victory in an R+23 state Senate district in Lancaster County — a district that hasn’t had a Democrat representing it since 1979, and a Democratic president hadn’t won Lancaster County since Lyndon B. Johnson won it in 1964.

**Rhode Island**
* In Rhode Island’s 4th Senate District, Democrat Stefano Famiglietti won a landslide victory, winning over 80% of the vote — a 56-point overperformance.

**South Carolina**
* In South Carolina’s 50th House District, Democrat Keishan Scott cruised to victory, overperforming the top of the November ticket by 36 points and winning over 70% of the vote.

**Wisconsin:**
* Wisconsin Supreme Court candidate Susan Crawford beat Elon Musk-backed Brad Schimel by double digits in a bellwether race that showed Wisconsin voters squarely rejecting the influence of Elon Musk, Donald Trump, and billionaire special interests.

**Virginia**
* In Virginia’s 11th Congressional District special election, Democrat James Walkinshaw beat Republican Stewart Whitson by 50 points, overperforming the top of the November ticket by 16 points.

**What It Means: Democrats Are Strong, Republicans Are Weak**

Donald Trump and Republicans are weak, and it’s showing at the polls. Trump is hugely unpopular, and underwater on the economy, immigration, and trade — the same issues that he ran on in 2024. Republicans know they’re in trouble: that’s why they’re releasing faulty polls in contradiction with independent polling, lying about their opponents, and **not campaigning with Donald Trump.**

Democrats, on the other hand, are in a strong position. I’ve traveled to 33 states in my first eight months as Chair and have seen tremendous energy across the country. Generic balloting for the 2026 midterms consistently shows Democrats ahead of their Republican counterparts. And with exceptional candidates who are laser-focused on lowering costs, protecting health care, and fighting back against Trump’s attempts to cheat in the 2026 midterms, Democrats have a winning agenda, message, and strategy as we head toward November 4.
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | MEMORANDUM TO: Interested Parties FROM: DNC Chair Ken Martin DATE: Monday, October 20, 2025 RE: Democrats Are Overperforming in Key Elections in Warning Sign for GOP Democrats enter the final sprint to critical elections in New Jersey, Virginia, Pennsylvania, and California in pole position. Elections across the country in 2025 paint one clear picture: Voters are rejecting Trump’s Republican Party, and Democrats are overperforming and winning across the map, in red, purple, and blue states. The DNC is investing record amounts for an off-year cycle to take advantage of and build on this trend. Our Strategy is Working Throughout the year, the DNC has made historic financial investments or orchestrated organizing efforts in Virginia, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, California, Ohio, Missouri, Mississippi, New Hampshire, Wisconsin, Georgia, Maine, Iowa, Nebraska, Florida, Alabama, Texas and New York. These efforts are leading to a surge in Democratic overperformance. From state legislative races in Iowa, Pennsylvania, and Georgia, to special Congressional elections like Rep.-Elect Grijalva’s resounding win in Arizona’s 7th Congressional District or John Ewing Jr.’s victory in the Omaha Mayoral race, Democrats have won or overperformed the top of the 2024 ticket in 45 out of 46 (98%) key elections this year — by a whopping 15 points on average in special elections. This exceeds our overperformance and win rate in 2017, ahead of the blue wave year in 2018 when Democrats retook the House of Representatives, by over ten points. By the numbers: In 2025 so far, Democrats or Democratically-aligned candidates have won a total of 1,146 partisan seats and 459 non-partisan seats. Democrats have won 132 mayoral races (and comparable executive offices in cities and townships) across the country in 2025 alone. Democrats have won nearly two-thirds of the congressional and state legislative special elections so far this year. And Democrats have vastly overperformed the top of the 2024 ticket in special elections this year in areas where we didn’t win last cycle. Our Message is Breaking Through Democratic candidates up and down the ballot have effectively focused on affordability while painting their opponents as too extreme and too closely aligned with Donald Trump. When voters hear about Donald Trump and Republicans’ massive cuts to Medicaid to pay for permanent tax handouts to billionaires, Trump’s erratic trade policies that are skyrocketing costs and devastating small businesses and farm communities, and Republicans causing and then refusing to stop health care premiums from next year for 22 million Americans, they put their trust in Democrats who are fighting to save health care and lower costs. Below is a list of some of Democrats’ major wins and overperformances in 2025: Arizona In Arizona’s 7th Congressional District special election, Democrat Adelita Grijalva resoundingly beat her Trump-backed opponent by a whopping 40 points, a double-digit overperformance to the top of the November ticket. Connecticut In Connecticut’s House District 40 special election, Democrat Dan Gaiewski overperformed the top of the November ticket by 16 points. Delaware In Delaware’s Senate District 1 special election, Democrat Dan Cruce overperformed the top of the November ticket by 10 points. Florida In Florida’s 1st Congressional District, Democrat Gay Valimont overperformed by 23 points in a Trump +37 district, marking Democrats’ best performance in the district this century and flipping Pensacola for the first time in decades. In Florida’s 6th Congressional District, Democrat Josh Weil secured a massive 16-point overperformance in a Trump +30 district. In Florida’s Senate District 15 special election, Democrat LaVon Bracy Davis overperformed the top of the November ticket by 22 points. In Florida’s House District 40 special election, Democrat RaShon Young overperformed the top of the November ticket by 15 points. Georgia In Georgia’s Senate District 21 special election, Democrat Debra Shigley secured a massive 11-point overperformance in a Trump +34 district after forcing Republicans to spend more than a million dollars defending this deep red seat. Iowa In Iowa’s Senate District 35 special election, Democrat Mike Zimmer flipped a district Trump won by 21 points, overperforming the top of the November ticket by 25 points. In Iowa’s House District 100 special election, Democrat Nannette Griffin overperformed the top of the November ticket by 24 points. In Iowa’s Senate District 1 special election, Democrat Catelin Drey flipped a district by 10 points in a Trump +12 district, breaking Republicans’ supermajority in the state Senate. Maine In Maine’s House District 24 special election, Democrat Sean Faircloth overperformed the top of the November ticket by 18 points. Minnesota In Minnesota’s Senate District 60 special election, DFL candidate Doron Clark won the election by a margin of 91-9, overperforming the top of the November ticket by 14 points. In Minnesota’s House District 34B special election, DFL candidate Xp Lee beat Republican Ruth Bittner by over 20 points, filling the seat of former Minnesota House Speaker Melissa Hortman who was tragically killed in June. Nebraska John Ewing Jr. clinched a victory in the Omaha Mayoral race, unseating the longest-serving Republican-aligned incumbent mayor in the country by an overwhelming majority. Pennsylvania Dan Goughnour secured the Pennsylvania House majority for Democrats, winning in House District 35 by nearly 30 points, a 13-point overperformance. Democrat James Malone claimed an upset victory in an R+23 state Senate district in Lancaster County — a district that hasn’t had a Democrat representing it since 1979, and a Democratic president hadn’t won Lancaster County since Lyndon B. Johnson won it in 1964. Rhode Island In Rhode Island’s 4th Senate District, Democrat Stefano Famiglietti won a landslide victory, winning over 80% of the vote — a 56-point overperformance. South Carolina In South Carolina’s 50th House District, Democrat Keishan Scott cruised to victory, overperforming the top of the November ticket by 36 points and winning over 70% of the vote. Wisconsin: Wisconsin Supreme Court candidate Susan Crawford beat Elon Musk-backed Brad Schimel by double digits in a bellwether race that showed Wisconsin voters squarely rejecting the influence of Elon Musk, Donald Trump, and billionaire special interests. Virginia In Virginia’s 11th Congressional District special election, Democrat James Walkinshaw beat Republican Stewart Whitson by 50 points, overperforming the top of the November ticket by 16 points. What It Means: Democrats Are Strong, Republicans Are Weak Donald Trump and Republicans are weak, and it’s showing at the polls. Trump is hugely unpopular, and underwater on the economy, immigration, and trade — the same issues that he ran on in 2024. Republicans know they’re in trouble: that’s why they’re releasing faulty polls in contradiction with independent polling, lying about their opponents, and not campaigning with Donald Trump. Democrats, on the other hand, are in a strong position. I’ve traveled to 33 states in my first eight months as Chair and have seen tremendous energy across the country. Generic balloting for the 2026 midterms consistently shows Democrats ahead of their Republican counterparts. And with exceptional candidates who are laser-focused on lowering costs, protecting health care, and fighting back against Trump’s attempts to cheat in the 2026 midterms, Democrats have a winning agenda, message, and strategy as we head toward November 4. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | DNC Community Engagement 430 S Capitol Street, SE Washington, DC 20003 * USA or |

body:
Ignoring this race will initiate a terrifying chain reaction that MAGA plans to use as a launching pad for keeping Trump in power after 2028 when his term ends.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rZ5Ssjpgd4rM40tr26AWCcECmwO6HPnPClhkbDMnSOwaWuZJuVwbcEFtWDM_pW2bMArpZiXg0BWW32SfP8_hPJDLgnZVMAylKpHM8wXveJZzPyeRY8PGH8Xc9GtxmOSIwzptlgubVlQHawb3Z7jOrb8RGrC9QSF8NgvrxnjuZ0y3ZDgtbIOhx8hf0rSTEwnI860ZhsPVxPubW298tkyP6YJY40fHDu1XidGAQxLjcMw=&c=gRV8Qi97LZ1G2A-VxFLw0zCXrm8xVkrL4ShUz90_p-L0r6ivqF36kQ==&ch=jCMHCTbR7lHr2wTnNeIGz94iUo8uh9v_22IeICTQ32AT9LMfEGx96g==)

| Peter,
In just 15 days, MAGA will attempt to "knock off" three Democratic justices on the 5-2 Dem majority Supreme Court in a single election. Since turnout is expected to be low in an off-year election, every single vote matters.
We've seen what happens when Democrats take their eye off the ball and lose sight of the stakes in critical elections like this one. We can't afford to do that now - as Trump and MAGA constantly push democracy to the brink of collapse.
Polls show voters split evenly between Yes (retention) and No (the GOP's position) with a huge chunk of voters undecided or unaware of the stakes. We must fight to win undecided voters over right now.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rZ5Ssjpgd4rM40tr26AWCcECmwO6HPnPClhkbDMnSOwaWuZJuVwbcEFtWDM_pW2bMArpZiXg0BWW32SfP8_hPJDLgnZVMAylKpHM8wXveJZzPyeRY8PGH8Xc9GtxmOSIwzptlgubVlQHawb3Z7jOrb8RGrC9QSF8NgvrxnjuZ0y3ZDgtbIOhx8hf0rSTEwnI860ZhsPVxPubW298tkyP6Rkm9jiszMKjocRFihRaaY8=&c=gRV8Qi97LZ1G2A-VxFLw0zCXrm8xVkrL4ShUz90_p-L0r6ivqF36kQ==&ch=jCMHCTbR7lHr2wTnNeIGz94iUo8uh9v_22IeICTQ32AT9LMfEGx96g==)

| | | | The fallout of losing these three justices and therefore the court's liberal majority will not be contained to Pennsylvania. The path would be cleared for MAGA to control the fate of the nation's most critical swing state ahead of the 2026 Midterm and 2028 presidential elections.
We are pleading with every Democrat not to look away. Please do not for a minute think "I don't live in PA. I can't help." You are the only thing standing in the way of a Chernobyl-level political disaster in the very heart of democracy and freedom that will likely be impossible for Dems to ever contain.
If we ignore this race and let the chips fall where they may, it will initiate a terrifying chain reaction that MAGA plans to use as a launching pad for keeping Trump in power after 2028 when his term ends.
We have two weeks to save PA and prevent a catastrophic disaster that will spread to every state in the country. [The biggest way you can help right now is with a weekly donation, of whatever you can afford, set to end on Election Day so Defend Our Courts can chase down every last vote in these final 15 days?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rZ5Ssjpgd4rM40tr26AWCcECmwO6HPnPClhkbDMnSOwaWuZJuVwbcEFtWDM_pW2bzK6e9CnoJxu5Nca93NoR_FvgzLzmnE9a8QcLfAlKUlxlKdCWQ7NxfTckoKN-dpzaf50RRNmopFqS2A_W7d-0tL7XaIwQj2yRNDSpmv4QeASf4i-W7iD6keglNmf6Zh1AO7K0lhxjyDxUpyiWo9alhACPcTNY2wVLh4Y3k8wu_vl-Ly636e-4GTHs11OcjNm6&c=gRV8Qi97LZ1G2A-VxFLw0zCXrm8xVkrL4ShUz90_p-L0r6ivqF36kQ==&ch=jCMHCTbR7lHr2wTnNeIGz94iUo8uh9v_22IeICTQ32AT9LMfEGx96g==)

clean_body: Ignoring this race will initiate a terrifying chain reaction that MAGA plans to use as a launching pad for keeping Trump in power after 2028 when his term ends. | | | | | == | Peter, In just 15 days, MAGA will attempt to "knock off" three Democratic justices on the 5-2 Dem majority Supreme Court in a single election. Since turnout is expected to be low in an off-year election, every single vote matters. We've seen what happens when Democrats take their eye off the ball and lose sight of the stakes in critical elections like this one. We can't afford to do that now - as Trump and MAGA constantly push democracy to the brink of collapse. Polls show voters split evenly between Yes (retention) and No (the GOP's position) with a huge chunk of voters undecided or unaware of the stakes. We must fight to win undecided voters over right now. | == | | | | The fallout of losing these three justices and therefore the court's liberal majority will not be contained to Pennsylvania. The path would be cleared for MAGA to control the fate of the nation's most critical swing state ahead of the 2026 Midterm and 2028 presidential elections. We are pleading with every Democrat not to look away. Please do not for a minute think "I don't live in PA. I can't help." You are the only thing standing in the way of a Chernobyl-level political disaster in the very heart of democracy and freedom that will likely be impossible for Dems to ever contain. If we ignore this race and let the chips fall where they may, it will initiate a terrifying chain reaction that MAGA plans to use as a launching pad for keeping Trump in power after 2028 when his term ends. We have two weeks to save PA and prevent a catastrophic disaster that will spread to every state in the country. == | | | | Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue, all links should be recurring w/ a preset amount | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | Thank you for standing firm in these crucial final weeks. I am so grateful to you, and I hope I can continue to count on you in the coming days.

name: Amy McGrath
subject: Hey, it’s Amy and I have some news:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1073%2E49239%2E9aUPVM)
| | |
---
null,

We’re at an inflection point in our country’s history.
Throughout my career as a Marine, I took an oath to defend the Constitution. That’s still my North Star. And every day, we’re watching the very principles America was founded on – basic liberties, the rule of law – come under direct attack. Republicans in power are using their authority to further empower and enrich themselves and their friends.
And as a result, people across Kentucky – and across the nation – are suffering.
Well, I refuse to sit back and watch this happen. That oath I took is ringing in my ears.
**I’m announcing that I’m running for U.S. Senate.** We need leaders who won’t be bullied by an administration that destroys our institutions and betrays our country’s foundations. I served as a Marine for 20 years – these guys don’t scare me.
As you know, I’ve run for this seat once before. It was a tough election that didn’t go our way. But in my line of work, you don’t quit when you get knocked down. At a moment like this, each of us needs to do everything we can to get back up and fight for our country.
Just like you, I’m sick and tired of politicians who care only about themselves. And they’re throwing hard-working people under the bus – all across the country, and especially here in Kentucky. These people are selfish cowards who wouldn’t know a backbone if it hit them in the face.
That’s why I’m running. Because we deserve leaders who aren’t afraid to stand up for what they believe in, even when – especially when – times are tough. **That’s what this country is worth to me, and I know that like Haley Stevens, I’m not alone.**
Look, I know this race won’t be easy. But here’s the thing: Democrats can win – yes, even in red states – when we’re brave enough to stand up for what we believe in. This is an open Senate seat – something Kentucky hasn’t had in 15 years, thanks to Mitch McConnell.
And I intend to win it.

**But I can’t do it without a lot of help from people like you, so I need to ask directly.[Will you split a donation between me and Haley Stevens to kickstart this campaign and help us wage a real fight for the future of our democracy?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6897?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=1073%2E49239%2E9aUPVM)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Haley Stevens and Amy McGrath will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6732?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=1073%2E49239%2E9aUPVM)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6733?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=1073%2E49239%2E9aUPVM)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6734?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=1073%2E49239%2E9aUPVM)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6735?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1073%2E49239%2E9aUPVM)
---
For that and for everything to come in this campaign, thank you.

Amy
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6898?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=1073%2E49239%2E9aUPVM) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6736?t=8&akid=1073%2E49239%2E9aUPVM)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

| | [Brian Lenney](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)
---

* **To the staffer reading this right now:** Yes, you: the one with the cold coffee and the inbox showing 247 unread. I know you're deciding whether to forward this up the chain or archive it so you can finally eat lunch. I'm asking you to pass this along to Pete. This is from an actual state senator who actually wants an actual conversation about an actual problem in Idaho. Please don't let this die in your digital graveyard next to the guy demanding declassification of what the Illuminati is hiding in Antarctica and the lady who's convinced the Rothschilds are using satellite mind control to manipulate the stock market from their underground bunker beneath Denver International Airport.
* **To Pete, if this actually got to you:** What's happening in Idaho matters, and I genuinely want to understand just what we're doing here with this Qatari thing.

* * *
Dear Pete,
I'm writing to you not as a politician crafting another "strongly worded letter" that will never make it past your staff, destined to collect dust in some filing system while serving no purpose except letting the author feel like they did something.
We both know that game, right?
Some legislator fires off an indignant letter they know won't be read, then lets everyone know they DEMANDED answers from Washington. "I will NOT stand for this!" Right. You demanded nothing. You sent a PDF into the void and then posted it on social media for head pats.
So, the irony that I'm also writing this is not lost on me.
_But Pete, this is different._
I'm not writing as politician to politician. I'm writing as one Christian man to another. Brother to brother. Man to man. Because this deserves a real conversation, not performative outrage for the clicks.
We're bringing hundreds of military-aged men from a nation that practices Islamic Sharia law onto American soil. Pat Buchanan warned us about this exact moment. He wrote "The Death of the West" and predicted we'd commit cultural suicide by importing incompatible ideologies and calling it "progress." He said we'd celebrate our own demographic and cultural replacement while refusing to defend the civilization our fathers built. They destroyed him for telling the truth. And now here we are, importing Sharia law to Idaho and calling it a "strategic partnership."
I need you to understand what Sharia actually does to human beings and why it is fundamentally, completely, and eternally incompatible with everything the West stands for.
1. Sharia law orders the stoning of women accused of adultery
2. It mandates genital mutilation of young girls
3. It prescribes death for apostasy, for simply choosing to leave Islam
4. It treats women as property requiring male permission for basic life decisions
5. It executes homosexuals. It establishes religious law as superior to civil law, making equality under the law impossible by design

Pete, let me be brutally specific about where these men are coming from:
If you and I tried to live out our Christian faith in Qatar, we'd face up to seven years in prison for "offending" Islam or its rites. Seven years. For sharing the gospel with a Muslim, we'd get five years imprisonment for proselytizing. Even possessing a Bible study guide or Christian book that "promotes missionary activity" would get us two years in prison and a fine. During Ramadan, if we ate lunch in public during daylight hours, we'd face a fine of $800, three months in prison, or both. _For eating lunch._
Where these men come from, our children would be legally required to take Islamic instruction in school. You couldn't have a home Bible study. You couldn't meet in a house church. The government monitors and censors your emails, and your internet usage, your social media posts for "objectionable religious content" (Christians practice constant self-censorship out of fear).
This is the system these men live under every single day. This is what they enforce in their country. This is what they believe should govern human society.
_**This is the worldview they 're bringing to Mountain Home, Idaho.**_
And you're telling Idaho families this is fine?
There is no "moderate" Sharia. There is no "reformed" Sharia. There is no version of Sharia that recognizes the First Amendment, equal protection, due process, or basic human rights as we understand them. It rejects religious freedom. It rejects freedom of speech. It rejects the entire foundation of Western civilization.
Sharia is not compatible with the Constitution.
It's not compatible with individual liberty, women's rights, religious tolerance, and is fundamentally hostile to every principle our republic was built upon.
Look at every nation where Sharia is enforced. Women are subjugated. Religious minorities are persecuted. Dissenters are imprisoned or killed. Freedom dies wherever Sharia takes root because freedom cannot coexist with a system that demands total submission to religious law.
We've watched this happen across Europe with London neighborhoods operating under informal Sharia law. Paris suburbs turned into no-go zones. Swedish cities transformed by gang violence and Islamic radicalism. Buchanan warned us we'd see the same playbook in America. Islamist enclaves fusing with radical political movements. Nations requiring shared values, language, culture, and history to survive. When diversity becomes the highest value, the nation dissolves.
And we're importing this to Idaho?
We're looking to house men who live under this system, who enforce this system, who believe this system should govern all of human society? Men from a country where the royal family has taken religious oaths to the Muslim Brotherhood, an organization explicitly committed to destroying Western democracy?
This is civilizational suicide dressed up as partnership.
Qatar's poured over $100 billion into American universities, funding the very professors and programs that turned our campuses into anti-American cesspools. President Trump himself said in 2017 that Qatar _" has historically been a funder of terrorism at a very high level."_
Was he wrong then, or are we wrong now?
Pete, let me paint you a picture...
Imagine close to 200 military-aged men who believe in Sharia law walking around Mountain Home, Idaho. Shopping at the local grocery store. Eating at local restaurants. Living in the community. What happens when one (or more) goes AWOL? We've seen foreign military trainees disappear before. Got-aways who vanish into the American interior.
And what about Pensacola?
Remember Mohammed Saeed Alshamrani? A Saudi national we welcomed, trained, and hosted at Naval Air Station Pensacola who murdered three American service members on U.S. soil in December 2019.
_We imported him. We trained him. And he killed Americans._
So I'm asking you directly: would you feel comfortable living in this environment with your beautiful family? Would you want your wife and children in a community with nearly 200 men raised under a legal system that treats women as property?
_Most Americans would not._
Our faith calls us to wisdom, discernment, and protection of the flock. Proverbs warns us repeatedly about the company we keep, about making covenants with those who hate what we love.
As Christian men in positions of authority, we're accountable not just for what we do, but for what we allow. So I'm asking you, Pete, man to man, Christian to Christian: _what are we doing here?_
How do we justify importing a system that is diametrically opposed to Western civilization? How do we defend housing hundreds of men who were raised under a system that seeks to destroy everything we claim to defend?
_**How do we explain to our children that we saw the death of the West coming and did nothing to stop it?**_
If we can't say no to a country that practices Sharia law, that funds terrorism, that shelters Hamas, that has corrupted our universities with billions in influence money, then we've already surrendered.
**You 're seeking to import the very ideology our servicemembers have fought and died opposing because you've trapped yourself in a strategic dependency. **
Our governor was caught off guard by this.
Our entire congressional delegation was caught off guard.
It looks like the entire state legislature was caught off guard.
Nobody in Idaho asked for this. Nobody in Idaho state leadership approved this. And most of us don't want it. I'd welcome the opportunity to discuss this with you directly. This issue deserves honest conversation between men who take their faith seriously and understand the weight of the decisions we make.
I'm praying for you, for President Trump, and for wisdom in this matter.
In Christ,
**Brian Lenney**
Idaho State Senator, District 13
blforidaho@gmail.com
(208) 614-1289

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Lewiston, Maine
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We have a huge opportunity to act right now.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-maine-2025.RwNngZ&refcode=em251020-1-b&t=1&akid=10977%2E3935704%2EnOfkzx)
---
Hello, it's Gabby Giffords.
In just a few days, we are about to mark the two-year anniversary of the devastating shooting in Lewiston, Maine.
It should have been a fun night for families at the bowling alley and friends at a bar. Instead, this night of fun turned into a night of terror when a gunman went on a shooting spree at both a bowling alley and restaurant. He killed 18 people and wounded 13 others in a matter of minutes.
I wish I didn’t have to send this message to you, but we are all too familiar with these horrific scenes. We keep reading about how gun violence is the number one cause of death for America’s kids.
It does not have to be this way. _We_ can decide when we have seen enough. And luckily, we have a huge opportunity to make a difference right now.
This November, Maine voters will have the opportunity to vote on a measure to save lives and keep guns out of the hands of people who should not have them. **But with just a few weeks left, the gun lobby is spending big to stop this from passing.**
[**My friends at ‘Safe Schools, Safe Communities’ are working tirelessly to reach voters in this final stretch, but they need more grassroots support to stand up against the gun lobby’s spending. Will you pitch in any amount today to help them pass this ballot measure and protect our communities from gun violence?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-maine-2025.RwNngZ&refcode=em251020-1-b&t=2&akid=10977%2E3935704%2EnOfkzx)

name: Chernobyl in PA
subject: MAGA’s nuclear meltdown will be impossible to contain if we fail
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
Ignoring this race will initiate a terrifying chain reaction that MAGA plans to use as a launching pad for keeping Trump in power after 2028 when his term ends.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WUI6Or78oEBjdgl26d-YQcNNrM5xSdAm0TdcxzFxulMh95kz_gLUK99edy8C_XqQI9XLFH-ZM6jMIBPnA0l0oGzCB2EZVJfIN0_Z2GZ3cD9T8CrTkHhD3GCyfl53LPXPHudWthGSXmBNLveyufzlGz3CnMnWa-R74KZw4swElyP2X1w9S712zN3kLX-CsNrLVcwfFehbpXxgJVES9HxWQmZ88jeY1Abv_xOCWLejTDc=&c=STfJz1QfPXUSMuz1OZOkQc5pGOzaMVMTaVYy0HD-sAfuQLc0z8FjRg==&ch=cBeppHldK-A-CgjR9AicATSItdVR3syKzfWLSUfd6G2_MDMs6xPOEQ==)
---
| Peter,
In just 15 days, MAGA will attempt to "knock off" three Democratic justices on the 5-2 Dem majority Supreme Court in a single election. Since turnout is expected to be low in an off-year election, every single vote matters.
We've seen what happens when Democrats take their eye off the ball and lose sight of the stakes in critical elections like this one. We can't afford to do that now - as Trump and MAGA constantly push democracy to the brink of collapse.
Polls show voters split evenly between Yes (retention) and No (the GOP's position) with a huge chunk of voters undecided or unaware of the stakes. We must fight to win undecided voters over right now.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WUI6Or78oEBjdgl26d-YQcNNrM5xSdAm0TdcxzFxulMh95kz_gLUK99edy8C_XqQI9XLFH-ZM6jMIBPnA0l0oGzCB2EZVJfIN0_Z2GZ3cD9T8CrTkHhD3GCyfl53LPXPHudWthGSXmBNLveyufzlGz3CnMnWa-R74KZw4swElyP2X1w9S712zN3kLX-CsNrLVcwfFehbpXxgJVES9HxWQkbQdf8dapeNXT7gFAZ3_sc=&c=STfJz1QfPXUSMuz1OZOkQc5pGOzaMVMTaVYy0HD-sAfuQLc0z8FjRg==&ch=cBeppHldK-A-CgjR9AicATSItdVR3syKzfWLSUfd6G2_MDMs6xPOEQ==)
---
| | | | The fallout of losing these three justices and therefore the court's liberal majority will not be contained to Pennsylvania. The path would be cleared for MAGA to control the fate of the nation's most critical swing state ahead of the 2026 Midterm and 2028 presidential elections.
We are pleading with every Democrat not to look away. Please do not for a minute think "I don't live in PA. I can't help." You are the only thing standing in the way of a Chernobyl-level political disaster in the very heart of democracy and freedom that will likely be impossible for Dems to ever contain.
If we ignore this race and let the chips fall where they may, it will initiate a terrifying chain reaction that MAGA plans to use as a launching pad for keeping Trump in power after 2028 when his term ends.
We have two weeks to save PA and prevent a catastrophic disaster that will spread to every state in the country. [The biggest way you can help right now is with a weekly donation, of whatever you can afford, set to end on Election Day so Defend Our Courts can chase down every last vote in these final 15 days?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WUI6Or78oEBjdgl26d-YQcNNrM5xSdAm0TdcxzFxulMh95kz_gLUK99edy8C_XqQQZ_Rv-fqbCh_uUsr3WTRmSZSxkyloLLpppiRuY8J82EWwgIUncTO-Gt8cyZR3OSXKnpGnwkdt3bQXWG-CUMVR8TcU2rYsEFIwgMX3RyKAkBU4MF4TdUzJ1to7PeqE_LcNKYfThP1lR7bF7a8-Ui_aqyrxGF7PHS2tTsT37PbFdj94vsGbd2W34545j9R43oc&c=STfJz1QfPXUSMuz1OZOkQc5pGOzaMVMTaVYy0HD-sAfuQLc0z8FjRg==&ch=cBeppHldK-A-CgjR9AicATSItdVR3syKzfWLSUfd6G2_MDMs6xPOEQ==)

clean_body: Ignoring this race will initiate a terrifying chain reaction that MAGA plans to use as a launching pad for keeping Trump in power after 2028 when his term ends. | | | | | == | Peter, In just 15 days, MAGA will attempt to "knock off" three Democratic justices on the 5-2 Dem majority Supreme Court in a single election. Since turnout is expected to be low in an off-year election, every single vote matters. We've seen what happens when Democrats take their eye off the ball and lose sight of the stakes in critical elections like this one. We can't afford to do that now - as Trump and MAGA constantly push democracy to the brink of collapse. Polls show voters split evenly between Yes (retention) and No (the GOP's position) with a huge chunk of voters undecided or unaware of the stakes. We must fight to win undecided voters over right now. | == | | | | The fallout of losing these three justices and therefore the court's liberal majority will not be contained to Pennsylvania. The path would be cleared for MAGA to control the fate of the nation's most critical swing state ahead of the 2026 Midterm and 2028 presidential elections. We are pleading with every Democrat not to look away. Please do not for a minute think "I don't live in PA. I can't help." You are the only thing standing in the way of a Chernobyl-level political disaster in the very heart of democracy and freedom that will likely be impossible for Dems to ever contain. If we ignore this race and let the chips fall where they may, it will initiate a terrifying chain reaction that MAGA plans to use as a launching pad for keeping Trump in power after 2028 when his term ends. We have two weeks to save PA and prevent a catastrophic disaster that will spread to every state in the country. == | | | | Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue, all links should be recurring w/ a preset amount | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == Thank you for standing firm in these crucial final weeks. name: Ghazala Hashmi
subject: This is an urgent moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Hi, it’s Ghazala Hashmi, Democratic Nominee for Virginia Lieutenant Governor.
With just two weeks to go until Election Day, I have to level with you: Our campaign’s fundraising has slowed down...significantly.

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: 3 truths about Winsome Earle-Sears
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z971brq3fh5ent8gouf1g1vro8hssnri226ku6do_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cjie0ob4cdh2bs)[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvob3jjk0k2g0rksuef37bmp7pl2uih24nf1hujo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cjie0ob4cdh2bs)It's Elise Stefanik here!
This will only take 2 minutes of your time, so I'm desperately hoping you'll take the time to read every word of this update. I'd hate for you to miss it or be the last to know, Friend.
I want you to know the 3 TRUTHS about Winsome Earle-Sears's race for governor, and I want you to hear about the sticky situation from me directly...
#1 - Winsome was legally barred from raising a single dollar for two months this year, and during that time, her liberal opponent raised hundreds of thousands of dollars!
#2 - A George Soros-backed group gave Winsome's opponent $500K - yes, half a MILLION bucks - in one single check, and Winsome's been outraised ever since.
#3 - Poll after poll after poll shows Winsome's race is tied, but if she keeps falling short in the money race, we may never recover.
[What happens next is completely up to you, Friend. Winsome Earle-Sears's BIGGEST deadline yet is HERE, and she's $13,000 short of where she needs to land to hit her fundraising goal. ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd68m221i6vgef27sc1cg53fehtcjfs4q57cmle8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cjie0ob4cdh2bs)[<< DONATE TO WINSOME >>
](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg45jl7va66jdlab52ofmnkbqglamsvspo5q9978_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cjie0ob4cdh2bs)Winsome Earle-Sears is a Christian, Marine, immigrant, and mother. She's exactly the kind of conservative we need to get elected and represent our shared values. But if she continues to fall behind her well-funded opponent, we may never get her inspirational story out.
Winsome's dad immigrated here with $1.75 in his pocket and worked overtime to put food on the table. He showed Winsome that you can achieve anything in America if you set your mind to it. Then, she decided to give back to her country that had given her so much by enlisting in the Marines.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo6n784oqhg2v1ej38s2earbjt0p47m4c3hl157o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cjie0ob4cdh2bs)[Winsome embodies the American Dream, which is why I'm begging you to donate today and help her get her story (and the TRUTH) out there:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zueglrmn3ossjukk2bmb54dssrimfl4nrlpgop30_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cjie0ob4cdh2bs)[CLOSE THE FUNDRAISING GAP >>
](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbd2st6q37jq8428mtup44r45ngsmss9fiig3880_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cjie0ob4cdh2bs)Thank you for your time,Elise Stefanik
