Marine.
Mom.
Small Business Owner.
Lieutenant Governor.I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. _**[That 's why I'm reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvcg61veg9ni2ivh4342d5qg8raumopmgno52040_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cjie0ob4cdh2bs)**_ This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this.[LEND A HAND

| | This weekend, we welcomed nearly 100 new leaders from across New Jersey for our very first Next Generation Leaders Training — a program designed to empower a new generation of civic and political leaders to step up and serve their communities. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117636610/577152901/-1858292002?refcode=2025-10-20-nextgen&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=4d03349c-d0ad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDAzMzQ5Yy1kMGFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2nqxEm8q9l5swOK9TPEEq9bWlz5pfzYtorn5SxA414A=) Our participants learned directly from campaign experts and organizers through hands-on workshops in things like field organizing, political mapping and relationship building, digital media strategy, and more. clean_body: This weekend, we welcomed nearly 100 new leaders from across New Jersey for our very first Next Generation Leaders Training. | | | | This weekend, we welcomed nearly 100 new leaders from across New Jersey for our very first Next Generation Leaders Training — a program designed to empower a new generation of civic and political leaders to step up and serve their communities. = Our participants learned directly from campaign experts and organizers through hands-on workshops in things like field organizing, political mapping and relationship building, digital media strategy, and more. We wrapped up the training with a discussion where I got to hear directly from these inspiring future leaders about the challenges they see in their communities, and the ideas they're ready to fight for. This is how we build the future — by investing in people, skills, and service. But to keep growing this program and expand it statewide, we need your help. = = More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . Friend,
It’s Amanda Edwards, and I just cast my vote this morning in the first hours of Early Voting! Can I count on you to vote for me in this Special Election to serve as the next Congresswoman for the 18th Congressional District?
While my name is on the ballot, it is your future that is on this ballot, as well. When it comes to accessing healthcare and economic opportunity, we must elect the leaders who have the experience to deliver results.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_oct25?refcode=10%2F20_e [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_oct25?refcode=10%2F20_e]
Please make your plan to vote.
Here’s everything you need to know to make your plan to vote:
🗳 Early Voting: October 20 – October 31
🗳 Election Day: November 4
🕖 Voting Hours:
• Early Voting: 7 AM – 7 PM (Sundays: 12 PM – 7 PM)
• Election Day: 7 AM – 7 PM
✅ You can vote at any vote center during both Early Voting and on Election Day.
📍 Visit HarrisVotes.com to:
• View your sample ballot
• Find your nearest vote center
• Get all the voting info you need
🗓 Ballot by Mail Application Deadline: October 24
I’ve voted early and now I’m counting on you to make your voice heard. Together, we can deliver the leadership and results our community deserves.
Onwards,
Amanda K. Edwards

Folks, there’s one thing you should know about me: I don’t work for Trump, and I don’t work for Washington. I work for Virginians.
Jason Miyares can’t say the same. He’s got Trump’s personal endorsement and donations from MAGA billionaires are pouring into his campaign. Will you rush in $25 right now to help us defeat Jason Miyares and protect Virginians’ rights? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025?amount=25]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025?amount=25]
My roots run deep in Virginia. My grandfather grew up in Norfolk and became one of Virginia’s first Black civil rights lawyers. My father followed in his footsteps, joining the first wave of students to integrate Norfolk’s classrooms.
Now, I’m ready to continue their legacy of service and leadership by putting Virginians first, not Trump’s dangerous political agenda.
I’ve already worked in the legislature to raise the minimum wage, protect abortion access, and expand Medicaid for working families.
But our work is far from done. That’s why I’m running to be Virginia’s next Attorney General – to protect our rights and build the future Virginia families deserve.
But I can’t do this without your grassroots support. Will you chip in $25 today so I can win this race and keep Virginia moving forward? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025?amount=25]

Peter, If you’re anything like me, when fall arrives and the leaves begin to change, you’re immediately checking in on the DNR’s fall colors tracker. Being able to see the color of the leaves across the state is the perfect way to enjoy the beauty of Minnesota. This week, the DFL is launching our own fall colors tracker, and it’s marking the progress we make towards our $15,000 one week goal. According to our records, you’re eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR). That means you can give $75 (or $150 per couple) once per year and get every penny back from the state.

subject: 🚨BREAKING: Major Donors Pressure Ted Dabrowski to Fire Jeanne Ives
body:
view in browser (https://mailchi.mp/0a54df56cdf0/exclusive-donald-trump-jr-draws-large-crowds-receives-lifetime-membership-10355648?e=1cb5fdae9e) | update preferences (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=96acee76f8) | unsubscribe (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&t=b&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=96acee76f8)

This IR e-Blast Powered By:
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=96acee76f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823

Dear Peter,

We thought you may be interested to receive this breaking news alert.

Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump.
http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=96acee76f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=96acee76f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=96acee76f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=96acee76f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=96acee76f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 IllinoisReview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=96acee76f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
Major Donors Pressure Ted Dabrowski to Fire Jeanne Ives After Leak of Opponent’s Internal 2022 Campaign Document (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/10/major-donors-pressure-ted-dabrowski-to-fire-jeanne-ives-after-leak-of-opponents-internal-2022-campaign-document.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=96acee76f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/10/major-donors-pressure-ted-dabrowski-to-fire-jeanne-ives-after-leak-of-opponents-internal-2022-campaign-document.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=96acee76f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
GOP gubernatorial candidate Ted Dabrowski picks up endorsements from former state Rep. Jeanne Ives, former state Rep. Tom Morrison and former DuPage County Auditor Bob Grogan. (Photo credit Rachel Pierson)
By Illinois Review

Ted Dabrowski’s Illinois governor campaign is under mounting pressure as conservative donors begin to call for the removal of former State Representative Jeanne Ives from her role as advisor and campaign surrogate, following allegations that she leaked a sensitive internal document from Darren Bailey’s 2022 campaign – where she also served as an advisor.

The disclosure has sparked outrage within Republican circles. Just last month, Ives formally endorsed Dabrowski’s candidacy, describing him as the “better option” for Illinois Republicans.

The leaked file – an internal human resources document – concerned a personnel matter that was quietly resolved nearly three years ago. But insiders say the real controversy now centers on how Ives obtained the document and why she chose to weaponize and circulate confidential information from a campaign she once worked on, for political gain.

According to multiple sources, pressure on Dabrowski intensified over the weekend and into Monday morning as several financial backers urged the swift removal of Ives from the campaign. Conservative leaders warned of future lawsuits in response to the leak and its publication.

During Bailey’s 2022 campaign for governor, both Jeanne Ives and conservative media figure Brian Timpone served in advisory roles and had access to confidential campaign information. The two share close ties with Naples-based Chicago radio host Dan Proft, who ran the pro-Bailey political action committee People Who Play By The Rules PAC. The trio are long-time political allies and have collaborated on numerous operations over the years. Dabrowski is also a frequent guest on Proft’s Chicago radio show, which is broadcast from Naples, Florida.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/10/major-donors-pressure-ted-dabrowski-to-fire-jeanne-ives-after-leak-of-opponents-internal-2022-campaign-document.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=96acee76f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Republican Jeanne Ives endorsed Darren Bailey in his bid for Illinois governor during an announcement at the Palatine American Legion offices on Thursday, March 3, 2022. (POLITICO’s Shia Kapos)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/10/major-donors-pressure-ted-dabrowski-to-fire-jeanne-ives-after-leak-of-opponents-internal-2022-campaign-document.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=96acee76f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Ted Dabrowski appears on Dan Proft’s radio show to discuss his campaign for governor.
The leaked document surfaced in one of the news outlets operated by Timpone – and formerly owned by Proft – a network that has repeatedly drawn scrutiny. A link to the article, which included the leaked document, also appeared briefly on Wirepoints, the publication Dabrowski previously led as president before stepping down to launch his gubernatorial campaign.

Republican donors and grassroots activists alike have expressed frustration that Dabrowski’s campaign has failed to gain traction statewide and that internal controversies like this one are distracting from any coherent message.

Political observers note that Ives’ reputation has already suffered in recent years. Once celebrated as a conservative reformer, she has alienated allies through divisive tactics and questionable alliances.

For many within the party, this latest episode represents the final straw. The leak has prompted some Republicans to draw comparisons between the Dabrowski campaign’s tactics and those once associated with Barack Obama’s hard-edged rise to power.

In 2004, Obama’s U.S. Senate campaign was widely believed to be connected to the leaking of sealed court documents belonging to Democratic primary rival Blair Hull. The release of Hull’s divorce records destroyed his frontrunner status, clearing the path for Obama’s nomination.

Later that same year, sealed divorce records belonging to Republican U.S. Senate nominee Jack Ryan, where Proft served as a campaign advisor, were leaked to the press, forcing him to withdraw from the race – effectively clearing the path for Barack Obama’s easy general election victory. Just four years later, Obama would be elected the 44th President of the United States.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/10/major-donors-pressure-ted-dabrowski-to-fire-jeanne-ives-after-leak-of-opponents-internal-2022-campaign-document.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=96acee76f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Barack Obama addresses the DNC in 2024. (YouTube/The Obama Foundation)
Within conservative circles, the leak involving Ives is being described as a serious breach of ethics – one that could expose her to potential legal action. The use of a confidential personnel document from another campaign for political advantage is widely seen as both unethical and desperate, serving as fresh evidence, critics say, of a campaign struggling to remain relevant.

For Dabrowski, the fallout could be severe. With major donors demanding accountability and grassroots conservatives questioning his leadership, his next move may define his campaign.

Whether he stands by Ives or cuts ties will determine not only his viability as a candidate but also his credibility as a conservative reformer.

As one GOP leader put it, Ted Dabrowski faces a choice: run an honest campaign or keep Jeanne Ives. He can’t do both.

clean_body: view in browser () | update preferences () | unsubscribe () This IR e-Blast Powered By: Dear Peter, We thought you may be interested to receive this breaking news alert. Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump. Twitter () Facebook () IllinoisReview.com () Major Donors Pressure Ted Dabrowski to Fire Jeanne Ives After Leak of Opponent’s Internal 2022 Campaign Document () GOP gubernatorial candidate Ted Dabrowski picks up endorsements from former state Rep. Jeanne Ives, former state Rep. Tom Morrison and former DuPage County Auditor Bob Grogan. (Photo credit Rachel Pierson) By Illinois Review Ted Dabrowski’s Illinois governor campaign is under mounting pressure as conservative donors begin to call for the removal of former State Representative Jeanne Ives from her role as advisor and campaign surrogate, following allegations that she leaked a sensitive internal document from Darren Bailey’s 2022 campaign – where she also served as an advisor. The disclosure has sparked outrage within Republican circles. Just last month, Ives formally endorsed Dabrowski’s candidacy, describing him as the “better option” for Illinois Republicans. The leaked file – an internal human resources document – concerned a personnel matter that was quietly resolved nearly three years ago. But insiders say the real controversy now centers on how Ives obtained the document and why she chose to weaponize and circulate confidential information from a campaign she once worked on, for political gain. According to multiple sources, pressure on Dabrowski intensified over the weekend and into Monday morning as several financial backers urged the swift removal of Ives from the campaign. Conservative leaders warned of future lawsuits in response to the leak and its publication. During Bailey’s 2022 campaign for governor, both Jeanne Ives and conservative media figure Brian Timpone served in advisory roles and had access to confidential campaign information. The two share close ties with Naples-based Chicago radio host Dan Proft, who ran the pro-Bailey political action committee People Who Play By The Rules PAC. The trio are long-time political allies and have collaborated on numerous operations over the years. Dabrowski is also a frequent guest on Proft’s Chicago radio show, which is broadcast from Naples, Florida. Republican Jeanne Ives endorsed Darren Bailey in his bid for Illinois governor during an announcement at the Palatine American Legion offices on Thursday, March 3, 2022. (POLITICO’s Shia Kapos) Ted Dabrowski appears on Dan Proft’s radio show to discuss his campaign for governor. The leaked document surfaced in one of the news outlets operated by Timpone – and formerly owned by Proft – a network that has repeatedly drawn scrutiny. A link to the article, which included the leaked document, also appeared briefly on Wirepoints, the publication Dabrowski previously led as president before stepping down to launch his gubernatorial campaign. Republican donors and grassroots activists alike have expressed frustration that Dabrowski’s campaign has failed to gain traction statewide and that internal controversies like this one are distracting from any coherent message. Political observers note that Ives’ reputation has already suffered in recent years. Once celebrated as a conservative reformer, she has alienated allies through divisive tactics and questionable alliances. For many within the party, this latest episode represents the final straw. The leak has prompted some Republicans to draw comparisons between the Dabrowski campaign’s tactics and those once associated with Barack Obama’s hard-edged rise to power. In 2004, Obama’s U.S. Senate campaign was widely believed to be connected to the leaking of sealed court documents belonging to Democratic primary rival Blair Hull. The release of Hull’s divorce records destroyed his frontrunner status, clearing the path for Obama’s nomination. Later that same year, sealed divorce records belonging to Republican U.S. Senate nominee Jack Ryan, where Proft served as a campaign advisor, were leaked to the press, forcing him to withdraw from the race – effectively clearing the path for Barack Obama’s easy general election victory. Just four years later, Obama would be elected the 44th President of the United States. Barack Obama addresses the DNC in 2024. (YouTube/The Obama Foundation) Within conservative circles, the leak involving Ives is being described as a serious breach of ethics – one that could expose her to potential legal action. The use of a confidential personnel document from another campaign for political advantage is widely seen as both unethical and desperate, serving as fresh evidence, critics say, of a campaign struggling to remain relevant. For Dabrowski, the fallout could be severe. With major donors demanding accountability and grassroots conservatives questioning his leadership, his next move may define his campaign. Whether he stands by Ives or cuts ties will determine not only his viability as a candidate but also his credibility as a conservative reformer. As one GOP leader put it, Ted Dabrowski faces a choice: run an honest campaign or keep Jeanne Ives. He can’t do both. body:

House Republicans shut down the government weeks ago because they'd rather cut your health care to support what their billionaire backers want than fight for the American people to get a fair shake. They're refusing to work with Democrats to strike a fair deal because they're in the pockets of corporate special interests.

Meanwhile, Trump and White House Office of Management and Budget Director Russ Vought are using this shutdown to backdoor in the firings of thousands of federal workers — it's just plain wrong. As a result, federal workers are missing paychecks (and some are losing their jobs!), key programs are stalled, and families are feeling the squeeze.

Here's the thing, Peter: thousands of Virginians are federal workers, and that work is a massive part of the state's economy. **When Washington shuts down, it's often Virginia's jobs, small businesses, and local communities that take the hit.**

This is exactly why we need a leader like **Abigail Spanberger** as governor.

Abigail has spent her career serving with integrity, pragmatism, and purpose. Her leadership is grounded in service and a deep understanding of how federal decisions ripple through our communities.

**Abigail is the kind of leader who cuts through the noise. She listens, she acts, and she gets results.** That's what she's done in Congress, and that's the kind of leadership she'll bring to Richmond.

****[**Democratic pro-choice women have always been the first line of defense, but they need our support now more than ever. clean_body: We are just two weeks out from Election Day. | = Hey Peter, I wanted to take a minute to talk about what's happening with the government shutdown — and what it means for Virginia's gubernatorial race now that we're just two weeks out from Election Day. = | = House Republicans shut down the government weeks ago because they'd rather cut your health care to support what their billionaire backers want than fight for the American people to get a fair shake. They're refusing to work with Democrats to strike a fair deal because they're in the pockets of corporate special interests. Meanwhile, Trump and White House Office of Management and Budget Director Russ Vought are using this shutdown to backdoor in the firings of thousands of federal workers — it's just plain wrong. As a result, federal workers are missing paychecks (and some are losing their jobs!), key programs are stalled, and families are feeling the squeeze. Here's the thing, Peter: thousands of Virginians are federal workers, and that work is a massive part of the state's economy. When Washington shuts down, it's often Virginia's jobs, small businesses, and local communities that take the hit. This is exactly why we need a leader like Abigail Spanberger as governor. Abigail has spent her career serving with integrity, pragmatism, and purpose. Her leadership is grounded in service and a deep understanding of how federal decisions ripple through our communities. Abigail is the kind of leader who cuts through the noise. She listens, she acts, and she gets results. That's what she's done in Congress, and that's the kind of leadership she'll bring to Richmond. **=** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Tiernan Donohue (she/her/hers) Chief Campaigns Officer, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Brett Lindstrom
subject: My week on the campaign trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brett Lindstrom for Congress
body:
Thank you for standing with us
| | | | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
---
| | Peter, It’s been another meaningful week on the campaign trail, filled with community, service, and great conversations about the future of Nebraska. From connecting with local leaders early in the week to spending time with veterans and celebrating Nebraska tradition, I’m grateful for every opportunity to listen, serve, and represent our shared values.

---
|
---
**Ride to Washington** We are now 242 miles into the 1,155-mile journey to Washington, D.C. Every mile is a testament to grit, health, and the Nebraska spirit of never quitting. Thank you to everyone who’s been sending in your own miles, we’re in this together.
|
---
**Last Week Recap** **Pachyderm Lunch**
Brett kicked off the week speaking at the Greater Omaha Pachyderm Lunch. He had a great time connecting with community members, answering thoughtful questions, and talking about the work ahead to bring strong Nebraska leadership to Washington.
[](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
**Tom Briese Endorses Brett**
Nebraska State Treasurer Tom Briese officially endorsed Brett for Congress, highlighting his record of fiscal responsibility, lowering taxes, and strengthening Nebraska’s economy. We’re honored to have his support and partnership in this campaign for common-sense leadership.

[](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
**VA Hospital Stand Down**
On Friday, Brett volunteered at the VA Hospital Stand Down to support homeless and at-risk veterans. He was grateful for the chance to listen to their stories, offer a hand, and thank them for their service to our country.
[](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
**Aksarben Ball**
The week wrapped up at the Aksarben Ball, celebrating one of Nebraska’s most cherished traditions. Brett was proud to join leaders, families, and community members who are committed to lifting up our state and investing in its future.
[](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
|
---
| | As we continue this journey across Nebraska and toward Washington—both on the trail and one mile at a time—I remain grateful for your support, prayers, and encouragement. This campaign isn’t about one person. It’s about all of us coming together to defend our values, strengthen our communities, and build a better future for our kids and grandkids.
This campaign is powered by people like you. If you haven’t already, I’d love for you to join Team Lindstrom as a volunteer, whether it’s walking in a parade, making calls, or helping spread the word in your community.

---
[VOLUNTEER](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
And if you’re able, please consider making a contribution to help us keep up the momentum. Every dollar goes directly toward reaching voters and ensuring our message is heard loud and clear.
[DONATE TODAY](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
Thank you for continued support,
[](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
Brett Lindstrom Republican Candidate for Congress
|
---
**Stay Connected with Team Lindstrom**
| | | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.) | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.) | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
---|---|---
|
---

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: It’s been 27 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
27 days, Peter. **That’s how long it’s been since the people of Arizona’s 7th District elected Adelita Grijalva to represent them in the House, and Speaker Mike Johnson still hasn’t sworn her in.** He’s offered every excuse in the world, but we know the _true_ reason is to delay the discharge petition that would force a vote on the Epstein files. Rep.-elect Grijalva would be the last needed signature on the petition, and Speaker Johnson knows that if Republicans are forced to go on the record on this issue, they’re going to implode. That’s why Speaker Johnson told House Republicans to stay on vacation, for the third week in a row, instead of coming back to Washington to help Democrats find a solution to get the government back open. _**This is literally insane. It’s not normal. And it’s a complete abdication of responsibility.**_ While American people suffer, House Republicans are standing directly in the way of getting our government back open and back to work for the people — prioritizing doing Donald Trump's bidding over their constituents. We have to fight for accountability and vote them out. name: Spanberger HQ Alert
subject: Breaking news: Donald Trump just endorsed Winsome Earle-Sears
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor

Fellow Conservative,

It’s been a very long time since Republicans won a full six-year Senate term in Minnesota.

The year was 2002, and **the first season of American Idol had just premiered; Kelly Clarkson wasn’t yet a household name in the United States.**

**CSI was the top show on network TV,** dethroning ER from its long-held spot atop the charts, and Everybody Loves Raymond was still airing weekly.

_**DVDs were just beginning to overtake VHS systems in our homes, and Netflix was still in its infancy as a DVD-by-mail rental service. It would be another four years, 2007, before Netflix launched its streaming service.**_

**23 YEARS IS LONG ENOUGH. BUT DEMOCRATS THINK MINNESOTA IS THEIR TERRITORY, NEVER TO BE CEDED TO A REPUBLICAN - EVER.**

**It’s time to send them a message: Time’s up.**

_[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=93d179114d784614a83179886b66a28f&_e=EYLSy5yUlZt42lTV6PnJIQ-qslJ1-Gjn2vutxWlbMbaukJpPR0PoSjSzAo-alKWrLL0tsMCbqGaBcNIb7moIR6PJkt2kZep6ENzMi37dxN4yLXyHRWjolpWcJy3mR-bI1ZPhYxA6O9Y2mZr5iFMnqRirJ8k61JwvLwGP0mnlGaNU6wOzPu3cpzlNBEhVQkPl5MoreaEQ3JANG8Z2PQo5149jlamztXLmH0TSSd8RSAt9BLxq6SjXQYvffZSYHNv7-_yNF_j0IQDvcTkIXXkJcUTW8bLzjD0HDprh9_1U1LsRh1hFKcWQbJCEeSYln40EuNN4u4wy8BrQLxLgrFCBERUwxLhLAakUSv1--CXqex5QC1lAYe3XFh6NAPTS7Ksyx2ReDIGkxzZ4Apb5mtkYxIWHZkMLcJTVhI9_Igp7443Bd4U968eobKV2Tmz94V-AYOUJZj20FDuI7MccObTuXUaK19xBPGk66ihTa2Ou-Q9QQS_dAt-Zuc05xuUPrRcn2frJqdY4xE_Ma9b0SvPFHi0ILOnnKU94ReGcIeXRpGmsmJpOzoJCWLoB3Z3FKt5PvxOeyDvkzvL3BpkEFf4wpO8svHE4oZ3N1yJGgCBC8YcIhReh6oouKIAIXdLNbuL5N6Wc-4DC3z88Kd32FTbvNs6RvKbxxGYqQLq1mRnTuOqP5mIBq3rWtoubNtZWqfgUj7twvjqYLhkKfAALvyQvRI04P4n3Y0XKb3fQOt1zy5oFRmhoiStVpTlwSPrbFN065tVgqGNTomghM0BCmSY7dYPsLhToV6CXWRtkEzFEppQ%3D)_
A poll released recently by one of my opponent’s campaigns has breathed new life into this race - according to their pollster, **a generic Republican candidate only trails the Democrats by TWO POINTS.**

Over the last several months, I’ve been making a concerted effort to introduce myself to you via email and text messages.

_**Have you received and read them?**_

If not, let me quickly reintroduce myself to you today.

I’m Adam Schwarze, a _**former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran.**_ I grew up on Minnesota’s hockey rinks, enlisted after 9/11, and served in over 70 countries, leading high-stakes missions with discipline and resolve. Service is my calling — to my country, my family, and now to you. **I’m running for U.S. Senate** to fight for the America we love, the one you’ve worked hard to build for your children and grandchildren.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=93d179114d784614a83179886b66a28f&_e=EYLSy5yUlZt42lTV6PnJIQ-qslJ1-Gjn2vutxWlbMbaukJpPR0PoSjSzAo-alKWrKPFY0zPyGPdPDSLgQSppwICOw_2uxS9NBMyTJCOsV-KQjm1T2aFb57CybqDuz2pfYPaR1OU3S7_sQ-4q3XpTemOkrPf2mtF4EKWXgVxUgWYLnG35Eb69kyqkOCdhoMOiTiAvgtuuy7hfvdgfF9R-rOk-Wpb3cmwTCwD7KxfbIRnDK_-3_k6B6y6XlMFMfkR2JfaO0u-dfPfoyqMYX5vHlLvKVLgfjUaUd1j1EEGlMzHr_c-mApUxUHXb31pQytMMs6kDJ1p2EUObsbekQwTgZpb4yzySO0rkiCKJAm6NITSHKh1-94Td1P1twYqQWIuYFPX69lGx7tjtFzbFNX3Np3_S_EBv8ypEweQ0WjNMt4KyojHO0L12aEAYnZn9kdfUIdHhnZbEN_PJuw88hsuC99dACzeNoTeFRA4tZSeOKjiYbx8fLMfVfVHDBogsvz8yY-ZWkNPM8qxJ7AcazDjLflaactKQZXpKjGR3v84255gbUpmfjkXpjsQyhpnJML3uVkthgiw2Yuv-HbPHoARpOEyZt_BZTyL2dPNsEZ-sA25N6-KzYWjvEatbUd3rQqzlIjoHBt6L01vE1Guhx3EX7krXQXZf71SsVczq8iRGvEcuJLQzDO6fR1n-wZ18F3bxsK4yzhiMsV-_ItffoBjjvjJAaPbbOhXyqZJCB6qlFi8%3D)

I need help raising $100,000 by the end of this month, and so far, we’re halfway there. The founding fathers didn’t intend for this to be a one-party democracy. There hasn’t been much competition in Minnesota politics lately. I think there is no better person to take on the Democratic establishment than a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran.

Peter,
Massachusetts voters are working to bring Election Day Voter Registration to the ballot, and we’re helping lead the charge.
This proposed law would let eligible individuals register or update their voter information right at the polls on Election Day–so no one loses their voice because of a missed deadline.
Can you make a donation today to power this work?
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mdpfederal-yes-on-election-day-voter-registration?refcode=102025email]
We’re helping with signature outreach to get this on the 2026 ballot, but we can’t do it without you. Every dollar helps us reach more voters, gather more signatures, and move one step closer to expanding access to the ballot box.
You can also visit their website to learn more and support this effort directly: Petition Y Ballot Question Website. [https://electiondayvoterregistration.com/]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mdpfederal-yes-on-election-day-voter-registration?refcode=102025email]

name: Karen Hamilton
subject: VIRGINIA STANDS WITH OUR HEROES!
body:
Hamilton for Delegate!
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in browser](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/c0PdtPO0V/c?w=ZJgMxFwjmC0ZHRRwE3ZT9AnwbIg0sVt98mAcLjcx79Q.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYW1pbHRvbmZvcnZpcmdpbmlhLmNvbS9zby9jMFBkdFBPMFY_bGFuZ3VhZ2VUYWc9ZW4iLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0NDI4ODkzMy1lNGNjLTRmMTItOGYzZS02ZjQ1ZjM3NjIxZjQifQ)_**
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | VIRGINIA IS FOR PATRIOTS!
---
| | | |
---
| | VIRGINIA STANDS WITH OUR HEROES!
---
| | | |
---
| | Virginia has always stood tall as a home of patriots. From the battlefields of history to the frontlines of today, our Commonwealth has produced generations of men and women who put service above themselves. They carried the weight of freedom on their shoulders, and when they returned home, they deserve not just our unending gratitude, but our action.
---
| |
---
| | Taking care of our veterans is personal to me. My husband served as a Navy SEAL for 10 years and many of our dear friends are still serving in uniform today. So when every single Democrat voted YES to passing a 2024 budget that stripped promised benefits away from our veteran and Gold Star families--I was appalled.
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | My husband, Cameron Hamilton, with our son.
---
| | Fortunately, Governor Youngkin took swift action to repeal the changes to the Virginia Military Survivors and Dependents Education Program (VMSDEP) and fully fund the program. But voters should remember that when Democrats were looking for places to cut the budget, our veterans were the ones who got shortchanged. We must never allow that to happen again. Promises made to veterans should neverbe contingent on politics. Our service members and families have upheld their end of the deal, and we have a moral obligation to fulfill ours.
---
| |
---
| | SEALs conduct a fast-rope insertion demonstration from an MH-60S Sea Hawk helicopter onto a beach overlooking the Chesapeake Bay during a capabilities exercise at Naval Amphibious Base, Little Creek, Virginia. (DVIDS)
---
| | Virginia is home to more than 700,00 veterans, one of the highest concentrations in the country. When you include their spouses and dependents, that number easily doubles. Every corner of our Commonwealth, from Hampton Roads to the Shenandoah Valley, benefits from their leadership, work ethic, and commitment to community. Yet, despite that, too many are forced to travel very long distances for treatment or struggle to find providers who understand military-related trauma. We owe them better than that. Today, many veterans still struggle to get the care they deserve. Too many are waiting months for care. Too many families are navigating endless paperwork just to access the benefits their loved ones have earned from so much untold sacrifice. And too many of our heroes, especially those struggling with invisible wounds, are still falling through the cracks. We can and must do better.
---
| |
---
| | Across Virginia, veterans are telling us the same story: They want a healthcare system they can depend on when they need it most. They want mental health care that is timely, easily accessible and respectful of their service. And they want assurance that benefits they were guaranteed will be there, not matter who is in charge.
---
| |
---
| | Virginia has always prided itself on being "veteran-friendly". Those words are not just a catchy slogan thrown around during campaign season- it's a matter of principle that requires thoughtful action. That means strengthening partnerships between state agencies, the Department of Veterans Affairs, and local hospitals so veterans can get care where they live rather than traveling hours away. It means expanding mental health services, increasing funding for veteran counselors, and addressing the crisis of veteran suicide with real urgency and compassion. Many service members carry wounds we never see, and marriages and families struggle to overcome the difficulties associated with those mental and emotional scars of war that forever mark our brave veterans.
---
| | | |
---
| |
---
| | We also must remember our strong military families. When a service member deploys,their family serves too. Military families undergo significant trials topreserve our freedom... Transient life with moves every few years,long periods of separation,milestones missed,birthdays celebrated over video calls,holidays spent with an empty seat at the table,the constant fear of not knowing if their loved one will return the same, or at all. Virginia must continue investing in programs that support military spouses with job placement, childcare, and educational opportunities. Programs like the Virginia Military Survivors and Dependents Education Program (VMSDEP) play a vital role in honoring that sacrifice and ensuring their children have a path forward. These are not political issues—they are promises. Promises we made to the people who risked everything for this country. Promises that should never depend on which way the political winds blow. To solidify Virginia's standing as the national leader in veterans’ care, every policy decision, budget debate, and legislative session on this issue should begin with one simple question: Does this action adequately honor and uphold our commitment to Virginia's military families? Our incredible veterans have made sacrifice after sacrifice to preserve our freedom. They've done their part--it's time for us to do ours.
---
| |
---
| | "THE FUTURE BELONGS TO THOSE WHO REFUSE TO REMAIN SILENT." -CHARLIE KIRK
---
| | | |
---
| | It's time for the silent majority to AWAKEN! Let's shock the nation and return Virginia back to her liberty-loving roots! Cast your early vote and togetherwe can SAVE VIRGINIA! Please STAND with me! Consider chipping in $10, $20, or even $50 if you’re able to support my efforts. With your generosity, we can get our message out far and wide!
---

Transient life with moves every few years,long periods of separation,milestones missed,birthdays celebrated over video calls,holidays spent with an empty seat at the table,the constant fear of not knowing if their loved one will return the same, or at all. Virginia must continue investing in programs that support military spouses with job placement, childcare, and educational opportunities. Programs like the Virginia Military Survivors and Dependents Education Program (VMSDEP) play a vital role in honoring that sacrifice and ensuring their children have a path forward. These are not political issues—they are promises. Promises we made to the people who risked everything for this country. Promises that should never depend on which way the political winds blow. To solidify Virginia's standing as the national leader in veterans’ care, every policy decision, budget debate, and legislative session on this issue should begin with one simple question: Does this action adequately honor and uphold our commitment to Virginia's military families? Our incredible veterans have made sacrifice after sacrifice to preserve our freedom. They've done their part--it's time for us to do ours. | | | | "THE FUTURE BELONGS TO THOSE WHO REFUSE TO REMAIN SILENT." -CHARLIE KIRK | | | | | | It's time for the silent majority to AWAKEN! Let's shock the nation and return Virginia back to her liberty-loving roots! Cast your early vote and togetherwe can SAVE VIRGINIA! Please STAND with me! Consider chipping in $10, $20, or even $50 if you’re able to support my efforts. With your generosity, we can get our message out far and wide! | | | | | | | | | | | | | You can find out more about me at: General Jason Miyares Member Joe Short, Town of Culpeper for AmericaPolice Benevolent AssociationNRAVirginia Society for Human Life | | | | Find me on social media | | | This email was sent from .

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: This is how we win.
body:
---
Hi Derek, Did you know we’ve now held town halls in red districts in all 50 states? And we’re not stopping there. We’re continuing to listen to voters everywhere — especially those whose representatives refuse to listen to the people who elected them. **Derek, this is how we win:** Making sure that every American knows that elected Democrats are doing everything they can to stand up for the interests of people like you. Town halls like these are critical to our strategy for electing more Democrats in 2025, 2026, and beyond — but these events take time, energy, and money to plan and hold, especially at the scale we need to make sure we are hearing from _everyone._ [**So, Derek, if it’s important to you that everyone in this country has the opportunity to speak directly with their elected officials, we’re asking you to chip in $7, or whatever makes sense for you, to help fund town halls in red districts and efforts elect Democrats up and down the ballot.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251020_4929_fr&refcode2=4967_22930333_UOqPsR&akid=4967%2E22930333%2EUOqPsR) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251020_4929_fr&refcode2=4967_22930333_UOqPsR&akid=4967%2E22930333%2EUOqPsR)**

name: Sen. Jeff Bridges
subject: Endorsed by 90% of Colorado — Perlmutter, Markey, Salazar
body:
By land area! When you add up the land represented by former Members of Congress Perlmutter, Markey, and Salazar it's over 90% of Colorado.

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/955374fc4689/get-more-smarter-on-colorados-budget-10369446?e=b48bb2b4f4)
---
[|
---](https://bridgesforcolorado.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba078768558df9fe7d8559d49&id=f8c7c04d3f&e=b48bb2b4f4)
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Hi there,
When you add up the land area represented by former Members of Congress Ed Perlmutter, Betsy Markey, and John Salazar it’s over 90% of Colorado. While they represented vastly different communities, **I’m excited to share that I’ve received their endorsement for State Treasurer.** They all agree that investing Colorado dollars here at home is the best way to create opportunity across our state.
**Together, these endorsements mean we have support from** _**every**_**current or former federal or statewide elected official who has endorsed in the race for Treasurer.** In addition to Perlmutter, Markey, and Salazar, that includes Congressmen Joe Neguse and Jason Crow, former State Treasurer Cary Kennedy, former Secretary of State Bernie Buescher, and former U.S. Interior Secretary Ken Salazar.
---
[|
---](https://bridgesforcolorado.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba078768558df9fe7d8559d49&id=a16968d474&e=b48bb2b4f4)
| |

“Jeff will make a great Colorado Treasurer. He’s smart, he’s tough, and he knows how to bring people together to get things done for Colorado families.”—Ed Perlmutter, Former U.S. Representative for Colorado’s 7th District
"I know what it means to fight for rural Colorado, for our farmers, ranchers, and working families. Jeff Bridges understands that our economy is only as strong as the communities that keep it running — from the San Luis Valley to the Western Slope to the Eastern Plains. I trust him to be a Treasurer who invests in every corner of Colorado.”—John Salazar, Former U.S. Representative for Colorado’s 3th District
“As a business owner and as a former candidate for Treasurer, I know how important it is to have someone who not only understands the numbers but can also turn them into opportunities for small businesses and families. Jeff Bridges has the experience and vision to make Colorado’s dollars work harder for all of us.”—Betsy Markey, Former U.S. Representative for Colorado’s 4th District
At the end of the day, I couldn’t be more proud of these endorsements. They show that leaders from every part of Colorado believe in this campaign and our vision for investing Colorado dollars right here at home.
**But winning statewide takes more than good ideas—it takes the resources to reach voters in every corner of our state. I’d deeply appreciate any donation you can make to help us do that.**
---
| [CLICK TO DONATE](https://bridgesforcolorado.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba078768558df9fe7d8559d49&id=92f1044863&e=b48bb2b4f4)
---
| | Talk soon,
P.S. I met with folks down in Alamosa on Saturday and it reminded me of the night I spent on El Rancho Salazar sleeping under the stars—and the mosquitoes!
---
|
---
| | | | | [](https://bridgesforcolorado.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba078768558df9fe7d8559d49&id=e1f52212eb&e=b48bb2b4f4)
---
[](https://bridgesforcolorado.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba078768558df9fe7d8559d49&id=cfb66e51ab&e=b48bb2b4f4)
---
[](https://bridgesforcolorado.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba078768558df9fe7d8559d49&id=dd58195c10&e=b48bb2b4f4)
---

| | | [|

You are receiving this email because you opted in to updates from Colorado State Senator Jeff Bridges.

Our mailing address is:
Bridges for Colorado Treasurer 9424 E Orchard Dr Greenwood Village, CO 80111 USA

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://bridgesforcolorado.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=ba078768558df9fe7d8559d49&id=a3f2cadfed&e=b48bb2b4f4&c=e4be529628) or [unsubscribe](https://bridgesforcolorado.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ba078768558df9fe7d8559d49&id=a3f2cadfed&t=b&e=b48bb2b4f4&c=e4be529628)

name: Chip Roy
subject: My decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR CHIP ROY
body:
Watch this special announcement | Fellow American - I am leaving Washington.

I am not running for reelection.

I could serve the 21st Congressional District of Texas forever and be fulfilled professionally. **But representatives should not be permanent.**

It's time for a change.

I am ready to come home to Texas. I want to take my experience in Congress as a federal prosecutor and First Assistant Attorney General to fight for Texas.

**[Let me tell you personally what it means to serve, what it means to be a Texan, and what you can expect from me as Texas's next Attorney General.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b3668c6878554a50b9bf0969f6647073&_e=LtZDqOMPZUQLJAs6-EC0h1pnMsIoMOkMqxWeAL5po57CT4d14vrGWPw-t4LFc7Qqwe7Y5pfQoV_10D8vahlRzTxZNIe6WaE6wBPCb7X2Xb1arHOmBd1TMB17uZw3sIVI3BXJaO-j-CtAeRhir6NwFBzaPgH7fe9vyPZIaRzUm3ASFmx47r3Lt4SLwuXFwEXDy_TvXjVLm7jyugI74GqocbGzBZU8Ef2fFZYY7cAVCosLDYHjmHpo6nXZHdQTTBGkyXIKH-XK6uVa_-GomIRvhF5sqJsFtWW3dAuahppY3lQJ8apKfhEXEc03ZGPwpoYgGWrzhljibavZbMxxjP8QFLqV6d3-AFkZTs4eRLXdcFLy36UXg89MDs3PkEjebCNSxPCctXg6XAhNd4IGRw1-ZFA4meMF-TpxmGva7d9inehq-AMw50SdaSyazYeHA_pMghKvTDiqZksbfDE68Z6E4i3o67m9Euud-ST9opuD0plKJida0I3emFV7P0fMwOHaBxMNActTObb2PAfLPt_IYCOME1nhutHPAB2iQAvm0WIY_iKZWLcaSMZjXNiVoBfx2up0UCm8EbHQ9rn_F5MynWkRGBPNl-YI3NmiG_olg0CSi58UaTEYHk7v-Y4eYJV7aB0zSwJdR2nlJ7aoN2JqEXWjciieoCnJ5QTSjbZeAeU%3D)**

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b3668c6878554a50b9bf0969f6647073&_e=LtZDqOMPZUQLJAs6-EC0h1pnMsIoMOkMqxWeAL5po57CT4d14vrGWPw-t4LFc7Qqwe7Y5pfQoV_10D8vahlRzTxZNIe6WaE6wBPCb7X2Xb1arHOmBd1TMB17uZw3sIVI3BXJaO-j-CtAeRhir6NwFBzaPgH7fe9vyPZIaRzUm3ASFmx47r3Lt4SLwuXFwEXDy_TvXjVLm7jyugI74GqocbGzBZU8Ef2fFZYY7cAVCouNidltXiyr-y3y45Y5mIQqj0DFE5CJo_xeCrGGClVq-RWEj20FpKyS-nJI3IugHVB94MOsBGSCBmw0mQ-T2ejfTOH1_nzmZzs-k1xGEsgGI3f9etPgKFH-3DESEHMBbaOr8x6hv6TnUF3m1sTm2gWKPTOMgPlAaCirNm86tGrC8SJDaUNtVBqMMmJYKxaC2vBKgEXbRS155BMd9Rd6d1nz64SHabJ2TdT0_SZJZeAULPanPsKNNE9WzL4Bk_qAy8hMERM6eT0DP1Iw4CDgtBUC-VhyrlCSJQTG_srOtYZBt-aUEU9Hftm7__ju_GY41Q7UKrroK5EsHGQRbarw3VgIYydGG31VyBdrWYtrmau6vE4KjXsn8fGCeWICfvrFaBIStKmI_L5qOfk0V6gJIEl-vyldDbtk68KJZmAle2BcNT4nHH8K-39JQvs2_wV4w0I%3D)

clean_body: Watch this special announcement | Fellow American - I am leaving Washington. I am not running for reelection. I could serve the 21st Congressional District of Texas forever and be fulfilled professionally. But representatives should not be permanent. It's time for a change. I am ready to come home to Texas. name: Forward Party
subject: The government shutdown isn’t leadership. It's systemic failure on full display.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
While politicians bicker, families miss paychecks, businesses lose contracts, and essential services stall.

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=late_october_low_dollar_appeal&n=1)
---
| Peter, While politicians bicker, families miss paychecks, businesses lose contracts, and essential services stall. It’s proof that the two-party system can’t even meet its most basic obligation of keeping the government running. Forward is building something better: **a movement of leaders who solve problems, serve the people, and do their jobs.** We are recruiting a group of independent, forward-aligned lawmakers strong enough to force cooperation instead of chaos. **But we can't do it without you. Consider donating $25, $50 or $100 today.** Just the cost of a burger and fries (I know, right?) can help us elect the next generation of leaders who, like you, are tired of the same old same old. | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=late_october_low_dollar_appeal&n=2 "Chip in now to power independent leaders") [Chip in now to power independent leaders](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=late_october_low_dollar_appeal&n=2)
---
Imagine if just a dozen principled leaders refused to play shutdown politics and instead demanded compromise and accountability. That’s the future we’re building toward: **a government that governs, a democracy that delivers, and a political culture that rewards problem-solving over partisanship.** The shutdown is proof of what’s broken. Forward is the proof that it doesn’t have to stay that way.
**In 2026, our movement will reach a critical inflection point.** Forward is transforming momentum into real political power by recruiting a new generation of independent leaders ready to win and deliver results for the American people.
**The time to act is now**. Every contribution helps us recruit, train, and support candidates who can restore balance and accountability to our democracy.
Your support today will power this movement and help us build a government that actually works for everyone.

elect Forward leaders!") [Donate today!](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=late_october_low_dollar_appeal&n=4)
---
**Not Left. Not Right. Forward.**

name: Wesley Bell
subject: Why won't Speaker Johnson release the Epstein files?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
It sure looks like someone — or many someones — don't want the American people to see what’s in those files. Peter,

It's been more than three weeks since Rep.-elect Adelita Grijalva won her congressional race in Arizona, but House Speaker Mike Johnson is refusing to swear her in.

And I want to know: _What's the holdup?_

I think we all can take a guess...Adelita would be the 218th vote to sign the petition to release the Epstein files and publicize the truth that powerful people, including the current president, have been trying to bury.

Unlike Donald Trump and his cabinet, I'm no conspiracy theorist; I deal in facts. But it sure looks like someone — _or many someones_ — don't want the American people to see what’s in those files.

Peter, this isn't about Democrats or Republicans. It's about basic accountability, transparency, and justice.

The people elected Adelita to serve, and she deserves to be sworn in immediately. It's time for the House to get back to work, and for the American people to know the truth. [**If you agree, add your name next to mine to demand Speaker Johnson stop stalling. name: =?UTF-8?B?QnJ5Y2UgUmVldmVz?=
subject: He's GOT TO GO!
body:
I need your help to get rid of Sen. Mark Warner
| | |
---
| | [](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Fstop-the-headlines%3Famount=100%26utm_id=campeng%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=flodesk/1/0100019a02b9fd73-4596dc15-811c-4505-9f3c-7fe6aa4ae529-000000/log56vqWJxLfLmHQZ_XkO0O7qH4=448)
---
| |
---
| Peter, I've made it my mission to get rid of __far-left radicals__ in __our Government__. It's been my job since I was first elected to serve the Commonwealth of Virginia over a decade ago. _Now I have my eyes set on one of the biggest_ _**Deep-State liberals**_ _in D.C._ **Mark Warner.** He's been misrepresenting our state for **YEARS** , and now he's playing a key role in keeping our Government shut. Now, thousands of people he represents are out of a job, and he thinks it's funny. _**I won 't stand for it.**_ That's why I'm running to flip this seat red and send Senator Warner packing. I've served our country as a U.S. Army Ranger, and I've served the great Commonwealth of Virginia as a State Senator. Now I'm ready to serve our country again in the U.S. Senate and get rid of **RADICAL LIBERAL MARK WARNER!**
---
| | [FIRE MARK WARNER](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2F20251017_reeves_fire-mark%3Futm_campaign=20251017_Reeves_Fire-Mark%26utm_medium=Txt%26utm_source=AC/1/0100019a02b9fd73-4596dc15-811c-4505-9f3c-7fe6aa4ae529-000000/vbN60xwenD_ZDEvcfR_wVYWrhy4=448)
---
| Unlike Warner, I know what it's like to miss paychecks while serving my country. And to me, it's **NO LAUGHING MATTER!** The men and women who are protecting our country deserve _**MUCH BETTER**_**.** It's time to send Mark home. I'm messaging you because I need your help to do it Peter. Mark might have all the Deep State backing from Richmond to D.C., but I have the American people behind me. subject: don’t miss it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Hi Peter,

Today is the deadline. If you’re not registered, need to update your address or name, or still plan to vote by mail, **this is the moment to act**.

Elections in Pennsylvania are often decided by a handful of votes. Yours needs to be one of them.

Here’s what to do right now, it takes just a few minutes: **_[Check your voter registration status here!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117647115/577170640/88266837?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20251020_EN_VRDeadline_0_1MO_PaDems_NA_NA_Today&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTZiMmQxYS1kZGFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HoMk1eoB7osDs56pJfCsbuEnVO4U4GZbPkfRnkO0TqE=&emci=0a6b2d1a-ddad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=116b2d1a-ddad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=25616296)_**

**_[Fill out the online voter registration form](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117647117/577170642/747805259?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20251020_EN_VRDeadline_0_1MO_PaDems_NA_NA_Today&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTZiMmQxYS1kZGFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HoMk1eoB7osDs56pJfCsbuEnVO4U4GZbPkfRnkO0TqE=&emci=0a6b2d1a-ddad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=116b2d1a-ddad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=25616296)_** (it just takes 10 minutes)

Or, download the paper application and **_[register in person at your county elections office](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117647120/577170643/-799781144?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20251020_EN_VRDeadline_0_1MO_PaDems_NA_NA_Today&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTZiMmQxYS1kZGFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HoMk1eoB7osDs56pJfCsbuEnVO4U4GZbPkfRnkO0TqE=&emci=0a6b2d1a-ddad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=116b2d1a-ddad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=25616296#accordion-cdc8c772ae-item-4445679a1c)_**!

Will this November be your first time voting, or do you need a refresher on how to vote?
**_[Find out what you need on Election Day!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117647123/577170647/1766602680?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20251020_EN_VRDeadline_0_1MO_PaDems_NA_NA_Today&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTZiMmQxYS1kZGFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HoMk1eoB7osDs56pJfCsbuEnVO4U4GZbPkfRnkO0TqE=&emci=0a6b2d1a-ddad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=116b2d1a-ddad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=25616296)_**

Want to vote by mail-in or absentee ballot? **_[Make sure you’re on the list!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117647124/577170651/1431353034?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20251020_EN_VRDeadline_0_1MO_PaDems_NA_NA_Today&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTZiMmQxYS1kZGFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HoMk1eoB7osDs56pJfCsbuEnVO4U4GZbPkfRnkO0TqE=&emci=0a6b2d1a-ddad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=116b2d1a-ddad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=25616296)_**
Don’t forget, the deadline for mail-in ballots is October 28th! If you are already registered, **_check in on your family members, friends, and neighbors and make sure they are registered to vote too!_**

Together, we can break a voter turnout record in PA this November!

Thank you,

Peter, have you seen what Republicans are doing to stop Congresswoman-elect Adelita Grijalva from taking office? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117647282/577170752/-1181368094?refcode=AU_KMC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251020_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OThlMzU1Ni1kZGFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NsGb8IJVnbj8ghc2kPf3k-zWcKwIQLUZr3ZqHD78aWg=) **FIRST:** Voters overwhelmingly elected Democrat Adelita Grijalva in a special election to Congress in Southern Arizona. **THEN:** When Adelita went to Washington to be sworn in, Speaker Mike Johnson refused — breaking the precedent he set himself when two Republicans were sworn in less than 24 hours after their elections — and leaving her community without a voice in Congress. **27 days later, he’s still refusing to seat her.** **NOW:** We’re fighting back to make Republicans pay for their obstruction by raising $10,000 every day they continue to delay swearing Adelita in — to beat them at the ballot box and flip the House next year. **Peter,**** this moment is too important to ignore. Speaker Johnson’s delay isn’t just partisan — it’s shameful, and leaves the people of Arizona’s 7th District without any representation. # Trump delivers a stark rare earth warning to China ahead of trade talks
President Donald Trump **[reminded China of his threat 100% tariffs](https://substack.com/redirect/57951460-064c-48f6-b920-e14c0b5573a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Chinese goods set to start on November 1st, 2025, as retaliation for Beijing's rare earth export controls, while also listing curbs on fentanyl curbs and soybean purchases as top demands ahead of resumed U.S.-China trade talks later this week.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/81565e3a-179e-4e85-9017-423beb6f0ef0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Rare Earths Controls Sparked** : China's new export restrictions on critical rare earth minerals prompted Trump's aggressive tariff response, aiming to prevent Beijing from using them as leverage in ongoing trade disputes warning "I don't want them to play the rare earth game with us."
* **Fentanyl Flows Fuel Demands** : Trump also accused China of failing to stem fentanyl exports tied to America's opioid epidemic, stating that China needs "to stop with the fentanyl" making it a non-negotiable priority in negotiations to protect U.S. public health.
* **Soybean Halt Hits Farmers** : Beijing's sudden pause on purchasing U.S. soybean imports has escalated agricultural tensions, with Trump vowing further curtailments unless resolved before the fragile trade truce expires.
* **Xi Meeting Looms Large** : A high-stakes Trump-Xi Jinping summit planned for late October could reshape global supply chains.

# **US mining stocks surge as China tries to tighten its grip on Rare Earth metals**
Shares of **[U.S. rare earth companies surged](https://substack.com/redirect/afdc05aa-5019-40fc-bf4b-834b167c0b07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in Monday premarket trading, fueled by Beijing's fresh export curbs requiring approval for foreign shipments, as Washington ramps up subsidies for US miners to shatter China's 70% stranglehold on vital minerals powering EVs and semiconductors.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/afdc05aa-5019-40fc-bf4b-834b167c0b07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **China 's Export Controls Tighten**: New Beijing rules demand foreign firms secure approval and detail end-uses for rare earth shipments, escalating trade frictions and spotlighting vulnerabilities in global tech supply chains.
* **U.S. Mine Development Prioritized** : American Elements CEO Michael Silver urges treating domestic rare earth mining as a national security imperative, predicting swift government subsidies to operationalize untapped reserves.
* **Stock Surge Highlights Momentum** : MP Materials climbed 1.8%, USA Rare Earth leaped 2.9%, and Perpetua Resources rose 3.4% premarket, mirroring gains in Canadian peers amid investor bets on diversified production.
* **Military Readiness, Civilian Risks** : While U.S. holds ample heavy rare earths for defense needs, commercial sectors like electric vehicles and lasers face squeezes, hastening pushes for independent global sourcing.

* * *
* * *
# Amazon's Cloud crash causes chaos across the web
Early Monday morning, Amazon Web Services **[suffered a major outage](https://substack.com/redirect/f71096eb-c29f-4ff4-98d7-0a73f89676c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in its US-EAST-1 region, sparking connectivity chaos for millions as popular sites and Apps like Snapchat and Fortnite went dark, with recovery efforts underway amid widespread user frustration.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a04e2c41-9e7e-4b00-81c3-9dc0ac2aa613?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Affected Services Identified** : Snapchat and Fortnite faced severe disruptions, while AI firm Perplexity, crypto platform Coinbase, and trading app Robinhood directly blamed AWS for their downtime.
* **Regional Scope Pinpointed** : Issues struck the US-EAST-1 region, triggering elevated error rates and latencies across multiple AWS services, confirmed via the company's status page.
* **Timeline Established Early** : Outage hit just before dawn ET, with AWS alerting at 3:51 a.m. and immediately launching fixes to restore normal operations.
* **Business Ripples Emerge** : Connectivity woes rippled through gaming, social media, finance, and crypto sectors, highlighting AWS's critical role in powering global digital infrastructure.
* **Airline Chaos:** The outage also **[crippled airline websites nationwide](https://substack.com/redirect/6c5e3eb4-f372-4331-950e-31a8a4244322?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , stranding passengers unable to check in or access reservations via apps.
* **Delta, United Hit Hard** : Major carriers like Delta Air Lines and United Airlines saw full website failures, blocking online bookings and app-based bag drops amid peak travel demands.
* **Echoes of Past Disruptions** : The outage was reminiscent of July 2024's CrowdStrike meltdown, and the incident again exposes vulnerabilities in cloud reliance, potentially costing airlines millions in lost revenue and refunds.

* * *
* * *
# Ripple's $1Billion dollar merger to create the largest public XRP treasury
In a bold play to dominate digital assets, Ripple-backed Evernorth announced plans Tuesday to **[raise over $1 billion through a Nasdaq merger](https://substack.com/redirect/c7e47ab4-bb83-46b8-b5e8-4380490678c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , aiming to amass the largest public treasury of XRP tokens amid a surging crypto market under the Trump administration.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c7e47ab4-bb83-46b8-b5e8-4380490678c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Merger Targets Nasdaq Debut** : Evernorth will go public via an SPAC merger with Armada Acquisition Corp II, closing in Q1 2026 to unlock institutional XRP strategies.
* **SBI Injects Major Capital** : Japanese investor SBI has committed $200 million for an equity stake, joining Ripple co-founder Chris Larsen, Pantera Capital, and crypto exchange Kraken in fueling the XRP-focused venture.
* **Birla Leads Treasury Push** : Ripple exec Asheesh Birla will step down from Ripple's board to helm the Evernorth venture, building an investment team for XRP acquisitions and holdings.
* **Boosts XRP Market Presence** : The deal positions Evernorth as top public XRP holder, capitalizing on the post-lawsuit regulatory thaw despite equity-crypto volatility risks.

* * *
* * *
# Cracks start to appear in China's great economic wall
China's economy braked sharply in the third quarter, with GDP growth expected to **[slide to 4.8% year-on-year from 5.2%](https://substack.com/redirect/c1632a6d-d998-41d1-b399-db8e146108da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in Q2, analysts forecast ahead of Monday's official release, as U.S. trade tensions and deflationary pressures hobble exports and demand.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c1632a6d-d998-41d1-b399-db8e146108da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Fixed Assets Stagnate** : Fixed-asset investment, including real estate, is projected to inch up just 0.1% in the first nine months, signaling deep stagnation in Chinese infrastructure and property sectors amid broader economic headwinds.
* **Retail Sales Falter** : September retail sales are anticipated to decelerate to 3% year-on-year growth, underscoring weakening consumer spending and subdued domestic demand despite the Chinese government's stimulus efforts.
* **Industrial Output Eases** : Factory production expected to moderate to 5% annual growth in September, reflecting manufacturing slowdowns tied to global trade uncertainties and softening export pipelines.
* **Inflation Dips Deeper** : Headline inflation tumbled 0.3% in September--below forecasts highlighting persistent deflation risks that could stifle investment and recovery momentum.

name: Alaskans for Nick Begich
subject: I’m running for re-election—watch the video and join me
body:
2026 will decide the House majority. Alaska’s seat could be the difference. | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Hello Friend,

We have accomplished much in this first term in the House, but there is more work to be done. To continue delivering for Alaska, I’m officially running for re-election!

Why I’m running again is simple: Alaska needs a fighter who delivers. We proved that results, not rhetoric, move our state forward. But 2026 will decide whether we keep Speaker Johnson and an America First agenda or hand the gavel to Hakeem Jeffries and more failed socialist policies. This one seat can determine the majority.

🎥 **Watch my announcement video:[Video Here](https://alaskansfornickbegich.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8aeb8c45837a089b0eee9add8&id=a198f1a201&e=6679001ba0)**

**Winning early matters.**

Building the ground game, communicating our successes, and stopping the national Democrat money machine starts with you. If we invest early, Democrats won’t be able to reverse our Alaska wins.
Can I count on you today?
* Give **$25** » [Chip in $25](https://alaskansfornickbegich.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8aeb8c45837a089b0eee9add8&id=ee4140346e&e=6679001ba0)
* Give **$50** » [Chip in $50](https://alaskansfornickbegich.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8aeb8c45837a089b0eee9add8&id=2ae418360a&e=6679001ba0)
* Give **$100** » [Chip in $100](https://alaskansfornickbegich.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8aeb8c45837a089b0eee9add8&id=33aa382df0&e=6679001ba0)
* Or **any amount** » [Give another amount](https://alaskansfornickbegich.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8aeb8c45837a089b0eee9add8&id=2d93991197&e=6679001ba0)

Every early dollar fuels voter contact in communities from Ketchikan to Point Hope, protects our successes, and safeguards Alaska’s future.

Grateful to have you on the team,
.
Congressman Nick Begich

P.S. Alaska’s seat could decide the Speaker. clean_body: 2026 will decide the House majority. Alaska’s seat could be the difference. | | | | | | | | Hello Friend, We have accomplished much in this first term in the House, but there is more work to be done. To continue delivering for Alaska, I’m officially running for re-election! Why I’m running again is simple: Alaska needs a fighter who delivers. We proved that results, not rhetoric, move our state forward. But 2026 will decide whether we keep Speaker Johnson and an America First agenda or hand the gavel to Hakeem Jeffries and more failed socialist policies. This one seat can determine the majority. 🎥 Watch my announcement video: Winning early matters. Building the ground game, communicating our successes, and stopping the national Democrat money machine starts with you. If we invest early, Democrats won’t be able to reverse our Alaska wins. Can I count on you today? Give $25 » Give $50 » Give $100 » Or any amount » Every early dollar fuels voter contact in communities from Ketchikan to Point Hope, protects our successes, and safeguards Alaska’s future. Grateful to have you on the team, . Congressman Nick Begich P.S. Alaska’s seat could decide the Speaker. Let’s lock this down early: , , or more today keeps Alaska red and America on the right track. » | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2025 Alaskans for Nick Begich, All rights reserved.

name: Chris Pappas
subject: Just $5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=2948%2E582294%2EA9VlWJ)
Hi,
I wouldn’t be in this race without people like you.
And today I’m asking for your help again — _**just $5.**_
Here’s why that matters:
This campaign isn’t funded by right-wing interests or GOP megadonors. It’s powered by Granite Staters — teachers, nurses, small business owners, retirees — who chip in what they can because they believe in what we’re building together.
**We’ve got a big end-of-month fundraising deadline coming up at the end of October.** If everyone reading this email gave just $5, _we’d hit our goal with plenty of time to spare_ — and that momentum would carry us into the next phase of this race stronger than ever.
It’s not about the size of the donation. It’s about the strength of this grassroots team.
So I’m asking:
[**Will you chip in $5 today and help fuel this people-powered campaign?**](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251020_1_five.0m0egv&refcode=em20251020-1&amount=5&t=2&akid=2948%2E582294%2EA9VlWJ)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251020_1_five.0m0egv&refcode=em20251020-1&amount=5&t=3&akid=2948%2E582294%2EA9VlWJ)**
Thank you for believing in me — and in what we can accomplish together.
– Chris
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251020-1&t=4&refcode2=2948_582294_A9VlWJ&akid=2948%2E582294%2EA9VlWJ)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=5&akid=2948%2E582294%2EA9VlWJ)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=2948%2E582294%2EA9VlWJ)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)

body:
Meet Jeff Yass, worth $67 billion. He’s the Temu Elon Musk — a knockoff version who’s savvy enough to keep his name out of the headlines.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xR0E4DZaoVa-bTdwvuXkTwmrU8uwqqZPlty9KMYP8h_Zj-dxdDox_gYdICu0IONIwIlMhfJ6uDKfvVT58L-NQaJ4HW_ySsPhwJoVJbUDal6Pj1oXxs9M3durpJ7uKp90HaH9M0KwGVUQdCCaOYGQYFBEOdCpnJdyIHtu9rZ25G4CxEVkkRWDMYZi89pzopV1CPtSMD0t3o7pGXfBv2SD20xi71pGTyR1h4GHlFhQgCI=&c=28MZQM5BawFHgX1dbuH66A5HjorztTsFFfULQk9wyfswyAKDuBhYrg==&ch=ViiWHKH5LpMYj-fqGhSWtAgmSdc71malpuF59GilB9jiLRzqBNuPow==)

| Peter,
Earlier this year in Wisconsin, Elon Musk dumped millions into a state Supreme Court race -- and Democrats crushed him.
Musk couldn't resist bragging, tweeting, and turning the spotlight on himself. The louder he got, the more fired up Democrats became. His arrogance helped us win.
Now, MAGA thinks they've found a smarter play. They've swapped out Musk for a quieter billionaire who they think can help them steal the Pennsylvania Supreme Court: Meet Jeff Yass, worth $67 billion. He's the Temu Elon Musk -- a knockoff version who's savvy enough to keep his name out of the headlines, but who's still trying to buy a state Supreme Court for his buddy Donald Trump.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xR0E4DZaoVa-bTdwvuXkTwmrU8uwqqZPlty9KMYP8h_Zj-dxdDox_gYdICu0IONIwIlMhfJ6uDKfvVT58L-NQaJ4HW_ySsPhwJoVJbUDal6Pj1oXxs9M3durpJ7uKp90HaH9M0KwGVUQdCCaOYGQYFBEOdCpnJdyIHtu9rZ25G4CxEVkkRWDMYZi89pzopV1CPtSMD0t3o7pGXfBv2SD2z2sEp74C3aNUwFjYz5Jw70=&c=28MZQM5BawFHgX1dbuH66A5HjorztTsFFfULQk9wyfswyAKDuBhYrg==&ch=ViiWHKH5LpMYj-fqGhSWtAgmSdc71malpuF59GilB9jiLRzqBNuPow==)
---
| | | | Yass may be trying to stay in the shadows, but we know exactly what he's up to. And we're one of the leading organizations exposing him and fighting back in Pennsylvania.
But here's the problem: we don't have $67 billion. We don't have an army of dark money PACs. What we do have is you -- and thousands of grassroots Democrats who can rise up and stop this "Temu Elon Musk" before he gets away with stealing the critical PA Supreme Court. [Will you chip in $50, $25, or whatever you can afford right now to help us shine a light on Jeff Yass and stop him from buying Pennsylvania's courts for Trump?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xR0E4DZaoVa-bTdwvuXkTwmrU8uwqqZPlty9KMYP8h_Zj-dxdDox_gYdICu0IONIwIlMhfJ6uDKfvVT58L-NQaJ4HW_ySsPhwJoVJbUDal6Pj1oXxs9M3durpJ7uKp90HaH9M0KwGVUQdCCaOYGQYFBEOdCpnJdyIHtu9rZ25G4CxEVkkRWDMYZi89pzopV1CPtSMD0t3o7pGXfBv2SD2-X0rZok1_9sAlGSEM0lP18=&c=28MZQM5BawFHgX1dbuH66A5HjorztTsFFfULQk9wyfswyAKDuBhYrg==&ch=ViiWHKH5LpMYj-fqGhSWtAgmSdc71malpuF59GilB9jiLRzqBNuPow==)

What we do have is you -- and thousands of grassroots Democrats who can rise up and stop this "Temu Elon Musk" before he gets away with stealing the critical PA Supreme Court. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == Elon Musk failed in Wisconsin because he was loud. name: Team Walz
subject: [SURVEY] Share your thoughts with Tim
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
#
Peter, we wanted to make sure you saw the October priorities survey we sent you last week.
Tim is running for reelection because he wants to make Minnesota a better place to live for everyone. That starts with having conversations and listening to what people have to say.
**[While our campaign will travel to communities in every corner of the state, we don’t want you to have to wait. Click here to take our priorities survey and let Tim know what’s on your mind!](https://act.timwalz.com/go/93?c0=em_tw_20251020.n9ubQs&source=em20251020-17&t=1&akid=17%2E34582%2E7-ePkR)**
**[Take the Survey ››](https://act.timwalz.com/go/93?c0=em_tw_20251020.n9ubQs&source=em20251020-17&t=2&akid=17%2E34582%2E7-ePkR)**
Tim believes one of the most important parts of running a campaign is listening to what his constituents have to say — especially when there are so many issues impacting our lives. No matter who you are, you have a say in how Minnesota is run.
**[So Peter, can you take our brief October priorities survey? It will only take a moment, but will provide invaluable insights to our campaign.](https://act.timwalz.com/go/93?c0=em_tw_20251020.n9ubQs&source=em20251020-17&t=3&akid=17%2E34582%2E7-ePkR)**
Thank you,
Team Walz

Under Governor Walz’s leadership, Minnesota is showing the world what’s possible when we come together with grit, compassion, and a shared sense of purpose.
We secured free school meals for every student, cut child poverty, passed Paid Family Leave, delivered record investments in education, and more.
**[Now we need your help to stop MAGA Republicans from dragging us backward. Pitch in $5 today to help us win this race and keep moving forward — together.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251020-17&t=4&refcode2=17_34582_7-ePkR&akid=17%2E34582%2E7-ePkR)**
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251020-17&t=5&refcode2=17_34582_7-ePkR&akid=17%2E34582%2E7-ePkR)**
Email us: [info@walzforgovernor.org](mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=6&akid=17%2E34582%2E7-ePkR)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=17%2E34582%2E7-ePkR)

St. Paul MN 55104
