subject: Laura’s been endorsed by LCV 🌿
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117649251/577175994/-1798313451?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODRlY2YwMmMtZTBhZC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eD-844V8pX-frDfOSTnlZMWvo3d0nn8_goYVqWGtnxA=) Friend, We are very excited for this update: **Laura’s been endorsed by the League of Conservation Voters (LCV) Action Fund, which works to elect pro-environment representatives across the country.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117649255/577175997/-1798313451?refcode=em-10.20.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODRlY2YwMmMtZTBhZC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eD-844V8pX-frDfOSTnlZMWvo3d0nn8_goYVqWGtnxA=) LCV is one of the most important environmental groups in the nation whose work builds grassroots support for policies protecting the planet – policies Laura championed through her career. Laura has passed legislation in the Assembly to reduce climate pollution from commercial and residential buildings in the state by 40% by 2030; modernize water management; ban toxic chemicals in commercial products; reduce single-use plastic; and prioritize wildlife conservation infrastructure such as wildlife crossings. Every day in office it’s Laura’s mission to deliver for Californians and for our environment. **High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |

🚨 DEFEND MEDICATION ABORTION 🚨 Peter, in September, lawmakers in Texas passed a new, cruel ban on abortion pills via mail. This law encourages private citizens to sue anyone who manufactures, provides, or distributes medication abortion to someone in Texas. [**This is cruel, unacceptable, and an infringement on your reproductive rights and freedoms.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117649562/577176919/1824768205?sourceid=1150916&utm_campaign=26emama-1010aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWVlNGI2My1lMWFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X8BD6oNDiNFnVX-KC52H7Zt3MsGah88gR8egZ5awimQ=&emci=47e25f9d-f3a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=29ee4b63-e1ad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237)

Access to medication abortion is essential to reproductive health, and people deserve the freedom to take this SAFE and EFFECTIVE medicine in the privacy of their own home. | [**FIGHT BACK**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117649563/577176920/1824768205?sourceid=1150916&utm_campaign=26emama-1010aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWVlNGI2My1lMWFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X8BD6oNDiNFnVX-KC52H7Zt3MsGah88gR8egZ5awimQ=&emci=47e25f9d-f3a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=29ee4b63-e1ad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237 "FIGHT BACK")
---
Abortion pills like Mifepristone account for over 60% of abortions nationwide. [**That's exactly why anti-rights politicians are targeting them.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117649564/577176921/1824768205?sourceid=1150916&utm_campaign=26emama-1010aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWVlNGI2My1lMWFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X8BD6oNDiNFnVX-KC52H7Zt3MsGah88gR8egZ5awimQ=&emci=47e25f9d-f3a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=29ee4b63-e1ad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237)

Not only do anti-abortion extremists want to isolate Texans from care, they plan for this law to serve as a blueprint for other states to limit medication abortion, _even in states where abortion remains legal._ Through intimidation, fear, and control, they are trying to strip away access everywhere in every way.

We refuse to sit back and let extremists have their way. The Center is fighting back against this coordinated attack on your health care. But we need your help defending medication abortion.
[**DEFEND ABORTION CARE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117649565/577176922/1824768205?sourceid=1150916&utm_campaign=26emama-1010aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWVlNGI2My1lMWFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X8BD6oNDiNFnVX-KC52H7Zt3MsGah88gR8egZ5awimQ=&emci=47e25f9d-f3a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=29ee4b63-e1ad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237 "DEFEND ABORTION CARE")

---
Dear Peter,
---
On Friday, we kicked off the _COURAGEOUS CHRISTIANITY TOUR_ in Los Angeles, and the response was POWERFUL! With only _days_ of advanced notice, over two thousand Believers gathered together to lift up a shout of praise! And we're just getting started! The weather is getting cooler, but the fire of the Holy Spirit is heating up! Check out the video below to listen to the sound of praise echoing up from Los Angeles straight to heaven!
---
_**WATCH THE FULL _COURAGEOUS CHRISTIANITY TOUR _UPDATE ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎**_
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=1a4e5d63703e4d6b96bf4a0728c77388&_e=-B-9tKzXe79DQC0UkyD6pd5mVN6hbW7ZIWs5YaF8Qv0hcDv1uL-4XxKzODiYg-b-2jqcdctQoLN5aBslJhb8o24l3tZX4Jtm2SmstGQFF6u6gXqLi8MryjtPPLN6MMl2-34BRall06GIDUOmLyigzb8hi8x4OpZ-4aIcYaJ5mG3i-QG1nxqSWsgP7GjhYaYJ4r9s_yMui9W3q96Q7GMIlV9NtajI9ZuBwcwFzAqF7fuK39Q8HD4FBzcXVrYhR_OqpIYy840U7tyfr2gP7fTM8rx5ulwKgQebFIYvh5Rk3sGLEPgkybuzjOsyR-8j2K8SEM7rULhhLftn_D338mopCIlf8zAFLom9hxuZl6LCVwGA35reaecTfPenqr_4qp29aKEbw5YU23aowRZgmAD5gliQqYlxoxcALkvZwPW89hVlkRAxhAphJji4cz1MX2asf_VuMpUZz2374SGa8lDoHVMp-waYRe3TXOcYPwgczMM%3D)
---
Watch the video and be encouraged—churches are growing, campuses are opening, and God is moving through it all.

We have multiple tour stops this week—please be in prayer for us. The enemy is opposed to the advance of the Gospel everywhere and anywhere. We are facing adversity on the road, but we will persevere! _**Tour Schedule ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎**_**October 22nd** Crossline Community Church25384 MacKenzie StLaguna Hills, CA 92653 **October 23rd** Awaken Church1760 Descanso Ave San Marcos, CA 92078 **October 26th** Vintage Church171 FM 3219Harker Heights, TX 76548 **October 27th** Elevate Life Church8500 Teel PkwyFrisco, TX 75034 **October 28th** Capital Church2760 E Fairview AveMeridian, ID **October 29th** Calvary Christian Fellowship1175 Hillsdale Ave San Jose, CA 95118 **November 1st** Yakov Smirnoff Theater @ 7pm470 State Hwy 248Branson, MO 65616 **November 6th** Victory Church @ 7pm 7700 S Lewis AveTulsa, OK 74136 **December 5th @ 7pm** Living Stones Church909 Pratt St. Crown Point, IN 46307
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Peter, On Friday, we kicked off the COURAGEOUS CHRISTIANITY TOUR in Los Angeles, and the response was POWERFUL! With only days of advanced notice, over two thousand Believers gathered together to lift up a shout of praise! And we're just getting started! The weather is getting cooler, but the fire of the Holy Spirit is heating up! Check out the video below to listen to the sound of praise echoing up from Los Angeles straight to heaven! WATCH THE FULL COURAGEOUS CHRISTIANITY TOUR UPDATE ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎ Watch the video and be encouraged—churches are growing, campuses are opening, and God is moving through it all. We have multiple tour stops this week—please be in prayer for us. The enemy is opposed to the advance of the Gospel everywhere and anywhere. We are facing adversity on the road, but we will persevere! Tour Schedule ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎October 22nd Crossline Community Church25384 MacKenzie StLaguna Hills, CA 92653 October 23rd Awaken Church1760 Descanso Ave San Marcos, CA 92078 October 26th Vintage Church171 FM 3219Harker Heights, TX 76548 October 27th Elevate Life Church8500 Teel PkwyFrisco, TX 75034 October 28th Capital Church2760 E Fairview AveMeridian, ID October 29th Calvary Christian Fellowship1175 Hillsdale Ave San Jose, CA 95118 November 1st Yakov Smirnoff Theater @ 7pm470 State Hwy 248Branson, MO 65616 November 6th Victory Church @ 7pm 7700 S Lewis AveTulsa, OK 74136 December 5th @ 7pm Living Stones Church909 Pratt St. Crown Point, IN 46307 | | | | Till all hear, Sean | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- INTERNATIONAL DONORS— DONATE Donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Let Us Worship | |

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. Regards, Lindsey Hough Managing Director, Brownstone Research Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." Boebert on the other hand massively underperformed Trump in every county. Now: Boebert just reported her lowest fundraising haul ever. Trisha outraised her 5-1 thanks to the tens of thousands of grassroots donors like you who have come out to support our campaign. | == Trisha was at No Kings Protests across CD-4 this past weekend and the energy was off the charts. We can fight back, but I need your help.

| It’s Haley Stevens.

It’s official: **Donald Trump has endorsed my opponent, MAGA Republican Mike Rogers, in Michigan’s battleground Senate race.**

This isn’t a surprise – Rogers has spent years kissing up to Trump. MAGA megadonors even spent nearly $80 million last year trying to buy a Senate seat for Rogers. And now with Trump’s backing, we know what’s coming: a flood of GOP dark money and billionaire-funded attacks.

**We can fight back, but I need your help.** The deadline to hit our critical $100,000 fundraising goal is right around the corner, and we need the resources: [_**Will you split $25 between my campaign and Hillary Scholten’s to help me compete against Rogers’ war chest and keep Michigan blue?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117650725/577179945/-873513011?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-10-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWM5ZTI1Mi1lNGFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q51Kw0HkBE64Gi4fV3oQvg2rezB9X68chyyiDDekh6I=)

Look, keeping Mike Rogers out of the Senate isn’t just about our race in Michigan. It’s about flipping the Senate blue and stopping another MAGA loyalist from rubber-stamping Trump’s chaos agenda: gutting Medicaid, raising prices with reckless tariffs, and forcing working families to pay for tax cuts for billionaires.

I’ve spent my career fighting for Michigan – from helping save 200,000 auto jobs during the Great Recession to flipping a red House seat blue and delivering real results for working people. I’m in this race because Michiganders deserve a senator who fights for them, not someone who takes orders from Donald Trump.

**Here's the truth: Polling consistently shows I’m the only Democrat who can beat Rogers.** GOP operatives even told _The Hill_ that I’m their _**toughest**_ general election opponent. But to keep this lead – and win – I cannot miss this $100,000 goal.

name: Defend Our Courts
subject: Off-brand Elon Musk
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
Meet Jeff Yass, worth $67 billion. He’s the Temu Elon Musk — a knockoff version who’s savvy enough to keep his name out of the headlines.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dgutR334olk4OMPE6XJR4fHTJVLC4efate76smksX9diuvTurFjyp0u7oTuoM6FtOKeyWpjtmW0Y-m18cnQF_IhAsUV1F9sXNJr77qKCMBsiS2LHQDnqGePR0n6xCa14pQhnRuVyeT7XLEkx2Mnh2uoJprI20D3t8Z1vuibCzqNWoUS92UvGEXUowwIzd1JK3cHeDmybkpma69ki8mFAlHj0qd5d-t0SWrRKtVOtfbs=&c=wiE7kobTk-tBXy2pI7sI9dAdeatRvcVGgcVmZr-guCV-bL9PSlyzkg==&ch=RkhKXbWm5h23rvS8PbQ9Gp2fREpt0RG88HZkkP6TAufywnWA25Xw-A==)
---
| Peter,
Earlier this year in Wisconsin, Elon Musk dumped millions into a state Supreme Court race -- and Democrats crushed him.
Musk couldn't resist bragging, tweeting, and turning the spotlight on himself. The louder he got, the more fired up Democrats became. His arrogance helped us win.
Now, MAGA thinks they've found a smarter play. They've swapped out Musk for a quieter billionaire who they think can help them steal the Pennsylvania Supreme Court: Meet Jeff Yass, worth $67 billion. He's the Temu Elon Musk -- a knockoff version who's savvy enough to keep his name out of the headlines, but who's still trying to buy a state Supreme Court for his buddy Donald Trump.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dgutR334olk4OMPE6XJR4fHTJVLC4efate76smksX9diuvTurFjyp0u7oTuoM6FtOKeyWpjtmW0Y-m18cnQF_IhAsUV1F9sXNJr77qKCMBsiS2LHQDnqGePR0n6xCa14pQhnRuVyeT7XLEkx2Mnh2uoJprI20D3t8Z1vuibCzqNWoUS92UvGEXUowwIzd1JK3cHeDmybkpma69ki8mFAlD9V8cfmTilWnzBVtin48FY=&c=wiE7kobTk-tBXy2pI7sI9dAdeatRvcVGgcVmZr-guCV-bL9PSlyzkg==&ch=RkhKXbWm5h23rvS8PbQ9Gp2fREpt0RG88HZkkP6TAufywnWA25Xw-A==)

What we do have is you -- and thousands of grassroots Democrats who can rise up and stop this "Temu Elon Musk" before he gets away with stealing the critical PA Supreme Court. clean_body: Meet Jeff Yass, worth $67 billion. He’s the Temu Elon Musk — a knockoff version who’s savvy enough to keep his name out of the headlines. | | | | | == | Peter, Earlier this year in Wisconsin, Elon Musk dumped millions into a state Supreme Court race -- and Democrats crushed him. Musk couldn't resist bragging, tweeting, and turning the spotlight on himself. The louder he got, the more fired up Democrats became. His arrogance helped us win. Now, MAGA thinks they've found a smarter play. They've swapped out Musk for a quieter billionaire who they think can help them steal the Pennsylvania Supreme Court: Meet Jeff Yass, worth $67 billion. He's the Temu Elon Musk -- a knockoff version who's savvy enough to keep his name out of the headlines, but who's still trying to buy a state Supreme Court for his buddy Donald Trump. | == | | | | Yass may be trying to stay in the shadows, but we know exactly what he's up to. And we're one of the leading organizations exposing him and fighting back in Pennsylvania. But here's the problem: we don't have $67 billion. We don't have an army of dark money PACs. What we do have is you -- and thousands of grassroots Democrats who can rise up and stop this "Temu Elon Musk" before he gets away with stealing the critical PA Supreme Court. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == Elon Musk failed in Wisconsin because he was loud. name: Heidi Hall
subject: Friend, 90% of the EPA isn't working
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251020_em_fr_b1_HH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251020_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Friend,
While thousands of federal workers have already been fired by Trump and thousands more are without a paycheck, over 90% of EPA staff has been furloughed.
That 90% consists of the staff that remained after Trump fired almost 4,000 people earlier this year...
That means that important duties like pollution enforcement will be paused for the duration of this shutdown, and with no end in sight, our environment will be worse off for it.
Remember, friend, Kiley could've voted with Democrats to help prevent this shutdown and save over 15 million people from getting kicked off their healthcare, but he knew what he was doing.
He knew what he was doing, and he knew that this is what the Republican Party bosses wanted, just like in 2023 when Kiley voted to cut wildfire suppression funding by 44%.
Friend, it's past time that we kicked careerist Kevin Kiley out of Congress and elected a leader who cared about our future. Will you help me flip this seat and fight for our communities by donating any amount that you can today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251020_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251020_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Thank you so much,
Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251020_em_fr_b1_HH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251020_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251020_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS

Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
United States

disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Lean Red PAC
body:
We have a plan to stop him, but we need your help immediately.

| | | | | |
---
| | | | | | My Fellow Concerned American, Radical left Governor, Gavin Newsom, is trying to undermine President Trump again... this time by changing a state Constitution. That's right. Leftie loser Newsom has lost so many times in court that he's resorting to a smoke and mirrors campaign to change the California State Constitution so he can get more anti-America First Democrats in Congress. We have a plan to stop him, but we need your help immediately. [**Will you donate $25 or more today to help us STOP Gavin Newsom?**](https://email.alert.conservativesgive.com/c/eJyUkLFqxSAYRp8m2QxqNOrgUFrS6XZsRzH6J1cwUdSbS9--pNAH6Px9HA7n62ZuNsRwbB92B-2205RqWnns-awHPGvaDcWUI4IRxSaXVDO4ZkjvtRunaWU9aCImrKQUbOzvmq_YWgaWrEo6vsAoqZ2IxNOqGKOM90FfQIIpJpLxEQ9CycXjSYEnUgjuOoZthNIGl44K5bQtnFC3cMLg0t5HfW8t12586ejc0bmCexQYnuEo4K9HR-cI9kAF_DW3lFEuKSOOkUv5G6kFuBKLF8LDwii5MOP8aLtprhvfXt8_0Z9hX7TPzxBjqJPoGN52G-KvRftPq1PTnwAAAP__GelyVg) Let me take a moment to introduce myself, my name is Mike Iverson and I'm the Chairman of the newly formed Lean Red PAC. Our mission is to elect strong conservatives and educate voters on important ballot measures from coast to coast. The America First movement needs a strong base of support to fight side-by-side with President Trump. Right now, we need your help. Gavin Newsom is pushing for Californians to vote for Prop 50 this November. He wants this anti-Trump amendment to pass so badly that he called for a special election which will cost California taxpayers $282 MILLION. All of this is to try and "temporarily" redistrict California so that more Democrats can win elections.

Lean Red PAC is ready to deploy a media blitz to targeted California voters to STOP Prop 50 and preserve the slim U.S. House Republican majority, but we can't do it without you. [**Which is why I 'm asking you to donate $10, $25, $50, or $100 to Lean Red PAC TODAY so we can begin our messaging campaign before it's too late.**](https://email.alert.conservativesgive.com/c/eJyUkLFqxSAYRp8m2QxqNOrgUFrS6XZsRzH6J1cwUdSbS9--pNAH6Px9HA7n62ZuNsRwbB92B-2205RqWnns-awHPGvaDcWUI4IRxSaXVDO4ZkjvtRunaWU9aCImrKQUbOzvmq_YWgaWrEo6vsAoqZ2IxNOqGKOM90FfQIIpJpLxEQ9CycXjSYEnUgjuOoZthNIGl44K5bQtnFC3cMLg0t5HfW8t12586ejc0bmCexQYnuEo4K9HR-cI9kAF_DW3lFEuKSOOkUv5G6kFuBKLF8LDwii5MOP8aLtprhvfXt8_0Z9hX7TPzxBjqJPoGN52G-KvRftPq1PTnwAAAP__GelyVg) Let's look at the current breakdown of congressional elected officials in California:
* * 52 total CA House members in Congress
* * 43 of them are Democrats
* * 9 of them are Republican
* * Approximately 40% of CA voted for Trump
* * If Prop 50 is passed with a YES vote, Republican representation will drop to 4 - a net gain of FIVE (5) Democrat seats.

As slick Gavin Newsom gears up for a 2028 Presidential campaign, he's looking to notch a big win by getting Prop 50 passed in California.

This battle is simple - Trump vs Newsom. Given the strong number of CA Republicans, Independents and even some Democrats who despise Newsom, especially after the Palisades and Altadena fires and lies, we may have a chance to stop this horrendous ballot proposal, but only with your help.

[**Will you help us stop Gavin Newsom?** ](https://email.alert.conservativesgive.com/c/eJyUkLFqxSAYRp8m2QxqNOrgUFrS6XZsRzH6J1cwUdSbS9--pNAH6Px9HA7n62ZuNsRwbB92B-2205RqWnns-awHPGvaDcWUI4IRxSaXVDO4ZkjvtRunaWU9aCImrKQUbOzvmq_YWgaWrEo6vsAoqZ2IxNOqGKOM90FfQIIpJpLxEQ9CycXjSYEnUgjuOoZthNIGl44K5bQtnFC3cMLg0t5HfW8t12586ejc0bmCexQYnuEo4K9HR-cI9kAF_DW3lFEuKSOOkUv5G6kFuBKLF8LDwii5MOP8aLtprhvfXt8_0Z9hX7TPzxBjqJPoGN52G-KvRftPq1PTnwAAAP__GelyVg)

| | Remember, Boondoggle Gavin Newsom diverted nearly $300 MILLION away from potential public safety and infrastructure improvements just to hold his special election.

But, as you know, this is not Newsom's first big boondoggle.

And, just like his $14.4 BILLION "high-speed rail" to nowhere, we can stop Prop 50 dead in its tracks.

Help us preserve the slim U.S. House majority, defend President Trump and hand Gavin Newsom ANOTHER big fat loss today.

But don't wait, the election is just weeks away and we must launch our media blitz ASAP to defeat Newsom and Prop 50.

[**Join Lean Red PAC on the frontlines of this important battle today with a generous gift of $25 or more right now.**](https://email.alert.conservativesgive.com/c/eJyUkLFqxSAYRp8m2QxqNOrgUFrS6XZsRzH6J1cwUdSbS9--pNAH6Px9HA7n62ZuNsRwbB92B-2205RqWnns-awHPGvaDcWUI4IRxSaXVDO4ZkjvtRunaWU9aCImrKQUbOzvmq_YWgaWrEo6vsAoqZ2IxNOqGKOM90FfQIIpJpLxEQ9CycXjSYEnUgjuOoZthNIGl44K5bQtnFC3cMLg0t5HfW8t12586ejc0bmCexQYnuEo4K9HR-cI9kAF_DW3lFEuKSOOkUv5G6kFuBKLF8LDwii5MOP8aLtprhvfXt8_0Z9hX7TPzxBjqJPoGN52G-KvRftPq1PTnwAAAP__GelyVg)[**

With strong patriots like you on our side, I know we can win.

Onward to Victory,

Mike Iverson
Chairman

Everything Newsom is doing now is in service of his 2028 presidential run and a Prop 50 victory would be a notch in his belt in that effort, because bringing even more Democrats into Congress does nothing for California (it's already deep blue). clean_body: We have a plan to stop him, but we need your help immediately. | | | | | | | | | | | | My Fellow Concerned American, Radical left Governor, Gavin Newsom, is trying to undermine President Trump again... this time by changing a state Constitution. That's right. Leftie loser Newsom has lost so many times in court that he's resorting to a smoke and mirrors campaign to change the California State Constitution so he can get more anti-America First Democrats in Congress. We have a plan to stop him, but we need your help immediately. Let me take a moment to introduce myself, my name is Mike Iverson and I'm the Chairman of the newly formed Lean Red PAC. Our mission is to elect strong conservatives and educate voters on important ballot measures from coast to coast. The America First movement needs a strong base of support to fight side-by-side with President Trump. Right now, we need your help. Gavin Newsom is pushing for Californians to vote for Prop 50 this November. He wants this anti-Trump amendment to pass so badly that he called for a special election which will cost California taxpayers $282 MILLION. All of this is to try and "temporarily" redistrict California so that more Democrats can win elections. Lean Red PAC is ready to deploy a media blitz to targeted California voters to STOP Prop 50 and preserve the slim U.S. House Republican majority, but we can't do it without you. Let's look at the current breakdown of congressional elected officials in California: 52 total CA House members in Congress 43 of them are Democrats 9 of them are Republican Approximately 40% of CA voted for Trump If Prop 50 is passed with a YES vote, Republican representation will drop to 4 - a net gain of FIVE (5) Democrat seats. As slick Gavin Newsom gears up for a 2028 Presidential campaign, he's looking to notch a big win by getting Prop 50 passed in California. This battle is simple - Trump vs Newsom. Given the strong number of CA Republicans, Independents and even some Democrats who despise Newsom, especially after the Palisades and Altadena fires and lies, we may have a chance to stop this horrendous ballot proposal, but only with your help. | | | Remember, Boondoggle Gavin Newsom diverted nearly $300 MILLION away from potential public safety and infrastructure improvements just to hold his special election. But, as you know, this is not Newsom's first big boondoggle. And, just like his $14.4 BILLION "high-speed rail" to nowhere, we can stop Prop 50 dead in its tracks. Help us preserve the slim U.S. House majority, defend President Trump and hand Gavin Newsom ANOTHER big fat loss today. But don't wait, the election is just weeks away and we must launch our media blitz ASAP to defeat Newsom and Prop 50. Thank you in advance for your invaluable support. With strong patriots like you on our side, I know we can win. Onward to Victory, Mike Iverson Chairman Lean Red PAC | | | | | | P.S. Everything Newsom is doing now is in service of his 2028 presidential run and a Prop 50 victory would be a notch in his belt in that effort, because bringing even more Democrats into Congress does nothing for California (it's already deep blue). It is, however, extremely important to Democrats on the national stage. He is using California voters and Californians' tax dollars to help him with the runup to 2028. Help us STOP him before he gets any momentum. | | | | | | Paid for and Authorized by Lean Red PAC. Not paid for by any candidate or campaign committee. Peter,

In any election, it's important to pay attention to what your opponent is doing. And right now, **Mariannette Miller-Meeks just reported raising $2.6 million in the last quarter.**

She's not slowing down, and we know she and her Washington D.C. backers will do whatever it takes to cling to this seat — no matter how deeply Iowans have soured on her. _But we've got something she never will._

**We have you.** We have a grassroots team that's powered by working people who believe in a better Iowa. And we have Christina, a candidate who actually listens, who won’t shy away from tough conversations, and who won't whine to her base when her constituents hold her accountable.

We know the path to a brighter future won't come easy. It means organizing in every community of our district, earning trust one conversation at a time, and raising the resources to stay competitive. We don't need to match Miller-Meeks dollar for dollar, but we do need to fully fund our field program, reach voters across the district, and keep this campaign in fighting shape.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: What I saw in Austin gives me hope.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

On Saturday, Texans gathered together throughout the state for No Kings
rallies, protests, and marches. There were massive crowds in the areas you
might expect but also a big showing in more rural, heavily Republican
communities, and towns that didn’t have an event during the first No Kings
day.

I was on the ground in Austin and I’ve got to tell you, the energy was
electric. People came from all over central Texas to stand together,
shoulder to shoulder, and make one thing clear: we will not bend the knee
to authoritarianism. Not now, not ever.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251020.6Gedn3&refcode=ema20251020-240412&t=1002&akid=240412%2E444211%2EOF006W ]Beto speaking to the crowd at a No Kings rally.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251020.6Gedn3&refcode=ema20251020-240412&t=1003&akid=240412%2E444211%2EOF006W ]Beto speaking to an attendee at a No Kings rally.

The turnout was incredible. Texans—young and old, lifelong Democrats,
independents, former Republicans, current Republicans who want their party
back, and first-time voters—came to say with one voice that this country
belongs to all of us, not to a handful of powerful people trying to
control our future.

In that crowd, you could feel the strength of who we are—people who
remember where we come from and what we’re made of. We are the descendants
of those who stood up to the most powerful empire on the planet to win our
independence, to ensure that no American would ever bow to a king again.
We are also the descendants of those who defeated fascism half a world
away in the 1940s and the heroes who marched, sat in, and protested to win
the Civil Rights Act and the Voting Rights Act.

And that spirit—that belief in freedom, fairness, and opportunity—is
exactly what will carry us through this moment. We’ve faced great
challenges before, and we’ve come through every single one of them by
standing together. This time will be no different.

We are united. We are fighting for the ideal that is America—replacing the
false virtues of this current regime with true freedom, real fairness,
shared prosperity, and opportunity for every single American.

So I’ll ask you what I asked everyone in Austin: Are we going to stay
united? Are we going to fight every single day until we win the elections
in November 2026? Are we ever going to give in, give up, or roll over?

We’re going to fight—and we’re going to win.

That’s what Powered by People is about. Building a movement that doesn’t
wait for permission, that doesn’t back down, and that organizes on the
ground in every part of Texas until every voter has a voice.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251020.6Gedn3&refcode=ema20251020-240412&t=1004&akid=240412%2E444211%2EOF006W ]If you’re ready to keep this fight going, I hope you’ll chip in
$3 today. Our movement—and this moment—depends on our
collective strength.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251020.6Gedn3&refcode=ema20251020-240412&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=240412%2E444211%2EOF006W ]DONATE $3

Beto O’Rourke

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=240412%2E444211%2EOF006W

## Commonsense Corner:
---
The D.C. circus has real consequences—and this Schumer Shutdown proves it. The “No Kings” crowd was at it again this weekend!
It’s all pretty funny when you remember these are the same folks who anointed a new presidential nominee without even holding an election. Do their blind followers ever stop to really think about that? Democrats watched blundering Biden tank his campaign, then quietly swapped him out without even asking their base for the go-ahead.
Make it make sense. 🥴
President Trump isn’t our king, he’s our president. There was no coronation, no backroom deal—just a good old-fashioned election where millions of people gave him their stamp of approval. And now, he’s doing exactly what the American people elected him to do:
* Secure the border and deport lawless immigrants
* Stop wasting taxpayer money on clearly biased media companies (looking at you, NPR)
* Put America first again

So let the radical Left keep shouting about nothing—and we’ll keep fixing everything they broke.
---

clean_body: Burchett Bulletin will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | | Commonsense Corner: The D.C. circus has real consequences—and this Schumer Shutdown proves it. The “No Kings” crowd was at it again this weekend! It’s all pretty funny when you remember these are the same folks who anointed a new presidential nominee without even holding an election. Do their blind followers ever stop to really think about that? Democrats watched blundering Biden tank his campaign, then quietly swapped him out without even asking their base for the go-ahead. Make it make sense. 🥴 President Trump isn’t our king, he’s our president. There was no coronation, no backroom deal—just a good old-fashioned election where millions of people gave him their stamp of approval. And now, he’s doing exactly what the American people elected him to do: Secure the border and deport lawless immigrants Stop wasting taxpayer money on clearly biased media companies (looking at you, NPR) Put America first again So let the radical Left keep shouting about nothing—and we’ll keep fixing everything they broke. | Boots on the Ground Poll: Do you think Democrats will vote to re-open the government this week now that they’ve appeased their base at the “No Kings” rallies? name: Former Navy SEAL Adam Schwarze
subject: Political violence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
What Democrats are saying in private is what they think about conservatives

|
---

Democrats are at it again. And I wish I were surprised, Fellow Conservative.

Take a look at leaked text messages from Virginia Democrat AG candidate Jay Jones: ⬇️⬇️

[](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyMkc2OmzAUhZ_G7EC2IRgWXmQCUTepqplRp-rGMteXxJKNke2Qqk9foWb2s_3uj86n83FRF22dXa7ftUcJk4pJrcHZbEG7zQaHC6DilB9KRktO9zkrjIQeeTM1BUomWtp3bdfS4ibFDKJpmTnMswbR1wI71iA3zSyww94UVu6_GOWU9ZQe-gobjqIDzidoOzYhaSgam0OsICwJ46az3XCKQRvQKVcL5sLJW85rIvWR8DPh54Rwj1g97BLRVBD8zuD20PEvlnOIZcJFZyT8bNBn_JNTueoykvqcgNTD_0SsVW-nbx_H19-jGkf146iG8fI-_np_U6_jT3V6Iby9Z6_yfnJ6KT89njiFewQk9RBxeyKPxt49qQf02ronBO1Xba8LqYfPMEWUZn1Y52xqBWnodV_fNYr85UY2yf8FAAD__-BTlOM)

This is despicable, but more of the same from the radical Left.

_**First**_ , we were told the Black Lives Matter riots were "mostly peaceful protests."

_**Then**_ , there were assassination attempts on President Trump and Brett Kavanaugh, leading up to the tragic political assassination of Charlie Kirk last month.

_**Now, this?!**_

The man seeking the top law enforcement job in the Commonwealth of Virginia sent text messages wishing one of his political opponents got "two bullets to the head." Yet, he's still in the race with a little less than one month until Virginia's November elections.

But it doesn't end there.

Democrats' choice for a gubernatorial candidate, told supporters, "Let your rage fuel you."

And here in Minnesota, Tim Walz openly rooted for President Trump's death.

I can only say THANK GOD President Trump beat Kamala Harris and Tim Walz last November. Can you imagine having a vice president who has so little moral clarity that he would root for the death of a sitting president of the United States?

And here's the kicker: _my opponent in this Senate race is even worse.**She's more progressive than Walz, more radical than Walz, and every bit as dangerous.**_

* They both want to ban firearms in Minnesota.
* They both see Republicans not as opposition of ideas, but as enemies to be silenced and crushed.

And if they get their way, they'll forcefully instill their warped vision of America on EVERYONE.

**[Will you chip in a dollar or two to my campaign today to help me stop these hard-left lunatics in their tracks?](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyMkc2OmzAUhZ_G7EC2IRgWXmQCUTepqplRp-rGMteXxJKNke2Qqk9foWb2s_3uj86n83FRF22dXa7ftUcJk4pJrcHZbEG7zQaHC6DilB9KRktO9zkrjIQeeTM1BUomWtp3bdfS4ibFDKJpmTnMswbR1wI71iA3zSyww94UVu6_GOWU9ZQe-gobjqIDzidoOzYhaSgam0OsICwJ46az3XCKQRvQKVcL5sLJW85rIvWR8DPh54Rwj1g97BLRVBD8zuD20PEvlnOIZcJFZyT8bNBn_JNTueoykvqcgNTD_0SsVW-nbx_H19-jGkf146iG8fI-_np_U6_jT3V6Iby9Z6_yfnJ6KT89njiFewQk9RBxeyKPxt49qQf02ronBO1Xba8LqYfPMEWUZn1Y52xqBWnodV_fNYr85UY2yf8FAAD__-BTlOM)**

We must show the country that these midterm elections are a referendum on the rise in political violence on the Left, and that this rhetoric from them has **CONSEQUENCES**.

**[Can I count on your support if you're as outraged as I am? Even a couple of bucks will help send an ally to help President Trump-not attack him.](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyMkc2OmzAUhZ_G7EC2IRgWXmQCUTepqplRp-rGMteXxJKNke2Qqk9foWb2s_3uj86n83FRF22dXa7ftUcJk4pJrcHZbEG7zQaHC6DilB9KRktO9zkrjIQeeTM1BUomWtp3bdfS4ibFDKJpmTnMswbR1wI71iA3zSyww94UVu6_GOWU9ZQe-gobjqIDzidoOzYhaSgam0OsICwJ46az3XCKQRvQKVcL5sLJW85rIvWR8DPh54Rwj1g97BLRVBD8zuD20PEvlnOIZcJFZyT8bNBn_JNTueoykvqcgNTD_0SsVW-nbx_H19-jGkf146iG8fI-_np_U6_jT3V6Iby9Z6_yfnJ6KT89njiFewQk9RBxeyKPxt49qQf02ronBO1Xba8LqYfPMEWUZn1Y52xqBWnodV_fNYr85UY2yf8FAAD__-BTlOM) **

Thanks for joining me in this fight.

[](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyMkc2OmzAUhZ_G7EC2IRgWXmQCUTepqplRp-rGMteXxJKNke2Qqk9foWb2s_3uj86n83FRF22dXa7ftUcJk4pJrcHZbEG7zQaHC6DilB9KRktO9zkrjIQeeTM1BUomWtp3bdfS4ibFDKJpmTnMswbR1wI71iA3zSyww94UVu6_GOWU9ZQe-gobjqIDzidoOzYhaSgam0OsICwJ46az3XCKQRvQKVcL5sLJW85rIvWR8DPh54Rwj1g97BLRVBD8zuD20PEvlnOIZcJFZyT8bNBn_JNTueoykvqcgNTD_0SsVW-nbx_H19-jGkf146iG8fI-_np_U6_jT3V6Iby9Z6_yfnJ6KT89njiFewQk9RBxeyKPxt49qQf02ronBO1Xba8LqYfPMEWUZn1Y52xqBWnodV_fNYr85UY2yf8FAAD__-BTlOM)

body:
Trump commuted George Santos’s sentence to release him from prison.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117651702/577183006/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-10-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTEzOTRmYi1lNmFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2QNHlmcG6ys5K3_rT2chakrMHS1_rEWlJhTPkCoLbPs=)
---
| Peter,

_Of course he did._

**Trump commuted George Santos’s sentence to release him from prison.**

A liar. A scammer. A fraud.

And in Trump’s Republican Party, _that’s a resume._

Janelle Stelson here — the Emmy-winning news anchor and Democrat running to flip PA-10 from red to blue. Congressman Scott Perry voted to cut food benefits for 4 million of our neighbors to pay for a massive tax cut to billionaires. Now he and his colleagues are covering up how many more people will go hungry by halting the measurement of food insecurity. **Ignoring a problem will not make it go away.** Pennsylvanians deserve more than just barely scraping by. From owning a home to retiring with dignity, or even just taking a vacation, the American dream is becoming unaffordable. And Scott Perry is doubling down on his tariffs, which are driving up inflation and making everything more expensive. He is refusing to work across the aisle to bring down healthcare premiums and instead holding critical government services hostage with this irresponsible shutdown. **I am sick of footing the bill for his recklessness and refusal to take responsibility. I know you are, too.** In Congress, I will work to bring down housing and healthcare costs. I will not put tax cuts for billionaires above food assistance for our most vulnerable. You can count on me to be your voice in Congress, like you have counted on me for the news for the past thirty years. **[Will you step up to the plate today by chipping in $5 to help me flip this district and send Scott Perry and his disastrous tariffs packing?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117651880/577183591/609406852?amount=10&source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_102025_Costs_60DO_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmM0ZWVmMWQtZTdhZC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=W8qdzoY3jFXOjY7OeEcgjq-eOZeAKSJL06NyTSz9VOc=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

Congressman Scott Perry voted to cut food benefits for 4 million of our neighbors to pay for a massive tax cut to billionaires. Now he and his colleagues are covering up how many more people will go hungry by halting the measurement of food insecurity. Ignoring a problem will not make it go away. Pennsylvanians deserve more than just barely scraping by. From owning a home to retiring with dignity, or even just taking a vacation, the American dream is becoming unaffordable. And Scott Perry is doubling down on his tariffs, which are driving up inflation and making everything more expensive. He is refusing to work across the aisle to bring down healthcare premiums and instead holding critical government services hostage with this irresponsible shutdown. I am sick of footing the bill for his recklessness and refusal to take responsibility. I know you are, too. In Congress, I will work to bring down housing and healthcare costs. I will not put tax cuts for billionaires above food assistance for our most vulnerable. name: Justin J. Pearson
subject: "Just yield, man."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
The promise of hope, justice, and better days
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9d18243e-f05e-4b4a-8598-69e414ebabe5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| "Just yield, man." Peter, that's what the Republican majority ordered me to do as I protested to end gun violence on the House floor in the Tennessee Legislature and what they are saying to do now with a federal occupation deployed in our district. I said "No" then, and I say no now. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T400ad01c-8b41-4a5d-a2e5-70fd2cb0843f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) And for that, they were furious. They declared that I "violated decorum" and expelled me and my colleague from our duly elected office. It was a sickening overreach to protect their gun lobby donors, tinged in racism, expelling two young Black lawmakers. They knew it was wrong, and that's why when The People voted us back in, they were eventually forced to reinstate us to our seats. The message these Republicans wanted to send us was clear: If you protest to make schools, neighborhoods, and places of worship safer, we will expel you. But, they were misguided! I didn’t yield then. I won’t yield now. I will always fight for what is morally right. We will continue to fight for the promise of hope, justice, and better days. In fact, I'm going further than ever before: I'm launching my campaign for Congress to bring real representation to the community that raised me. I'm a son of Memphis. It's time to use the power of Congress to improve the lives of working people in our communities and end the gun violence epidemic. [It's not enough to have a Member of Congress just sit and vote on bills from Washington, D.C. — we need our Members to use their power and influence to truly fight for their communities. That's what I'm going to do. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. Friend, before I get into the latest from New Jersey, I want to _**[thank all of our sponsors](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bmNl/?__vbtrk=MzI4MDE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI4MDE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_ who have stepped up to fund a voter registration staffer or ballot chaser this year.
Because of them, we are tied in the polls and ahead of our projections in New Jersey, and this race is 100% winnable.
Right now, my grassroots team is on the ground chasing mail-in ballots and preparing to launch our massive get out the vote program to **FLIP New Jersey** **from Blue to RED** this November, and we’re having great success.
[SPONSOR A BALLOT CHASER](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bmNl/?__vbtrk=MzI4MDE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI4MDE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Republicans are returning their mail in ballots at a higher rate than Democrats.** This is phenomenal news, but it’s not all good... So far, Democrat voters have requested almost 3 TIMES as many mail-in ballots as Republicans, and they still have more votes “in the bank” than we do.
Just like in Pennsylvania in 2024 for President Trump, this year in New Jersey **_we need to hit our magic number of mail-in and early in person Republican votes cast before election day_** so we can turn out the rest of our voters and win a decisive victory on Election Day.
We truly don’t have a moment to waste... mail-in voting is well underway, in-person Early Voting begins on October 25th, and Election Day is November 4th.
[SPONSOR A BALLOT CHASER](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bmNl/?__vbtrk=MzI4MDE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI4MDE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend, the momentum is on our side, and the early returns are looking very good, but we have a lot of work to do in the next few weeks if we’re going to flip the Garden State red.
**We need your help to make the difference.** By sponsoring an Early Vote Action staffer, you’re fueling the grassroots work to flip New Jersey RED in 2025.**[Every new voter we register, every mail-in ballot we chase down, and every Republican we get to the polls brings us one vote closer to victory.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bmNl/?__vbtrk=MzI4MDE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI4MDE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
**_[Please, take meaningful action today by becoming a sponsor of an Early Vote Action ballot chaser in New Jersey](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bmNl/?__vbtrk=MzI4MDE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI4MDE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
_In Liberty,_
**Scott Presler**
