clean_body: | = Friend, This is a tough time for IL-13 and communities nationwide as the Republican-led government shutdown drags on. I’m committed to doing right by Central and Southern Illinois – and it starts with showing up and listening. I’m energized by the folks I’m meeting and taking their stories back to Washington with me as I fight to end the shutdown and ensure affordable and accessible health care. So today, I wanted to catch you up on some of the events I’ve gone to in the last few weeks. I’m fired up to keep fighting for working families in Illinois – and I hope you’ll read my update the whole way through. Thank you, Nikki | = I was glad to stop by the WSOY Food Drive and discuss how we can make sure everyone in our communities has access to food. This was one of the largest single-day food drives in the nation, collecting over 30 million pounds of food in 20+ years! = I had a great weekend at the Belleville Chili Cookout, supporting many of our local businesses. = Last month, I visited the Farm Progress Show grounds with the Illinois Soybean Association and learned about how conservation practices support Illinois farmers. = I also joined the Mason County Dems River Party in September to talk about how we can band together to make change happen and protect our communities. = I’ll continue to keep pushing at home and back in Washington to stand up for working families and the thousands of Illinoisans under threat during the shutdown. Listening to your stories is a key part of my job and directly informs my work in Congress. Thank you, and have a great rest of your weekend! Nikki =** | = = = Nikki is a champion for working families – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America. Now, she’s delivering in Congress for the people of Illinois' 13th Congressional District. = To learn more about Nikki and her commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Nikki for Congress Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States

— NDRC HQ
* * *
Peter,
Things feel tough right now. And they are — I’m not going to sugarcoat it. It seems like every day, new attacks on democracy crop up across the country, and they’re happening all at once.
Here’s the thing: Their goal is to overwhelm us. To break our resolve so that they can remake our government to insulate themselves from voters and protect their own power.
I refuse to let that happen. When I look back at the NDRC's almost decade-long history fighting for a stronger, fairer democracy, I can say with certainty that this is the toughest moment we’ve faced yet. _But our movement is also the strongest we’ve ever been. _
**It’s easy to stand up for what you believe when nothing is at risk. The real test of our values and our resolve comes when things get challenging and the deck is stacked against us.**
[**The support of people like you shows just how strongly the American people reject the GOP power grabs sweeping the nation. So I’m asking: Will you make a donation to power the NDRC's work for the critical months ahead?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117658219/577203750/-80723829?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_OctAGLiftNote_email_20251020-NDRC-Tier1-OctAGLiftNote_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251020-NDRC-Tier1-OctAGLiftNote_&utm_campaign=OctAGLiftNote&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzMmIyMWJjLWY3YWQtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NfC2r-lkLR99kLUsUGJyk9F9_rm_aoJ-od7ZqyFhupc=)

Peter, the folks on the other side — the people who are desperately trying to grab power at the expense of the American voters — they’ve got seemingly unlimited resources. It might feel like we simply can’t keep up with their cynical, deep-pocketed schemes.
**And we don’t have to. We have something they don’t: Principles. The law. The Constitution. The American people.**
Whenever it feels the most dire, I look at our progress and am reminded that we can and will prevail — for instance:
* The fair maps movement just scored a victory in Utah, where a court threw out an egregiously gerrymandered map. The newly redrawn map could make Utah more competitive and flip at least one district.

* We’ve endorsed some incredible Democracy Defenders in states like Virginia and Pennsylvania ahead of this November’s election, and we’ve had a strong track record of ensuring pro-democracy candidates win critical state-level elections.

* In our first five years as an organization, we helped stop and reverse unfair maps that took power away from the voters. _The New York Times_ said the last midterms were conducted on “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.”

**Don’t let the stunning display of cynical partisanship we’re seeing play out among Republicans right now fool you — when we fight, we can win.**

I refuse to let that happen. name: John Fetterman
subject: 🚨 LAST DAY to register to vote before the November election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1&akid=10376%2E434096%2EgRQpIR)

| | |
---
Hi, Derek,
John here with a quick reminder: **Today is the LAST DAY to register to vote before the judicial elections on Nov. 4. ⚠️**
Judicial elections draw lousy turnout, but they have a huge impact. The PA Supreme Court rules on things like **redistricting, reproductive rights, election laws, equal rights, and environmental protections.**
And this year?
**🗳 ️ We've got THREE PA Supreme Court seats up for retention, with the potential to swing the current majority. **
So I need you to make sure you and yours in PA are registered and ready to **VOTE YES** for the justices and judges up for retention on your ballot on or before Election Day.
Make sure you're all set by using the buttons below:
| | | | | [Request your ballot](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51884?t=2&akid=10376%2E434096%2EgRQpIR)
---
| | [Check your voter registration](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51885?t=3&akid=10376%2E434096%2EgRQpIR)
---
| | [Register to vote](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51886?t=4&akid=10376%2E434096%2EgRQpIR)
---
| | [Find your polling place](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51887?t=5&akid=10376%2E434096%2EgRQpIR)
---
Bring a buddy, remind your neighbor – don’t sit this one out. Democracy works best when we all show up. 🇺🇸
John ❤️
| |

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2025?refcode=jtk287-ot-fl-footer&t=6&refcode2=10376_434096_gRQpIR&akid=10376%2E434096%2EgRQpIR)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=7&akid=10376%2E434096%2EgRQpIR)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=10376%2E434096%2EgRQpIR)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Democracy works best when we all show up. 🇺🇸 John ❤️ | | | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Voter Action Project Electoral College Team
subject: Another reason to get rid of the Electoral College
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Politico: Trump targets states that voted for Harris in shutdown fight [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=102025_3&amount=25]
There's never been a clearer reason to get rid of the Electoral College, friend. We're watching in real time as those in control of the federal government are using it to exact revenge on states that didn't go their way in the last election. Straight from Politico:
“ The White House is targeting Democratic states with its first wave of cuts to federal projects following the government shutdown, impacting billions of dollars in funding for energy and infrastructure ”. Russ Vought, author of Project 2025 and director of the Office of Management and Budget, has gone after billions in federal spending in so-called "blue states" but not publicly announced cuts that affected any state that backed Trump in 2024.
“ We can get rid of a lot of things that we didn’t want, and they’d be Democrat things ,” Trump told reporters ahead of the shutdown. He's not even trying to hide his intent to punish the states that didn't come in for him in the Electoral College.
The Electoral College gives the vote suppressors another tool to target those who disagree with them and harm voters. We have to remove this danger once and for all -- chip in $5, $10, $15 or whatever you can to help us move towards a popular vote system >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=102025_3&amount=15]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=102025_3&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=102025_3&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=102025_3&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=102025_3&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=102025_3&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=102025_3&amount=35]
We don’t necessarily have to wait for Congress to act, either. Movements like the one in favor of the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact (NPVIC) -- an agreement among a group of U.S. states and the District of Columbia to award all their electoral votes to whichever presidential candidate wins the overall popular vote in the 50 states and the District of Columbia -- could end the Electoral College without a constitutional amendment.
16 states plus DC have already joined the NPVIC, accounting for 206 electoral votes and 76% of the states needed to essentially make the popular vote the law of the land. Maine is also moving a bill through their state legislature to join.
Whether it's the NPVIC or something else, it's clear that the Electoral College needs to go.
Help us end the Electoral College forever with $15 or more today! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=102025_3&amount=15]
Thanks,
Voter Action Project's Electoral College Team
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=102025_3&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=102025_3&amount=20]

#### **At the request of our friends in Bethel and Western Alaska, along with United Cajun Navy.**
#### **I’ve developed**[**http://907Pets.com**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68f6a47a96fd532e323e823d&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2FBttgD1sj2o&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68f6a31e3a2048697fa829cc&l=en-US&s=5QykPzugBSTVwALpLiPYz0YyL8U%3D)**to help reunite pets with their owners. At no cost. I’ll be uploading photos of the pups soon with names. Please help share the website, so families can find their pets.**
#### **Tropic Tundra (Phil & Diamond Izon) are proud to help our Bethel neighbors.**
---
### **A Unified Partnership for** **People and Pets**
**Bethel Search and Rescue (BSAR), the United Cajun Navy (UCN), and Bethel Friends of K9 (BFK9) have come together in a unified effort to support both people and animals displaced by the recent disaster across the YK Delta region.

Through this partnership, BSAR provides on-the-ground coordination and logistics, UCN brings national disaster response expertise and resources, and BFK9 ensures the safety, rescue, and care of companion animals impacted by the storm.

Together, these organizations are bridging gaps, meeting urgent needs, and ensuring that no one — human or animal — is left behind.**

body:
Peter, there’s no reason to trust Republicans, particularly when it comes to healthcare.

---
| | Peter, there’s no reason to trust Republicans, particularly when it comes to healthcare. These are people who have attempted to repeal the Affordable Care Act more than 70 times over the last 15 years. Republicans have repeatedly voted against extending ACA tax credits. They care more about freeing George Santos than providing healthcare to everyday Americans. That’s the unfortunate reality we confront, Peter. Right now, more than 20 MILLION Americans are beginning to receive notices that their healthcare costs will skyrocket. Where are House Republicans in the midst of this healthcare crisis? On vacation. It’s indefensible, Peter. You deserve better. Democrats will NOT back down. It’s time to cancel the cuts, lower the cost and save healthcare. Keep the faith, Hakeem

---

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: (Urgent) Donald Trump just endorsed my opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
I'm going to lay this out as clearly as I can:
Donald Trump endorsed my opponent Winsome Earle-Sears late last night.
I'm the only Democrat running for Governor this year in a state controlled by Republicans, and I need each person reading this to join our donor list by midnight. It's urgent so that we can continue standing up to President Trump, turning out voters, and demonstrating the strength of this campaign.
Will you split a $30 contribution between my campaign and Tim Kaine to help me defeat Donald Trump's hand-picked candidate in the biggest election of 2025? It's only a matter of time until Trump's billion-dollar war chest is spent to attack us here in Virginia, and we need to be ready to respond. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?amount=30]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $30 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?express_lane=true&amount=30]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?amount=25]
This whole year, my opponent has spent more time groveling for Trump's endorsement than standing up for Virginia.
In fact, Winsome admits that she met privately with Trump to plead for his support.
This came at a time when the President was firing thousands of federal workers, driving up prices, and planning to cut funding for healthcare and public schools — actions which have devastated Virginia's economy and threatened the livelihoods of so many.
It's clear that Winsome places her loyalty to Trump above everything else.
Now, I'm using every tool at my disposal to make sure voters know the truth about Winsome. But we're in the heart of early voting now, and sharing our message on TV, at the doors, and over the internet is so incredibly expensive.
So, can I count on your support today ?
If you've been waiting for the moment when you can have the greatest impact on our campaign for Governor, this is it. Please use this link right now to make your split donation → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?amount=30]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?amount=25]
Thank you for standing with me. Let's win this together.
Abigail Spanberger
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?amount=25]

Williamsburg, VA 23185

Fellow Conservative,

When our voters stay at home, we lose critically essential races.

All year, my colleagues in the Senate and I have been raising the alarm bells about what would happen if our supporters stayed home during pivotal races.

_**A couple of weeks ago, we found out.**_****

I put together a campaign memo on how to avoid future disasters like the one that recently unfolded.

Please take a moment to read it today.

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: When politicians play games, working people lose.
body:
| |
---
**Friend, too many politicians are more worried about "winning" in the headlines and scoring political points than delivering for their constituents.** Just look at the MAGA Republicans' government shutdown. Democrats are ready to make a deal that would protect access to health care, invest in our communities, and lower costs — but MAGA Republicans chose to take a hardline stance in favor of Trump's extremist policies instead. As a result, hundreds of thousands of workers have lost paychecks or will soon, government services have gone offline, and Americans of all backgrounds are set to face challenges gaining access to affordable healthcare. **All because Republicans care more about showing partisan loyalty than delivering for Americans. When politicians play games, working people always lose.** Friend, this just shows how crucial it is that we take back the House in 2026. Our communities deserve leaders who will actually go to work for us — not just for themselves. clean_body: | | Friend, too many politicians are more worried about "winning" in the headlines and scoring political points than delivering for their constituents. Just look at the MAGA Republicans' government shutdown. Democrats are ready to make a deal that would protect access to health care, invest in our communities, and lower costs — but MAGA Republicans chose to take a hardline stance in favor of Trump's extremist policies instead. As a result, hundreds of thousands of workers have lost paychecks or will soon, government services have gone offline, and Americans of all backgrounds are set to face challenges gaining access to affordable healthcare. All because Republicans care more about showing partisan loyalty than delivering for Americans. When politicians play games, working people always lose. Friend, this just shows how crucial it is that we take back the House in 2026. Our communities deserve leaders who will actually go to work for us — not just for themselves. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. If we don’t fix this ASAP, public broadcasting may shut down altogether.

**New Dems are working across the aisle to secure funding for public broadcasting because we know a free press is key to a safe and healthy democracy.**

Let’s address the elephants in the room... Here’s a look at Jon’s extreme Republican challengers:
#

**Let’s address the elephants in the room:** Jon has three extreme GOP opponents vying to replace him next year.
**Here’s what you need to know about them:**
**Buddy Carter,** a self proclaimed “MAGA Warrior,” has spent millions of dollars to try and defeat Jon and flood the airwaves in Georgia. His accomplishments include nominating Trump for the Nobel Peace Prize and introducing a bill to rename Greenland “Red, White, and Blueland.” 😬
**Mike Collins** is as extreme as they come. He’s best known for his record of racist, antisemitic, or xenophobic comments on Twitter.
**Derek Dooley** is a failed and fired Tennessee football coach who has Brian Kemp’s backing and financial support, despite having no public service experience and regularly failing to vote...
_**And all of them are devoted rubber stamps to Donald Trump’s extreme agenda.**_
[**We can’t afford to have another MAGA lackey in office — but in order to win this race and defend Jon’s seat, we need your help. Peter, **I helped write and pass the Colorado AI Act, the first AI regulation law in the nation.** [](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/VnFqgsNOaXAEz3aF0fIXWvUXb2zkXzzwc-eJOnDUVZNuPgWwFQQJn7844YQqtRcTkFy9_EjNBYhQrstCnKJsfeI18sZodY0jNgNbzvq6-G0ctpkCa9l4dHGT8Xjq3fFDEGXEu_A4QmwxcKurH6zcmjFaDW2rA8H-WbFeigRLkdP1bSyYlwx84voKzYcGZkB0YNwaKUnmsFhH_S_A4N75f6MHe12AF-2IwtPigYhClSb8ne-k590HsAmNd3Gh1Pan6LQIl-SfU3Eda9apRRSzgT18a5dbII5252ceJGtGLikFxSwOh-Kw1vVfI_WMaKSrhE_enA4xmmSXJZieVuUrAFVQU1n86wR3MegbIG9HVLirn-RDLmWQSd64jx_LMNY_NT-ozS14cbXiFi7ERzRajE1hU_BJqcO4D2udKmBY2m7XVCj-y_gjRGB0564brsxKdUb51ZMd0TxMAp6wFE5XvR-BIjxblgHliaL2MPhyNsORi5i-NzsAKJ5Z3VTRbwFK-J0_qSxHzXegvgSFgT_JpBs8JZ2rt3CgSa1yTG80hy1INtjf431cWfqHANkkyCCe5J03z_4NsqE3ldTPm6SyL3GeyDZrEJHOU37OM5tnad8qBM12MKmXji0W_jEfXCWSqm7rfTdqJMOEnt8-hUMkaga3E80PJ6T0T9ZuIWH8GrVnn2yUVSDVY2AdstMZoXSDcjiBrzjU1NEpEhwlUV9gSnkdifA_RldjV6GyAK7iH7786pHxnSmJUkRL5mGzntVMpbgrN38eV_O6m1_aj1ieuNw8oTMJ6_Egg5GjH0PpihBxGVbUgtma8NVI7_vaHyAPm7T8fmxFyKce76cIhNdr4HNGgwA7d3yb74rL8pVi98n06DWbBULaF0H77UuKkBqrjuzY4ttlZ4H6ZTYwq9RLFzZe3jPRPhX1wsrUk0TZYuEWp9hG5uTte48d/A5uATXKb6J1STPhbo5_5JHr788mT86wv/14) It grants Coloradans the right to know when AI impacts them, demands corporate transparency, and safeguards against bias and abuse. It’s a groundbreaking step to keep people, not profit, at the center of technological progress. **We will be updating this policy in the 2026 legislative session to better define key terms and shift liability so that AI developers share responsibility, not just those who use it.** AI can be powerful, from banking to public safety, but it poses risks like scams, disinformation, and systemic vulnerabilities, which can be devastating. As I run for Colorado’s next State Treasurer, this issue is urgent. We need someone with the knowledge and the courage to stand up to powerful interests and keep Coloradans safe. clean_body: Peter, I helped write and pass the Colorado AI Act, the first AI regulation law in the nation. | | | Peter, I helped write and pass the Colorado AI Act, the first AI regulation law in the nation. It grants Coloradans the right to know when AI impacts them, demands corporate transparency, and safeguards against bias and abuse. It’s a groundbreaking step to keep people, not profit, at the center of technological progress. We will be updating this policy in the 2026 legislative session to better define key terms and shift liability so that AI developers share responsibility, not just those who use it. AI can be powerful, from banking to public safety, but it poses risks like scams, disinformation, and systemic vulnerabilities, which can be devastating. As I run for Colorado’s next State Treasurer, this issue is urgent. We need someone with the knowledge and the courage to stand up to powerful interests and keep Coloradans safe. The Treasurer protects taxpayer dollars, pensions, a investments, and must stand against cyber threats. I’ve proven I’m willing to take on the tough fights – even filibustering my own party when corporate lobbyists tried to gut our AI protections. As Treasurer, I’ll bring that same commitment to protecting your hard-earned money and ensuring Colorado’s future is secure. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **** ** ** ** ** ******************** **** Thank you for standing with me in this fight. –Brianna Fighting for working families, consumer protections, and small businesses in the House of Representatives has been the honor of Brianna's lifetime. Brianna is running to be your next Colorado State Treasurer to support small businesses, and fight hard to save hard-working Coloradans money. ****** Follow Brianna Online: ** Paid for by Brianna for Treasurer. Registered Agent Brianna Titone.

#
Peter —
A lot of people in politics think honesty is a risk or a liability.
But James knows it’s one of our movement’s greatest strengths. How can you ask people to support you if you refuse to be honest with them?
So here’s brutal honesty: Our fundraising has slowed down more than we expected. We thought by this point in October it would pick up a bit more, but it hasn’t.
So we’re coming to our top supporters like you to ask for help turning it around and keeping us on track to win.
We’re asking you to contribute $5. Yes, just $5.
$5 because lots of individuals contributing what they can is how we fund this campaign.
$5 because James is our best chance of flipping Texas and electing a new generation of leadership to the U.S. Senate.
$5 because taking back Texas from billionaire mega-donors and their puppet politicians requires all of us.
[**So please, contribute $5 or whatever you can today to help send James Talarico to the U.S. Senate. clean_body: There’s no time to waste, we need to make up the difference NOW! | Friend - I've been in some tough situations before, but this could be the hardest mountain I'll have to climb... While I was barred from accepting any campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session, my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was RAKING IN hundreds of thousands of dollars! I'm not kidding - a liberal group gave Spanberger $500K all in one go, Friend! This is a BAD situation that will only get worse if folks like you don't step up to the plate! I'm coming to you with a plea from the bottom of my heart; I'm doing everything I can to win this race, make history, and keep logging conservative wins. But I know I can't do this all on my own; it's going to take all of us, and I really mean all of us , to win. If you can't afford to send in even just $17, I'll understand. That's right - all I 'm asking is that you send in $17 or more to help me catch up with my Democrat opponent's LUDICROUS fundraising numbers! Look, this race is tied. The ONLY thing holding me and my team back from winning right now is my liberal opponent's crazy cash advantage. I know we can close the gap and win this race together, but we need to get to work RIGHT NOW! Thank you for being a critical part of my team, Friend. I can't tell you how much I appreciate your support. -Winsome Earle-Sears Mother Marine Lt. Governor of Virginia I’m Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. Team, Donald Trump is _attacking the First Amendment:_

He's threatened news networks like ABC and NBC for reporting accurately on his administration. He's sued news outlets like _The New York Times_ for reporting factually on him. He's pressured media companies to fire commentators he doesn't agree with, like Jimmy Kimmel and Rachel Maddow.

But while GOP leaders stay silent in the face of these threats to our freedom, **President Obama is SPEAKING OUT!**

We've launched a live petition to add our voices to his call and make an URGENT statement: **FREE SPEECH IS A RIGHT, AND __REPUBLICANS WON'T TAKE IT AWAY!__**

But according to our records, you haven't signed on! **Please, before our critical midnight deadline:**

name: LaMonica McIver
subject: Fighting Trump’s charges against me in court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Hi friends— Sara Jacobs here. I’ll be in New Jersey tomorrow to support my friend and colleague, Rep. LaMonica McIver, as she appears in court. Trump and his administration are following their playbook of targeting political “enemies” — LaMonica was simply doing her job, and is now facing baseless criminal charges. I hope you’ll read this critical update from her and consider chipping in to fund this fight [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-mciver] . —Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-mciver [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-mciver]
Friends,
Tomorrow, I appear in court to keep fighting the baseless charges brought against me by the Trump administration. This case is precedent-setting and it will shape the future of our democracy.
I am being targeted for doing my oversight work at an ICE facility. The Trump administration wants to punish political opponents and anyone who speaks up, silence dissent, drain me of my resources with an expensive legal battle, and put me in prison for up to 17 years. Even in the face of all this, I will not stop fighting.
Can I count on you to pitch in to me and Congresswoman Sara Jacobs to help fight back? We need your help to amass the resources to keep fighting this legal battle in court. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-mciver]
While I am not guilty of these charges, I am facing real prison time and a long, expensive court fight. What’s more, the outcome of this case will impact how public officials can be targeted by the administration. Mine is the first prosecution like this from the Trump administration, but we know it won’t be the last.
Tomorrow, we argue our motions to dismiss this case in court. I need you standing with me.
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split evenly between LaMonica McIver and Sara Jacobs:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-mciver?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-mciver?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-mciver?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-mciver]
The stakes couldn’t be higher: this case is about whether or not the Trump administration gets to silence the voices that challenge it.
I will not fold and I will keep standing up because our democracy is on the line.
This is a warning shot for more authoritarian action, and we can’t let them win.
They want to make an example out of me, but I refuse to back down.
Will you stand with me and Sara Jacobs by donating anything you can now to help keep my legal defense strong? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-mciver]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-mciver]
We’re not backing down,
LaMonica
Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
Sara Jacobs for Congress
PO Box 120085
San Diego, CA 92112
United States

name: Rob Bonta
subject: If Trump sends the National Guard to SF, we’ll sue.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25]
Friends, let me be clear about something:
If Donald Trump sends the National Guard into San Francisco, I will sue.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZpAIXeNpDkeFZJiGh-j1bw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZpAIXeNpDkeFZJiGh-j1bw2]
The National Guard cannot be federalized and deployed for civilian law enforcement on American soil. That’s unlawful under the Posse Comitatus Act — a bedrock law dating back to when the King of England tried to use his troops to control the American colonies.
But that’s exactly what Trump is trying to do in blue cities — and blue cities only! — in the United States of America.
He’s abusing his power, treating U.S. troops like pawns in his political games, and violating the law — over and over again.
We cannot and must not stand by. That’s why I’m preparing to take legal action the moment he breaks the law again — and I’ll need you with me.
No kings, no tyrants.
If you agree Trump cannot be allowed to unlawfully militarize our cities, add your name today. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZpAIXeNpDkeFZJiGh-j1bw2]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZpAIXeNpDkeFZJiGh-j1bw2]
In solidarity,
Rob
Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25]
To contribute via check, please address to:
Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815

name: Cori Bush
subject: NO KINGS. No Dictators. Just the People.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori For Us
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251020_nokings_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251020_nokings_act]
Peter,
This past Saturday, I spoke at No Kings Day . Because there is absolutely NO place for a self-imposed monarchy in our country.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251020_nokings_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251020_nokings_act]
We are witnessing the dangerous rise of authoritarianism in our country. Trump and his billionaire allies want to crown themselves rulers over our democracy, but the people of St. Louis know better.
We don’t bow to kings. We don’t answer to billionaires. We answer to each other.
As I shared with the crowd who braved the rain: this is nothing in comparison to the rain that we’ll have to live through if we don’t resist a Donald Trump Administration today. What our children and children’s children will have to endure if we don’t stand up and fight fascism.
Families are being squeezed from every side. Groceries, rent, and utility bills keep climbing while wages stay flat. Health care is broken, jobs are vanishing, and the same powerful few keep getting richer while our communities are left to struggle.
But let me tell you something about St. Louis: Our district doesn’t break, and we reject the Trump Administration’s authoritarianism and the rise of fascism.
When the government turns its back on us, we take care of each other. When a crisis hits, we rise together. When they try to ban books and deny our history, we come back with receipts. When they try to silence our voices, we get louder and stronger.
That’s what this campaign is about. It’s about the future of Missouri’s First. It’s about protecting our democracy, defending our communities, and proving that people power still wins over corporate greed.
I’m running to put an end to corporate interests – the same forces cashing in on Trump’s bid to rule like king and attempting to keep fighters like me out of Congress. These billionaires want to call the shots while your rent, groceries, and bills keep rising. That’s why I’m asking you to pitch in.
Your support fuels our grassroots movement, inspires me to fight for families, and keeps democracy in the hands of the people. Without it, they keep running our country, and life only gets harder.
If you believe in a country with NO KINGS yesterday, today, and tomorrow, chip in right now to stand with me in this fight >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251020_nokings_act]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251020_nokings_act]
Because in St. Louis, we don’t wait for permission to lead.
Let’s win this,
— Cori
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251020_nokings_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251020_nokings_act] Cori Bush is a pastor, nurse, survivor, and formerly unhoused single mother of two who knows what it means to struggle and what it means to rise .
As a Congresswoman, she has always shown up when it’s hardest: securing disaster relief, lowering insulin costs, and delivering millions for our communities.
Across St. Louis, families are being priced out and pushed out. Cori Bush is fighting back for affordable housing, fair wages, and utilities as a human right. Be part of this people-first movement. Join Team Cori today and sign up to volunteer. [https://www.coribush.org]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251020_nokings_act]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251020_nokings_act&recurring=1]
Paid for by Cori For Us
Cori For Us
PO Box 12404
St. Louis, MO 63132
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/W8UekF_Ks0eg_1uL1zIi9A2?unsubscribedata=TIc6EpCRmmqWj9JtE3s4GFhe87alc1cguS1Y3Q%2BJLiEZtP95fI3B1zybjKra5NaAsOj%2BC5mUpD8WRLpWsRbzTMU1c4yRXr6OrkO0QGI81m0Yl8odWopnB0NNTmN0smVAoALu%2FS3z4ZSvTw%2BqMWA32LzASbpN29paFjMLR01CmVjn0%2BLELAjxwS9yf3VhyTx0ArMnPloXG0o7ouOP7riL2PqT2711o24H3Z9HkYjrDZ74MN1Btk4x7E5z6Ie1wekCZrEBXGws7SzFe6sY84FsiWqECyfvCzpMTb3mAHRUwFAMEIaYyBGFcmtbgyyXe7Ftx6BCQyCFI9xKoDP4BswKhf2NMweO1Axdgo44BdjEVYQUORmGkcRkQUUBG9NezTn6BDYZOv41f3QqWcqdBf%2BTgMlFrVhW1J%2FRudOIbdYSZqwwNnzspXvmBzu3E63Z4iMq .

| Peter,

A federal judge just gave Donald Trump the go-ahead to send the National Guard into Portland.

**But Congresswoman Maxine Dexter, an Emerge alum, isn’t backing down.**

She’s joined peaceful protestors in her district to oppose the deployment and show the country what Portland really looks like — a city of people who take care of one another, not the violent image Trump is trying to create.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117659835/577209102/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-10-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdiMjJhYjA2LWZlYWQtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=54z09P9fcokg1ayypDcEoKXGUwpNRWOUqRGx-fof7hw=)
_Emerge alum Rep. Maxine Dexter joins peaceful protestors_

**That’s leadership.**

Congresswoman Dexter is showing exactly why Emerge exists. We are training Democratic women who will stand up to abuse of power and protect their communities.

If we flip the Governorship and expand our majority in the House of Delegates — and do it with record-shattering turnout — Virginia will send Trump and Congressional Republicans a message they can’t ignore. But frankly, Derek, we can’t stop there. Because next year, national Republicans are eyeing this seat, and if we lose it, we lose any shot at a Democratic majority in the Senate. My point is, we’ve got to earn every vote to keep Virginia blue and flip the Senate, and the country is watching to see if we’ve got what it takes. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = The fight continues, Mark Warner **= | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Jason Crow
subject: Paratroopers have a tradition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Folks,

Over my career, I’ve taken many oaths to protect our country and Constitution. Whether as a member of the Armed Forces or a member of Congress, I’ll always fight for our democracy.

As a paratrooper who led an infantry platoon in Iraq, I often think about the brave individuals who fought with me for our country. Paratroopers have a tradition — the leader of the unit jumps out of the plane first. Then others follow.

I’m ready to jump.

When I think of the best of America, I think of the paratroopers I served alongside. We were a multiracial and multiethnic group of soldiers — some from farms, others from cities, some from the east coast, others from the west coast, some who were raised in the north while others grew up in the south.

Yet despite our vastly different backgrounds, we served together, fought together, had each other's backs, and found great strength in each other as soldiers and as Americans.

We're strongest when we stand together. Over the weekend, millions of Americans gathered to protest the Trump administration's authoritarian agenda — a reminder that American democracy is not inevitable. It’s only as strong as the people willing to come together and stand up to fight for it.

Will you stand with me today by making a contribution to power this fight for our democracy? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-oct25?amount=]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Thank you,

Jason

clean_body: Election Day is approaching! | | | Join us Tonight, October 20th at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. It's our last call before this year's elections. We'll have special guests and opportunities to make a difference. Check out the link below for current and past endorsed candidates. | "Endorsed Candidates" Christian Fyke \- New Kensington Treasurer (Write In) \- Delaware County Controller \- Lower Macungie Township Commissioner \- Derry Township School Board Director \- Bucks County Sheriff \- Berks County Court of Common Pleas \- Adams County Court of Common Pleas \- Philadelphia District Attorney Forward on the Ballot Zachary Thompson \- Judge of Election Allegheny County Jessica Forsell \- Inspector of Election Bucks County Steven Goodsell \- Judge of Election Delaware County Eva McGowan \- Judge of Election Philadelphia County Click below to see more** Help support these events from our partner organizations. And Join in a conversation with other PA Forward Supporters on Slack! Now over 100 members. Pennsylvania Forward Party Copyright © 2025 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is: 1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ForwardParty.com

There are consequences to calling your political opponents Nazis, fascists, weird, and "a danger to Democracy." Sooner or later, people start to believe it, and then we can't even go to a farmer's market without threats of violence. Look at what's happened.
* _Two**assassination** attempts of President Trump_
* _Charlie Kirk**murdered** at a TPUSA free speech event_
* _New Mexico GOP headquarters**firebombed**_
* _**An arsonist set fire** to our Fond du Lac office_

I believe it's gone too far. [_**What about you?**_](http://links.arenawins.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=8b676bfcf99a4a80ba9fbfa4f5f90aa5&_e=rHjdLWzhEfKE9fIJMmvXxS0u7g65yyF9SuuPF5GsJFPnJTzC4PhGhIB2-emnlD5_hu67QNhrjhzhPHabpZEaOsozTFDKomiOxqrFEyRo5McInRWyKXse7xtiByAFT63O_UQZi2bbJDYwEX2cVVucsFE1d3_UPS51GGxPGP6aeTICXl6l36M-bvGBsZwORIHIWjRYpgY7JrDdIJKFyGPvm5vIuhL8T4fvduG0b5gkeFBipg9pDEOGXqbRK5xQzzX7MwlRFkh_ZxF7jpMoOc3o6DN1bju9n14f65e9FQOxBmrKJSUNxLQQ5-3GK-MkR7W2tX18MgCA9RW3wji4AhpJik8r6tKkd0w3WvMmScZUbBoy4HvIekVn1apQaY1KyIDBsXsDRkb7z-AfYxlkyBD40tk-TO1rS9Jn9GMawfPHaiPQ_NVNj790GWFcD3NJXjXdyN6zlLdipgb-BOIK-c7xv555gjtefDuFzOZWAzHw_XY1gxs_7eEm5c33HdAsy1XPUYrtjChkJI2Fem60OZGf_oHggoVBlFF3Oqc6uxs1ZW9f22JmnBuHOyQLgpmn7SL6UOqMJBEHfd1_8yYMipaW4rSG48lqkIWJfNy3iIiWpvI%3D) Thank you, Glenn Grothman

If Jones becomes AG, his focus won't be on fighting Virginia's legal battles — it'll be on fighting his own legal battles and going after his political opponents. While our families deal with MS-13 gangs and fentanyl dealers, Jones will be busy: ❌ Containing his own scandals and ethics investigations ❌ Filing political lawsuits to boost his national profile Jay Jones is a criminal-first, victim-last politician. name: Michael Bennet
subject: This past Saturday will go down in history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
Coloradans from 13 to 90 years old showed up for the No Kings rally in Aurora, Colorado – and stood up for our democracy when it needs us the most.
| | |
---
Friend, this past Saturday will go down in history.
Tens of thousands of Coloradans showed up for the No Kings rally in Aurora, Colorado and 50 towns and cities across our state – **and stood up for our democracy when it needs us the most.**
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117660656/577211984/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk977-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDEzYjJkMC0wMGFlLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1-7hN9jZ-24eNXwnQQqbuY_vl5D30crpC79ArcLhFd0=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117660657/577211985/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk977-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDEzYjJkMC0wMGFlLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1-7hN9jZ-24eNXwnQQqbuY_vl5D30crpC79ArcLhFd0=)
---
As Donald Trump and his administration:
* Deploy troops into American cities,
* Send masked agents into immigrant communities,
* Indict their political enemies,
* Drive our economy to the brink,
* Flout the rule of law, and
* Defy the authority of Congress and the courts,

We came together this weekend, alongside millions of our fellow Americans across the country, to say loud and clear and in one voice:** The President is NOT a king. **
Our young nation's history has always been a battle between humanity's worst impulses and its highest ideals. And at this pivotal moment, none of us can afford to give up, tune out, or waste away our days consuming cable news or social media.
To do so would dishonor the great Americans who gave their lives to abolish slavery, extend suffrage to women, put an end to segregation, and secure the blessings of liberty to ourselves and the generations who will follow us.
Our responsibility is to live up to their example. **And that is exactly what we did on Saturday – together.**
Together, we showed America that we don’t have to accept chaos and tyranny as our future.
Together, we are choosing hope over hatred, decency over domination, freedom over fearmongering.
**And together, I will ensure that Colorado continues to lead the nation in the fight against Trump, and for our democracy, as the governor of our great state **– so now, I must humbly ask for your support in this race.
**_[If you're in a position to chip in today, can I please count on you to contribute $5, or anything you can spare to my campaign? I've got to raise $20,000 by 11:59 p.m. tonight, and your support of any amount toward my campaign will make a world of difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117660658/577211986/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk977-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDEzYjJkMC0wMGFlLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1-7hN9jZ-24eNXwnQQqbuY_vl5D30crpC79ArcLhFd0=)_**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117660659/577211987/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk977-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDEzYjJkMC0wMGFlLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1-7hN9jZ-24eNXwnQQqbuY_vl5D30crpC79ArcLhFd0=)

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Their agenda is very different from mine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
I would never hold the government hostage to make health care less affordable
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117660660/577211990/666939643?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5620-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjEyYjJkMC0wMGFlLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f6b8qo3mst8-6YC0wS7mYLyKY6wOCoGLcVZfID6OyhM=)
Friend,
I'm motivated and guided by the Jewish principle of "tikkun olam” – which means to repair the world and leave it in a better place than how we found it.
That's why I first ran for office – becoming the only former synagogue president and only the third Jewish woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate.
That's why I've been working with Democrats and Republicans _all year_ to make sure that health care costs don't go up dramatically for millions of Americans.
**And that's why I would _never_ put politics over people and advocate to make health care less affordable.**
Unfortunately, Donald Trump and the GOP are guided by an agenda that benefits the wealthiest among us at the expense of hardworking families. That's why they've shut down instead of preventing a massive spike in health care costs.
**Friend, Democrats and I are here fighting for you. But for us to go back to making progress for all American families instead of just millionaires and billionaires, we MUST fight back against Donald Trump's agenda. That means taking back the Senate for Democrats.**
**[Can I count on you to chip in $5 or more now to make that possible? clean_body: I would never hold the government hostage to make health care less affordable | | | = Friend, I'm motivated and guided by the Jewish principle of "tikkun olam” – which means to repair the world and leave it in a better place than how we found it. That's why I first ran for office – becoming the only former synagogue president and only the third Jewish woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. That's why I've been working with Democrats and Republicans all year to make sure that health care costs don't go up dramatically for millions of Americans. And that's why I would never put politics over people and advocate to make health care less affordable. Unfortunately, Donald Trump and the GOP are guided by an agenda that benefits the wealthiest among us at the expense of hardworking families. That's why they've shut down instead of preventing a massive spike in health care costs. Friend, Democrats and I are here fighting for you. But for us to go back to making progress for all American families instead of just millionaires and billionaires, we MUST fight back against Donald Trump's agenda. That means taking back the Senate for Democrats. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, friend. Jacky | | = A note from Sen. Jacky Rosen: Friend, I'm fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But with Donald Trump in the White House and Republicans in control of both houses of Congress, I need your grassroots support to keep up the fights that matter most. Senate Democrats like me are the only thing standing in the way of Trump's extreme agenda that will hurt everyday Americans. That's why I need people like you on my side to help defend our progress and take back power from the GOP. = You can also =** to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive updates from my campaign. Thank you, Jacky By entering your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic text messages from Rosen for Nevada. Message and data rates may apply. Text STOP to quit or HELP for help._

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117660690/577212107/1219929396?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMyNTE1NGZhLTAwYWUtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W6lwqys6JSXN-ufWLZ4nwnOKxWxQ0UOYttVB_CTvtwo=) | Hey Peter, If Democrats want to win the House back, we have to do it the Blue Dog way by supporting common sense, community-rooted candidates who actually listen. [_**Here are 5 reasons we know it can be done and why you should donate today:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117660692/577212109/-313734161?&refcode=E15779-20251020-FiveReasons-SL-CampaignNews&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMyNTE1NGZhLTAwYWUtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W6lwqys6JSXN-ufWLZ4nwnOKxWxQ0UOYttVB_CTvtwo=) **1️⃣ We win where others can’t.**
Blue Dogs already hold seats in Trump-won districts — proof we can compete anywhere. **2️⃣ We work for working families.**
Our candidates are mechanics, waitresses, veterans, and small business owners who know what it means to work hard to make ends meet. **3️⃣ We speak to real people — not party insiders.**
It’s about putting place over politics and finding common ground solutions that voters actually care about. People are sick of the chaos, they just want us to get shit done. **4️⃣ Extremists fear us.**
GOP super PACs are spending millions to silence our voices because they know these races will decide control of Congress. **5️⃣ We’re powered by you.**
No dark money. Just thousands of grassroots supporters chipping in $5 or $25 at a time to fight for a better future. [_**That’s why your donation matters — especially right now, as we build the foundation to flip the House in 2026. [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20251020-1139&t=1001&akid=1140%2E251025%2EkGXUYY ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20251020-1139&t=1002&akid=1140%2E251025%2EkGXUYY ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

The last time I was in the U.S. Senate, I wasn’t running for office — I
was testifying.

[ Abdul ]Abdul speaking in the U.S. Senate

I spoke about how our healthcare system is designed to fail working
people.

How corporate greed has turned our bodies into profit centers.

How insurance companies and hospital chains drive up prices, forcing
people to ration insulin or skip cancer treatments because they can’t
afford the bills.

And I told everyone in that room what I’d learned firsthand — not just as
a doctor, but as a public servant:

I rebuilt Detroit’s Health Department after bankruptcy. Secured free
glasses for kids who needed them. Removed lead from schools. Took on
corporate polluters. Made life-saving Narcan universally available. And
led a program that will cancel up to $700 million in medical debt for
300,000 Michigan families.

Now, I’m running for the U.S. Senate to take that same fight to Washington
and continue building systems that serve people, not corporations.

Peter, I’m the
only candidate in this race fighting for Medicare for All. And I’m the
only candidate who’s never taken a dime from corporate PACs, so you know
exactly whose side I’m on. I am on yours.

This campaign isn’t about climbing a political ladder. It’s about fixing
the systems that are crushing working people while making the rich even
richer.

If you believe we deserve a government that fights for us, not insurance
companies or lobbyists, I’m asking you to join me.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251020-2-ak.GIhB5D&amount=10&refcode=em20251020-1139&t=1004&akid=1140%2E251025%2EkGXUYY ]Can you chip in $10 or any amount to help us win this
competitive primary?

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251020-2-ak.GIhB5D&amount=10&refcode=em20251020-1139&t=1023&akid=1140%2E251025%2EkGXUYY ]Donate $10 ››

Thank you,

Abdul

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: This is patriotism.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
They’re claiming the No Kings Rally is anti-American. They are wrong.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2683%2E4032634%2E5vkr2Q)
---
In the United States of America, **there are no kings.** And as much as Donald Trump wants to put on a shiny little crown and act like a monarch, he is not a king. And he will never be a king. Never. When you ask Republicans and Trump about this weekend, they claim a No Kings Rally is anti-American. They are wrong. Hundreds of thousands of people peacefully standing up for what they believe in – that’s deeply American. That is patriotism. Standing up to a wanna-be dictator — that’s patriotism. Protecting health care for millions of Americans — that’s patriotism. Defending federal workers who make our country run — that’s patriotism. Saying no to troops occupying our cities — that’s patriotism. Peacefully protesting to protect our democracy — that is patriotism. Look, I won’t sugarcoat it. This year has been hard. It’s been a nightmare. Donald Trump and Republicans are ripping health care away from millions of Americans. They’re playing a chaotic tariff game that is increasing the cost of everything from groceries to housing to cars. They’re sending troops to invade our cities. Our own military in American cities is threatening our people. They’re canceling funding that Congress already approved. They are breaking the law. Republicans in Congress have the power to put a stop to this. It would take only a handful to vote with the Democrats and say that Donald Trump has to follow the law. But it seems like the Republicans in Congress have all had their spines removed. All these Republicans can do is bend the knee to Donald Trump. **All this time, Trump thought that doing one terrible thing after another would scare us, confuse us, make us curl up into a little ball and want to give up.** **He is wrong. The American people do not bow down to kings. We organize. We march. We stand up. And we do not back down.** At No Kings rallies across the country, Americans proved this weekend that when we lift our voices and engage in peaceful protest, the people hold the power. We’re showing Donald Trump and these spineless Republicans what democracy looks like. To every person who attended a rally: you give me hope. And to every single one of you out there, wondering if things will get better: Don’t give up the fight. Don’t lose this fire. Because we need it now more than ever. This fight will be long, but this fight is important. Today and every day, we persist. — Elizabeth

---
| | | |
---

---

body:
7 million people showed up nationwide to protest the Trump regime.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117660906/577212925/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_251020Kings_SB_90DO_6_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWM0MzkzNS0wMmFlLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=29jyeM63x1-mqBVSgV1HUo1zjdTjXee-QtmHE5CpqcA=) Peter,

This weekend marked another historic **No Kings Protest**, where nearly **7 million people nationwide,** including thousands at the Cleveland rally, showed up to make their voices heard against the Trump regime.

I am so grateful to everyone who turned out to exercise their First Amendment rights. Together, we are standing up against tyranny – against a man who places his own interests, his MAGA allies, and billionaires above the well-being and will of the people. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117660907/577212926/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_251020Kings_SB_90DO_6_NG_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWM0MzkzNS0wMmFlLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=29jyeM63x1-mqBVSgV1HUo1zjdTjXee-QtmHE5CpqcA=) This weekend, people showed up to make this clear: Our country does **NOT** belong to one man. It does **NOT** belong to one party. And it does **NOT** belong to billionaires and bullies.

**It belongs to _WE_ the people.**

Standing alongside my fellow Ohioans, we sent a clear message that we are not going to sit idly by as Trump chips away at the fabric of our nation. Why? Because we have the power – People power.

[**Let’s keep the momentum going: Please contribute $5 and help me continue the work to hold Republicans in Congress accountable for being complacent to Trump’s reign of chaos.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117660908/577212927/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_251020Kings_SB_90DO_6_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWM0MzkzNS0wMmFlLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=29jyeM63x1-mqBVSgV1HUo1zjdTjXee-QtmHE5CpqcA=)

Together,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?

Together, we are standing up against tyranny – against a man who places his own interests, his MAGA allies, and billionaires above the well-being and will of the people. = This weekend, people showed up to make this clear: Our country does NOT belong to one man. It does NOT belong to one party. And it does NOT belong to billionaires and bullies. It belongs to WE the people. Standing alongside my fellow Ohioans, we sent a clear message that we are not going to sit idly by as Trump chips away at the fabric of our nation. Why? Because we have the power – People power. = Together, Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need? ******=****** Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress 545 E Town Street Columbus, OH 43215 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Team Lizzie
subject: Important Election Info + Volunteer Reminders
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
First, some good news!
This past Saturday, more than 7 million Americans came together at more than 2,700 “No Kings” rallies across all 50 states and the District of Columbia, as well as cities around the world, in the largest day of peaceful protest in our country’s history. What a beautiful way to celebrate the United States of America and remind the world that we believe in democracy, not kings .
Speaking of democracy, Election Day is two weeks from tomorrow! Here is more information for you to know:
🗳️ Important Election Information
Today, October 20, marks the first day of early voting here in Texas.
Every Texan will be asked to vote on important amendments to the Texas Constitution, and many will have local races on the ballot, too. These elections may not get as much attention—but they shape our schools, our communities, and our future.
Make your plan to vote:
* Early In-Person Voting Begins: TODAY, October 20
* Last Day to Apply for a Mail Ballot: Friday, October 24 (must be received , not postmarked) * Harris County mail ballot information [https://www.harrisvotes.com/Voter/Vote-by-Mail]
* Fort Bend County mail ballot information [https://www.fortbendcountytx.gov/government/departments/elections-voter-registration/vote-by/mail-in-ballot]

* Last Day of Early Voting: Friday, October 31
✅ Find all the information you need here:
👉 Texas Secretary of State – Elections Division [https://www.sos.state.tx.us/elections/index.shtml]
📞 Volunteer Reminders
We have two important virtual phonebank opportunities this week and next. Join Team Lizzie to help elect strong Democratic governors who will stand up for democracy:
* Abigail Spanberger — Tuesday, October 22 @ 5 P.M. CT
( Abigail is the only Democrat in the country who can flip a governor’s seat blue this year! )
https://www.mobilize.us/spanbergerforgovernor/event/861456/ [https://www.mobilize.us/spanbergerforgovernor/event/861456/]
* Mikie Sherrill — Wednesday, October 29 @ 4 P.M. CT
( Polls show this race is neck-and-neck, and we can help push Mikie across the finish line! )
https://www.mobilize.us/njvictory2025/event/862476/ [https://www.mobilize.us/njvictory2025/event/862476/]
Electing strong Democratic governors is one of the most powerful ways we can help stop President Trump and his administration’s authoritarian takeover of our government. With just 15 days until Election Day and voters already casting ballots, this is a critical moment to act.
Can’t volunteer right now? You can still make a difference:
* Forward this email to friends who might be able to volunteer—these phonebanks are virtual and can be done from anywhere
* Make a financial contribution [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folfe251020?refcode=folfe251020] to our campaign—it is an investment in organizing in 2025 and winning in 2026, in Texas and across the country.
Together, we’ll keep fighting for democracy, for Texas, and for our future.
Team Lizzie

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folfe251020?refcode=folfe251020]

VOLUNTEER [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ln8e8kjn2Euuh3daVlmozQ2]
3262 Westheimer, PMB 636, Houston, TX 77098
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Don't want to receive these emails anymore? unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/yiT4vmtXrUCBvy-D5k60rg2?unsubscribedata=hwJSDKb5xEiGV4nVxTwlWp5vnwzq6BwWoyk4ZheT0t%2Bltsm%2FiQrua2ShBT3%2BA5pfidsXIuiDNcKRxB6JummXvAKoXWz7qpyYQv8oh48%2FWMGNPhQ5C4ayhaowQywiShfeaYKgqoif648TZMO6g01V2aH44oRg94h%2FVduB9fOkbeU6GInwTL4UnNMaSveqJ6iIwEvRVg%2F2U9oiCauk%2BaXhmJjPy0CLrgzn0UG1Bfg4NQWeEFAoTmD4kuX4YOHe5Xz%2BEeUmGMGwZU2pIUUHdfzmhqyUA42NzeqXD6PWVeWXjR5N90N216sRphl1MOoI%2BKaFeUrUgMzNqT6pVaxZLCRbk5%2F37dAxyx8obZFLz3Yv4UsYmcK7U4x5YEf5GSo2g1RF0pvPFEUn2jAIcPLnHaasmcuF9xvt1oLSM6pMSpFJ4viSG12L3R4lDnDW%2FBLN5WZH www.lizziefletcher.com [https://lizziefletcher.com/]

Patriot,

When I first met Charlie Kirk, it was instantly clear to me that he was destined to do great things.

We became fast friends.

---
[ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b155dae5986a4f0292a74d4b8ea0ca44&_e=4oFEekP2Pk4aB-Pv9GA6JokA6mmWr5GaJAOVnyPXjbV2XQg6tK28wfF-OA-LniYCRT4NTFwtGiuZJtU2obk9bZFVp14WcuZnDG-hkkK_U-YwAOUDOHcAkUyHYeKiPhZlY_h4AeB3kEfOXfAaRpvStWWGsa2sV-fSLz2uiL7gA61Y9gg8RqgUBRSob1yywszKtwl-mLTm6pNdKrV3Uu0GOh5M3k8dYHx03p3lSrlGK4kkBMPqY5fjYQ84jFz5D1HsKpCZbeXa1UELgQMXLizeJ8G5LicJv175IWpY0zGOp5fRpPh53Z1c2qHlnZxmCqf9hC1O4QiL_S_NjTU7e5HAHbLVAj_9yuXQRaXYHlXizUVJ8oLVzkxDJ2yDAHalvwAP7tgsVxF8oK-E7kh8xMEiR3pst5L5qCFyS2hQgzOyuopnuXFFt3n4XVZTKHbjtwuz793HsgTJSyCfaM4j2lTJISZ36c-v1625ymOo_n3BAMl31Vy2n0WRIf-AGdCf9ADzTCIbGuXZwyxVIc9w0qbgca-mD4a-LNVzqbsebcF8SjnGSy6e9Ic7eh9w_SSfOh6g4_99K3Z8WWdPwUnZOrpavJpOLOZV4elmM4wnBX28gKc%3D)
---

Turning Point USA was still in its infancy, but there was no doubt in my mind that, with Charlie's indomitable spirit and vision, Turning Point would transform the conservative movement and the country as a whole.

Fast forward 11 years, and the political landscape has, indeed, changed, thanks to Charlie's bold leadership.

In 2024, Charlie won the youth vote for President Trump... an unprecedented accomplishment.

**It 's been one month since Charlie Kirk's assassination.**

And, while no one can truly replace him, I know -- without a shadow of a doubt -- that he would want us to continue the fight for the heart and soul of America in his stead.

And that's exactly what I plan to do... win for Charlie.

At Turning Point PAC, we have not lost sight of **Charlie 's big picture vision to Build the RED WALL**, starting with state and local races in Arizona, New Hampshire, and Nevada, the three battleground states where _conservatives outnumber Democrats_.

By focusing on these states, we can build an impenetrable Red Wall that will destroy the Democrats' plans and pave the way to victory for America First candidates in 2026, 2028, and beyond.

Every seat won -- up and down the ballot -- is a victory that will reap long-term dividends.

**So, today I ask:** _Will you help me carry the torch for Charlie?_

[ Please donate whatever you can generously afford today to WIN in key battleground states. We will stand FEARLESS, like Charlie did, in defense of what we know is RIGHT! >> ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b155dae5986a4f0292a74d4b8ea0ca44&_e=4oFEekP2Pk4aB-Pv9GA6JokA6mmWr5GaJAOVnyPXjbV2XQg6tK28wfF-OA-LniYCRT4NTFwtGiuZJtU2obk9bZFVp14WcuZnDG-hkkK_U-YwAOUDOHcAkUyHYeKiPhZlY_h4AeB3kEfOXfAaRpvStWIEBLxAcqUX9GLJBOJyGtMiFfQa6IusfgQHTgsPaIrjXkMA4BkojAncEVt1mpbBmq5zQ-uqhZatoc3KhZplAoeREE_dSHXRiwFJcTGdE_IwtgVvpsSKup9EdvsQDl_3uO3SShN_5_41vnzNRywWMlNhJ88AnlHSwkjK3RjvBKJw6kA5LFUTIpB9FB35uHU89ZKKIJ_Zkyt_hk16Li3XAbdphhkv1S5QocG8Iq3xrQpdufJWAi_YqKlyzuPZPppnn1_Ndp6LsR5LaC0-LRUUQBe4UL7g7EMgl4NsqTgYhR19uUQMZmFl6k_oFWurPTJy8qw2ajMphD7kkc4SF79G9IhyVN8ZiaEVx2lNJ_RR1tNFi7LdTGJIFjiHj71LuBO6KabqnsSGmQYdyiQBgHxvQOz8i1_Ro1z1pIOCXDrQymlSwTb9o84YZDpz1DNKSjAImERWYe_UWTtA9kse-14yAxQ%3D)

**Tyler Bowyer**

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.'s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee's name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Growing up, Chris always knew she wanted to become a lawyer.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251020-717&t=1&akid=730%2E294397%2EgN00Vc)
Growing up, Chris always knew she wanted to become a lawyer. That’s because she saw how the law could protect people.

That goal carried her from small Wisconsin courtrooms to the State Assembly, where she stood up for working people, reproductive freedom, and our rights.
Now, Chris is a judge on the Wisconsin Court of Appeals — following in the footsteps of women she’s long admired, like Justice Shirley Abrahamson and Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg — ensuring everyone who enters her courtroom gets a fair shot.
**And with your support, Judge Chris Taylor will bring that same fairness and integrity to Wisconsin’s highest court.**
That’s what sets Chris apart from her extreme opponent, Maria Lazar, who’s sided again and again with right-wing special interests trying to roll back our freedoms.
We can defeat Lazar and elect Judge Chris Taylor to the Wisconsin Supreme Court, but only if we do it together.

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---
