Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

Ready Now. | | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. Sharice has heard so many kind words of support and encouragement from folks not only here in Kansas, but all across the country.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117661497/577214966/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDYzODU5Ny0wNGFlLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ANILX38aEL_srxhtfEAgksgPa5Ug6_hC9As5ob6KFzs=) Hey, we wanted to keep you in the loop: Ever since Kansas GOP leadership officially kicked their gerrymandering push into high gear, Sharice has heard so many kind words of support and encouragement from folks not only here in Kansas, but all across the country. **And thanks to that support, National Republicans are in for a fight they _never_ expected.** Look, Donald Trump is sweating it out right now. He genuinely doesn’t know if his gerrymandering push will succeed — all because folks like you have stood up, spoken out, and turned up the heat on Kansas Republicans. But right now, we’re approaching the endgame. The moment in time where every supporter and every move makes a difference. This whole year, my opponent has spent more time groveling for Trump's endorsement than standing up for Virginia.
In fact, Winsome admits that she met privately with Trump to plead for his support.
This came at a time when the President was firing thousands of federal workers, driving up prices, and planning to cut funding for healthcare and public schools — actions which have devastated Virginia's economy and threatened the livelihoods of so many.
It's clear that Winsome places her loyalty to Trump above everything else.
_Now, I'm using every tool at my disposal to make sure voters know the truth about Winsome._ But we're in the heart of early voting now, and sharing our message on TV, at the doors, and over the internet is so incredibly expensive.
_So, can I count on your support today, Peter?_
**[If you've been waiting for the moment when you can have the greatest impact on our campaign for Governor, this is it. Please use this link right now to make your split donation →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117661571/577215243/-1702089990?&refcode=E15759-20251020-TrumpEndorsement-SL-SplitSend&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjI3YTJlOC0wNGFlLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wugR1SteB411SHQJkOnS4_HjjvT6OGn8KX_01p-uw7U=) **

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is so good
body:
[Unsubscribe](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xul=zkl8p045sz1uh88qpcsbcn9r1y4i2bbfufcnz4s1jp8brimrc0045m0un4pcu5i4i7lhih1u5zmp5p3cni8mk0zoyokrqafo19yek1p2w2sps&__stmp=t4gc7m&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *

| | | | [](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gc7m&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gc7m&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gc7m&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gc7m&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gc7m&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gc7m&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gc7m&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gc7m&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gc7m&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gc7m&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=1wduekwl7wu17qg7s82qackpxelhwirtycbv5os1pnvhi1cym6wyae8kvqx6hfarqtdncfly9g62ekps754vfpvrml0cdy25zidsek1k2xzsbrcdnx06xu56ocr5jc31677nwss4mc4o4fbu&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gc7m&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gc7m&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is so good
body:
[unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xiau9slbgewys7i8hlmbqqyk3far93543ynkjl1z5gbblz7aj1paovf43tvpuudbz0rd1ftnl76p068gqlyobwjsfo&__stmp=t4gc9b&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *
| | | | [](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gc9b&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gc9b&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gc9b&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gc9b&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gc9b&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gc9b&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gc9b&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gc9b&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gc9b&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gc9b&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=edb8w7bac24vef7v2bcs5iy6gwg9ann5ffa6rrk2qiov7ixqij4ay45lv4zb4cn4kyu19c2llaopsmqkn49tfwf6aeigx7zsltasuoq4mjroc6648wk5vxhs9xspfh6yvxe6hfkx2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gc9b&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gc9b&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

clean_body: Your 2025 voter record is still incomplete. Fix it before it’s too late. | I'll shoot straight with you , Fellow American. We're building for 2026, and we need to bolster our conservative America First majority in the Senate, and my father, President Donald J. Trump, is counting on us to deliver. But I just got some troubling news: Our 2025 NRSC voter records are still incomplete in critical to protecting our Senate majority. We can't afford to leave any data on the table while the radical left is mounting a comeback for their complete and total socialist takeover of the federal government. I'm asking you personally, Fellow American: Nothing keeps me up at night more than the thought of Chuck Schumer and Democrats running the Senate again. Let's make sure that doesn't happen by completing your profile in the next 30 minutes. Thanks, Donald Trump Jr. If you want to help Republicans KEEP THE SENATE MAJORITY, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: No fake urgency
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=868%2E181023%2ENcL6QI)
Hey —
I bet you’re getting a ton of fundraising emails and texts that claim the sky is falling and the only way to save our democracy is by chipping in right this second. Trust me, I get them too — and I am not a fan.
You won’t get that type of exaggerated urgency from me. We’re focused on the _real_ stakes of this race.
**There is no doubt about it:** The 2026 election for Michigan’s next governor is going to be close.
We’ve got a long road ahead of us and a lot of work to do to ensure our victory. I’m running against well-funded opponents who are losing to me in the polls but still pulling out all the stops and bullying tactics with wealthy, deep-pocketed special interests to get ahead.
We are building a campaign that is ready for whatever our opponents throw at us. Because Michigan’s future matters. And we’re here to win.
But here’s the truth: We’re nearing a __very real__ and __very important__ fundraising filing deadline **tonight at midnight**. The most important one in this entire campaign. Filing a strong report is the best way to signal to our opponents and their wealthy allies that we will fight and win this race.
**[But I can’t do it without you. Now that you know what we’re fighting, I’m asking: Can you donate $5 or more to support my campaign for Governor? clean_body: Hey — I bet you’re getting a ton of fundraising emails and texts that claim the sky is falling and the only way to save our democracy is by chipping in right this second. Trust me, I get them too — and I am not a fan. You won’t get that type of exaggerated urgency from me. We’re focused on the real stakes of this race. There is no doubt about it: The 2026 election for Michigan’s next governor is going to be close. We’ve got a long road ahead of us and a lot of work to do to ensure our victory. I’m running against well-funded opponents who are losing to me in the polls but still pulling out all the stops and bullying tactics with wealthy, deep-pocketed special interests to get ahead. We are building a campaign that is ready for whatever our opponents throw at us. Because Michigan’s future matters. And we’re here to win. But here’s the truth: We’re nearing a very real and very important fundraising filing deadline tonight at midnight. The most important one in this entire campaign. Filing a strong report is the best way to signal to our opponents and their wealthy allies that we will fight and win this race. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | Let’s go, Jocelyn

name: Seth Moulton
subject: We don’t bow to kings, or cowards.
body:
| |
---
Hi friend, Over the weekend, millions of Americans — from Boston to LA — took to the streets for No Kings Day. We stood together to say what we in Massachusetts have always known:

**👉 In this nation, there are no kings, no crowns, and no one is above the law.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117661778/577216000/2090747700?refcode=251020_sm_nokings_img1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjczZWZkNi0wNWFlLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=30gv5ctWCqBnWUV8gf8jnNEuuKLv3L_EvlgFUQ4IbHg=) Donald Trump wants to rewrite what freedom means. He demands obedience instead of service, chaos instead of courage, and hate instead of progress. He wants to rule by fear, dividing us by race, class, and by who we love.

But this past weekend, Americans made something clear: **we will not be ruled by fear.** We will stand up, speak up and defend democracy, together.**** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117661779/577216001/2090747700?refcode=251020_sm_nokings_img2&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjczZWZkNi0wNWFlLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=30gv5ctWCqBnWUV8gf8jnNEuuKLv3L_EvlgFUQ4IbHg=)** This moment demands more than loyalty to a party, it demands the courage to stand up when something’s wrong, even when it’s hard. That’s what I’ve always tried to do: to tell the truth, to challenge the status quo, and to fight for what’s right. ****[If you’re ready to stand up, too, chip in today to help us keep fighting for a country that answers to no one but the people.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117661780/577216002/2090747700?refcode=251020_sm_nokings_l1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjczZWZkNi0wNWFlLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=30gv5ctWCqBnWUV8gf8jnNEuuKLv3L_EvlgFUQ4IbHg=)**** | **[Contribute now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117661781/577216003/1375639745?refcode=251020_sm_nokings_b1&amount=5&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjczZWZkNi0wNWFlLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=30gv5ctWCqBnWUV8gf8jnNEuuKLv3L_EvlgFUQ4IbHg=)**
---
Thanks for being in this fight,
Seth
| | |
---|---|---

### About Seth Moulton
Seth Moulton is a father, a husband, a Marine, and a Democrat with a mission to bring a new generation of leaders to Congress. He is the proud father of two girls, Emmy and Caroline, and husband to his wife, Liz. They live in Salem, Massachusetts. | [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117661782/577216004/1375639745?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=9b73efd6-05ae-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjczZWZkNi0wNWFlLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=30gv5ctWCqBnWUV8gf8jnNEuuKLv3L_EvlgFUQ4IbHg=) | [Give Monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117661783/577216005/1375639745?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=9b73efd6-05ae-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjczZWZkNi0wNWFlLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=30gv5ctWCqBnWUV8gf8jnNEuuKLv3L_EvlgFUQ4IbHg=)

name: VoteVets.org
subject: What your first donation of $5 can do
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We spent years preparing for this — and now, when it really matters, we’re one of the only organizations in politics positioned well enough to combat Donald Trump, his administration, and MAGA nationwide.
#
Peter — it isn’t every day you can make a small but significant choice that has impacts far greater than you might expect.
But today, you have that chance.
We’re asking you to make a donation to VoteVets, and we’re asking because this moment is unlike any other in the history of our organization.
A lot of people never thought they’d see a day when the Secretary of Defense would kick the press out of the Pentagon while carrying out unauthorized strikes in the Caribbean and overseeing the deployment of American Troops on American streets.
A lot of people... but not us.
We spent years preparing for this — and now, when it really matters, we’re one of the only organizations in politics positioned well enough to combat Donald Trump, his administration, and MAGA nationwide. A lot of other teams are only just getting started. **We’ve been going all year long.**
So that first donation isn’t going into something that’ll take months, maybe even years to bear fruit. It’s going into programs we are carrying out now — campaigns to win elections, to support partners in fights at the state level, to mobilize in Washington and everywhere decisions are being made.
If any of that sounds worth $5 to you, please:
[**Use this link and make that donation right away. Our fundraising has fallen off over the last few weeks, and we need to get back on track to continue this important work.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct25.PLXLty&refcode=em251020-1-120&t=1&akid=34711%2E3013755%2EdkGHb_)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CHIP IN $5](https://act.votevets.org/go/2933?c0=vv-pac-em-oct25.8yJdig&amount=5&refcode=em251020-1-120&t=2&akid=34711%2E3013755%2EdkGHb_)**
---
****
| **[CHIP IN MORE](https://act.votevets.org/go/2933?c0=vv-pac-em-oct25.8yJdig&refcode=em251020-1-120&t=3&akid=34711%2E3013755%2EdkGHb_)**
---
****
Thank you.
The team at VoteVets

PolitiBrawl editor Matt Miller interviewed "No Kings" protesters in Washington D.C. on Saturday, **[resulting in an explosive scene](https://substack.com/redirect/6c35a300-6b1a-407c-a8cd-3f0e0af9368d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** when Miller mentioned illegal immigrant welfare recipient rates and Biden's wide-open border.
"That's disrespectful!!! You know what you are doing!"
**[Watch the tense situation go from calm to chaos in a matter of minutes:](https://substack.com/redirect/6c35a300-6b1a-407c-a8cd-3f0e0af9368d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/6c35a300-6b1a-407c-a8cd-3f0e0af9368d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/6c35a300-6b1a-407c-a8cd-3f0e0af9368d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
### _More from the "No Kings" protest in DC:_
# **" No Kings" FACT CHECKED on the spot after claiming LA riots didn't happen?!**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d688f895-5b54-4e4e-90ae-f33708ea96a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/d688f895-5b54-4e4e-90ae-f33708ea96a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Together with Natural Health Response](https://substack.com/redirect/99335152-f124-4e05-b9eb-665b6214f58b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[RFK Jr to be fired?](https://substack.com/redirect/99335152-f124-4e05-b9eb-665b6214f58b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/99335152-f124-4e05-b9eb-665b6214f58b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear good American,
On October 7, six former US Surgeon Generals published a letter trying to get **[RFK Jr.](https://substack.com/redirect/99335152-f124-4e05-b9eb-665b6214f58b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** fired.
But I noticed something very interesting...
Most of them have direct ties to the $1.7 TRILLION pharmaceutical industry.
_David Satcher served on the board of directors for Johnson & Johnson...
Jerome Adams serves on the board of directors for Atea Pharmaceuticals...
Richard Carmona served on the board of directors for McKesson...
Vivek Murthy founded a company to bring new drugs to market faster..._

It makes you wonder... What are they all so darn worried about?

Is it because **[you might find out about THIS?](https://substack.com/redirect/99335152-f124-4e05-b9eb-665b6214f58b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/99335152-f124-4e05-b9eb-665b6214f58b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. Before the Deep State's smear campaign works, **[see RFK Jr's warning [HERE] of a new hidden epidemic.](https://substack.com/redirect/99335152-f124-4e05-b9eb-665b6214f58b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* * *
# **Trump gives blunt message to Australian ambassador who attacked him in the past: "I don't like you..."**
President Donald Trump directly confronted Australian Ambassador Kevin Rudd during a meeting with Prime Minister Anthony Albanese after being asked about the ambassador's previous critical comments, telling Rudd "I don't like you either. And I probably never will."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/53cd4f76-03b0-4817-b58c-930af823989f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Ambassador 's past social media criticism revealed:** Rudd had previously called Trump a "traitor to the West" and the "most destructive president in history" on social media in 2020 before taking his diplomatic position, though he has since deleted those posts.
* **Trump praises Australian prime minister despite tension:** Despite the awkward exchange with the ambassador and Albanese's left-leaning administration, Trump offered friendly words about the prime minister, saying "I think he's doing a really good job, and we've had a very good relationship."

* * *
# **Secret Service discovers hunting stand near Trump 's Air Force One landing zone with clear line of sight**
The U.S. Secret Service found **[an elevated tree stand with a clear view](https://substack.com/redirect/ad37228b-a2de-475a-9592-07f1317e60eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** of the area where President Donald Trump routinely disembarks from Air Force One at Palm Beach International Airport, located approximately 200 yards away in the median of a major highway.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ad37228b-a2de-475a-9592-07f1317e60eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **No individuals present during discovery:** USSS chief of communications Anthony Guglielmi confirmed there was no one in the vicinity when the stand was discovered Thursday during preparations for Trump's arrival, stating there was "no impact to any movements" and praising the effectiveness of their "layered security measures."
* **FBI takes investigatory lead:** FBI Director Kash Patel confirmed the Bureau is investigating the incident, with resources deployed to collect evidence from the scene and utilizing cell phone analytics capabilities, though the stand has not yet been linked to any potential suspects.
* **Latest threat follows previous assassination attempts:** The discovery marks another potential threat against Trump, who survived a July 2024 shooting at a Butler, Pennsylvania rally that killed one person and wounded two others, and a separate assassination attempt in Florida by Ryan Routh, who was recently convicted on federal charges.

* * *
# **" No Kings" protester who mocked Charlie Kirk's shooting identified as elementary school teacher**
Lucy Martinez, an elementary school teacher at Nathan Hale Elementary School in Chicago, **[was identified as a woman making a gun gesture at her neck during a"No Kings" protest](https://substack.com/redirect/478d0694-4295-44a7-bf9c-19916c80083f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** when a counter-protester drove by waving a flag calling the late Charlie Kirk a "hero," the NY Post reports.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/478d0694-4295-44a7-bf9c-19916c80083f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **School district issues vague response:** Chicago Public Schools released a statement saying it "remains committed to creating and maintaining a welcoming, safe and inclusive teaching and learning environment" but declined to comment on whether Martinez was fired or faced disciplinary action, with the school's website taken down after the incident surfaced online.
* **Video sparks widespread outrage:** The viral video led to intense backlash on social media, with critics questioning why someone celebrating an assassination would be trusted to teach children and calling Martinez "the perfect face of the 'No Kings' movement -- a movement that preaches 'love' but celebrates death."

* * *

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is moving
body:
[unsubscribe](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166jo1opkmvmi0s0wjmici8oj9ykf0e4rrpt4fsij0wcmoj86hhg7321sjwakh875grbeo9x5l1yx0z0ef9565l&__stmp=t4gcq1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *
| | | | [](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gcq1&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gcq1&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gcq1&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gcq1&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gcq1&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gcq1&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gcq1&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gcq1&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gcq1&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gcq1&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=qwikcdl711u83ezcuplofnqn7a6nsq1ew53szg6ujzq8yfhybng6tt2af538bgqdpugkpimw39gwonqkz62lwndt9r65kcc69mylco1jnldocs8pir96qma4okx2ye0u25o&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gcq1&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gcq1&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Unsubscribe](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166jo1opkmvmi0s0wjmici8oj9ykf0e4rrpt4fsij0wcmoj86hhg7321sjwakh875grbeo9x5l1yx0z0ef9565l&__stmp=t4gcq1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=11qfvsq9v6w2kz94ajmzn7z7hfziqouyhvid40ix03aknnovgy9for11dbws3yp71hw2x1souq0f5cfna5jkswqq82a523aw3tvixnxt1ypxdi4tw7cye0z10rt1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gcq1&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=ukxuchlat4klrzovhbccp9k90d9x0b245u2w1q8nqrd0bzpomvpvgg7j6kd2p46byefh9c0h0nut3xduvwv1walll3pfgdvngo97fwvwsumk42t9hkip9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gcq1&__onlt=h)

Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... But now? These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie. Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all. He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... It's happening. Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. Again, Friend, God is so good. Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, "What can I do?" As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including: ✅ Leadership materials ✅ Pocket Constitutions ✅ Chapter training tools ✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... this won't be a small task. But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. For Charlie. And here's how YOU can help with this... Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter... How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started? Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... This is it**. Also... Here's one more powerful thing you can do: 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... Please send them this link: Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... Thank you. We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. God is so good. For Charlie, -The Turning Point USA Family P.S. Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, we're grateful. But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter. Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. God is so good. 🙏 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 / / MATERIAL RELATIONSHIP NOTICE: Presume the sender of this email has an affiliate or other material connection with the entities or individuals mentioned and may receive compensation for purchases made through related websites. name: Wes Moore
subject: All to benefit the megawealthy
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=785%2E1086043%2EGwNmnS)
The federal government shutdown is stretching into its third week. Trump can’t close a deal. And he does not even care to.
_In fact, it is starting to seem like he’d rather let the American people suffer than do his job._
If you have a moment, let me break down just what this means for Marylanders.
**FIRST:** Hundreds of thousands of federal workers and contractors who live in Maryland are missing out on their full paychecks. That means people are falling deeper into debt, missing bills, and struggling to provide for their families.
**SECOND:** Trump’s directed agencies to fire federal workers — again. Maryland has lost over 15,000 federal jobs since the start of the year. That’s the largest decrease in the entire country.
**THIRD:** Funding for crucial benefits like food assistance has been stalled for hundreds of thousands Marylanders. Our people rely on programs like WIC and SNAP to help keep their families fed. And for over two weeks, the President has been virtually silent on how HE intends on helping them.
While we’ll do everything in our power for as long as we can to make up for the fact that the federal government has abandoned its responsibilities, no state can fill the gap here.
Critical programs are being broken. Costs are being driven up. America’s economy is going into a ditch.
Let’s call it what it is: This isn’t gridlock. It’s not confusion. It’s cruelty by design.
**The President is prolonging this shutdown to inflict maximum pain on working families, on seniors, on small businesses — because he believes that suffering will give him leverage. He’s holding the country hostage to push an agenda written by and for billionaires.**
So I’m saying it again, directly: Mr. President, you have the power. You can end this shutdown today. The question is: Do you care enough about the American people to do it?
**[If you’re with me, join me in calling on President Trump and Congressional Republicans to end this shutdown.](https://act.wesmoore.com/sign/add-your-name-tell-president-trump-end-shutdown?source=em-20251020-2&t=4&akid=785%2E1086043%2EGwNmnS)**
**[Add Your Name ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/sign/add-your-name-tell-president-trump-end-shutdown?source=em-20251020-2&t=5&akid=785%2E1086043%2EGwNmnS)**
I know this is a difficult moment. But I am not writing any of this from a place of pessimism. Because this is not a time for us to feel powerless – it’s the time for us to understand our power.
Despite the headwinds from Washington, I’m determined to move forward here in Maryland. Because here in Maryland, we take care of our own.
We’ve faced hard times before. We will face them again. And we will get through this moment as we always have: **Together.**
Elevate,
Wes

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251020-2&t=6&refcode2=785_1086043_GwNmnS&akid=785%2E1086043%2EGwNmnS)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=7&akid=785%2E1086043%2EGwNmnS)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=785%2E1086043%2EGwNmnS)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

body:
They’re harming this country. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117662882/577219354/823540626?refcode=ea.ae639481-08ae-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.ae639481-08ae-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTYzOTQ4MS0wOGFlLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jaZqyOr3gRVMwIdhufviMkJbfSZJACXscjqECiCimrc=&emci=333071f6-faad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=ae639481-08ae-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=17205535)
**Peter, public servants should act in the best interests of the people they serve.** It doesn’t seem like something we should have to say, but I want to be very clear about where I stand on this. Far too many elected officials serve their own interests — their political party or their personal power — first. If it weren’t clear enough that too many GOP legislators aren’t in politics to serve the people, we only have to look at their “Big, Beautiful Bill.” _Just who is helped by making massive cuts to Medicaid or forcing families in need off of SNAP?_ Republican lawmakers are trading food for hungry children and health insurance for working families in exchange for tax breaks for the wealthiest among us. This feathers their own nest, and it doesn’t make America stronger. **What Washington Republicans are doing is unconscionable. Cruel. A dereliction of their duty to the people of this nation.**_And Peter,most GOP lawmakers know all this — but they’re going to keep trying to enact their ruthless agenda because that is what their party leaders demand, and because they’re worried they could lose the support of their billionaire donor base if they don’t fall in line._ I’m no stranger to standing up to the GOP and fighting to deliver for the people. I’m ready to do so again in the U.S. Senate. But my MAGA opponent is calling upon every powerful politician and dark-money group he can in an attempt to defeat me, so I need your help. **[I’m asking you to contribute today to our campaign for the U.S. Senate so we can get back to work delivering for all Americans.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117662884/577219356/-1743631236?refcode=ea.ae639481-08ae-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.ae639481-08ae-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTYzOTQ4MS0wOGFlLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jaZqyOr3gRVMwIdhufviMkJbfSZJACXscjqECiCimrc=)** | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117662885/577219357/-1743631236?refcode=ea.ae639481-08ae-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.ae639481-08ae-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTYzOTQ4MS0wOGFlLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jaZqyOr3gRVMwIdhufviMkJbfSZJACXscjqECiCimrc=)**

Our people deserve better. Let’s make sure they get it.
Thanks,
Roy Cooper

Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Contributions or gifts to Cooper for North Carolina are not tax deductible. By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: Charlie always believed this day would come
body:
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.

* * *
| | | | [](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gdgt&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gdgt&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gdgt&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gdgt&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gdgt&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gdgt&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gdgt&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gdgt&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gdgt&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gdgt&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=2vytyz4021zmii56bdcpqs3hjzefw35jjxdi9g4ykh2wqnzwi3clyarwqofq7mhkxpenvuvvu6ks378cty1dex8yjoob1g99h23udzyanbgz7x254fp1q2uwbm6kxqjkwnvtk6gljbt&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gdgt&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gdgt&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Unsubscribe](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xul=2qq8ny3595o85h60939os39vgu43az3gifpa8u0l58kbss3x0q8u1ogdk12apc9ucephggnfktld9ripnympdm7tb1kq61mslfj3jtf9x&__stmp=t4gdgt&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=2vytyz4021zmii56bdcpqs3hjzefw35jjxdi9g4ykh2wnroeve3orio5h5cpp9nihmmqb7376tj5bhx2gdv8x2fc47kbjkrynf173a4fkfl9dodp7spfvdbj3f6wn6fz0gnpuvw7ep9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gdgt&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=4zp2igrzkq7o81wyk8j24nqbwjlkbw50caytrixyuarm7hgrdlasly5v4uyn9c1w7ne0a7g2e7kqqas5ldtxgplrzygre97dbzc8qqv3r063jv3ktcpbvuqif04q73t3&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4gdgt&__onlt=h)

DISCLOSURE OF BUSINESS TIES: The sender of this email likely has an affiliate or material connection with the entities mentioned and may earn commissions from purchases made through associated websites. Do not base your assessment of products or services solely on this email. Always investigate thoroughly before making a purchase.

* Spanberger HID a $900K trust from voters while she was in Congress, so lying isn’t anything new for her.

But on top of that, it will signal to National Democrats that this kind of corruption is a recipe for success. Soon, every state would be filled with even more corrupt, lying Democrats in office! I’m fighting everyday to ensure that my team and I pull off this CRITICAL victory. We have the message and momentum we need – recent polls show that we’re SURGING as votes are being cast in Virginia. I’m locked in the BIGGEST race of 2025. Whether I win or lose this race WILL determine the future of our nation. I’m not in the business of lying to voters and supporters, so I’m going to tell you the TRUTH. Here it is: My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has taken over $550K in donations from a George Soros-backed group and a Chinese Communist Party member! She doesn’t fight for you, me, or our nation; she’s looking out for megarich liberals and literal COMMUNISTS! Spanberger HID a $900K trust from voters while she was in Congress, so lying isn’t anything new for her. Spanberger took cues from Biden 100% of the time while she was in Congress. If she became Governor, she’d bring the same lies and downturn that we saw under Biden! | If Spanberger wins in November, we’ll have a TERRIBLE and corrupt career politician as Governor in Virginia. But on top of that, it will signal to National Democrats that this kind of corruption is a recipe for success. Soon, every state would be filled with even more corrupt, lying Democrats in office! I’m fighting everyday to ensure that my team and I pull off this CRITICAL victory. We have the message and momentum we need – recent polls show that we’re SURGING as votes are being cast in Virginia. | | | | | | | | | We CANNOT let my liberal opponent and her megadonors BUY this election! This isn’t about me and it’s not just about you – this is about the future of our nation. From the bottom of my heart, I’m asking you to support me in this fight! | If we stand together, I know we can win this thing. I pray you’ll stand with me. Sincerely, Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears | * Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. I’m Winsome Earle-Sears, and I’ve held many titles in my life. Each one hasn’t been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I’ve tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born. Sure, a silver spoon would’ve made it easier, but I’ve found a helping hand from your community means so much more. This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. name: Jim Jordan
subject: CNN: Democrats doing “Better than ever”
body:
Believe me, I wish this was Fake News...
Believe me, I wish this was Fake News...
| | **_A SECURE MEMO TRANSMITTED FROM THE DESK OF REP. JIM JORDAN_**
---
Friend,
---
The Democrats haven’t had much to celebrate recently.
---
**But _CNN_ is taking a victory lap after Democrats added _TWO_ more House seats to their column by winning special elections in Virginia and Arizona!**
_**CNN:
Democrats are doing better than ever in Trump-era special elections**_
“Democrats are over-performing in special elections more than they ever have in the Trump era — dating back to his first term.”
Believe me, I wish this was nothing more than Fake News...
But so far this year, the Democrats have overperformed in all of the House special elections by **_DOUBLE_ _DIGIT_** margins!
The last time Democrats overperformed in special elections with margins anywhere close to these was during President Trump’s first two years in office.
**They went on to FLIP over _40_ House seats in the midterms!**
_And right now, the Democrats are actually doing _BETTER_ than they were back then! _
But there’s one important caveat to all of this: The Democrats aren’t winning special elections by these huge margins because they’re winning more votes.
_Instead, they’re winning because thousands of Republican voters simply aren’t showing up to cast their ballots like they did last November._
**I’ll be perfectly frank with you, Friend: The biggest threat to President Trump’s House majority isn’t from anything the Democrats can do.__It’s from our own voters getting complacent and not turning out to vote.__**
And since we’re ONLY 1 SEAT over the _bare_ _minimum_ _threshold_ to declare a Majority in the House, we truly have no room for error. Losing even a single seat could prove disastrous!
_Given this troubling trend in special elections, I’ve been tasked with determining _exactly_ who President Trump and I can count on to show up and vote in the midterms. _
_I just need one thing from you before I can officially mark you as “verified,” Friend._
[ **Please complete the brief questionnaire to verify that YOU are among the highest propensity voters we can count on in the midterms – and then I’ll officially mark you as “verified” in our GOP Voter file.** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9d1f864c02014fe1ae10435859823ce3&_e=uTlCwDWVKD4w5NeymI3cs7i8JwPLu0AlGc3ZlJx0mB-aR7_rmK4MNUUAoAHZeI2vDKEP3fmUSIG6XZDsv8FRseBBj1WUh5grI81pbjwf-92XZ7324P0ewa0gNVgW7KQOdaJPDm42ATvbPehtIyEKvuWJv74AeaEFd7J8Yimlw_u9cham3q7M-8rIeR_9KTZEYnCZ3-2vMV3f_qyzkW8xHl9wgl2ZfKMP-OEPnOSZMj5iyQ3Sdarqlesfr3bwCrRA6ZvF2jN8d6a2luZPIObcystwq9cekrG8MFHybJU0_duHYCn7gd3tFu2gxpjyHy4rRYwZSOsyrMol1YSmamVYvCddD0JV3d06TQtUA4jW-TZ2VmxaInkMRaGckzGLI8szSDPCLYDCkQn2kTWsvrjLWfa1ps-5bs4x76t38ZWNrfQ_1D9knxCSOy1hGpG7mFH_OQIC17nZghpuZTt5HcZy1luyl7UmZgiNoAndrmpQTjcXJ0L-VOqK7q_W8XEAVyeSbApYssi7KV9GwhDI2pY_ZbWCMNXC53_svGf-5Z0QDilkXWAZKMSAppoFw6mJW46AYbPtz2wdI-irFbGDUV2FNg%3D%3D)

name: Deb Haaland
subject: WIC could run out of funding soon
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Trump is more focused on cutting health care than supporting children and the millions of families who rely on WIC.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=5177%2E400544%2E8e4U3f)
Hey — it’s Deb.
Like so many families across the country, I relied on WIC to raise my child.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/sign/em_ms_dh_20251020_1_wic/?source=em20251020-5177&t=2&akid=5177%2E400544%2E8e4U3f)
Some weeks, the milk, cereal, eggs, and oatmeal from those paper checks were the _only_ groceries we had.
Thanks to WIC and other federal programs, New Mexicans make it through. That’s why, as governor, I will _always_ fight to protect the programs that help families survive during these difficult moments.
**But right now, funding for WIC is at risk because of the ongoing Trump shutdown, fueled by Republicans' desire to cut and destroy healthcare. If this shutdown drags on, over 6 million families will lose access to the nutrition they rely on.**
Families deserve security, that’s why, as governor, I’ll always make sure essential programs have the funding New Mexicans rely on — even when Republicans in Washington play political games that put families at risk.
There’s too much at stake. No family should be allowed to go hungry.
**[If you agree, add your name to my petition today to stand with the families who depend on WIC and demand that Congress end the government shutdown.](https://act.debhaaland.com/sign/em_ms_dh_20251020_1_wic/?source=em20251020-5177&t=3&akid=5177%2E400544%2E8e4U3f)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.debhaaland.com/sign/em_ms_dh_20251020_1_wic/?source=em20251020-5177&t=4&akid=5177%2E400544%2E8e4U3f)**
Thank you for joining me in speaking out,
Deb

subject: A special thank you for you, Fellow American
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:

Fellow American, it's Don Jr. I wanted to take a moment to express my heartfelt gratitude for your unwavering support. My father and I know that this fight isn't possible without patriots like you who are willing to stand up for what's right.

We're honored to have you on our team, Fellow American.

# [Trump's WORST Nightmare: The 'No Kings' Movement Just Made History!](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=176662846&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc2NjYyODQ2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjEwMDIzMzUsImV4cCI6MTc2MzU5NDMzNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.1dax2x8vuOGCMnxQR_-uKEHNdcTIk3LyKSTTStTJyNs)
### America rises against Trump's rule of fear as millions flood the streets to scream one message loud and clear: No Kings. No Tyrants.
| | [Tony Michaels](https://substack.com/@thetonymichaels), [Blue Amp Media](https://substack.com/@blueampmedia), and [Cliff Schecter](https://substack.com/@cliffsedge)
---
| Oct 20
---
| [](https://substack.com/@thetonymichaels)| | [](https://substack.com/@blueampmedia)| | [](https://substack.com/@cliffsedge)
---|---|---|---|---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=176662846&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc2NjYyODQ2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2MTAwMjMzNSwiZXhwIjoxNzYzNTk0MzM1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzcyMjUzMiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Zouq_VphdzUkUtdp6sLMOEhgEvo7SETv6OWYB8qx3k4&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=176662846&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc2NjYyODQ2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjEwMDIzMzUsImV4cCI6MTc2MzU5NDMzNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.1dax2x8vuOGCMnxQR_-uKEHNdcTIk3LyKSTTStTJyNs&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=176662846&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc2NjYyODQ2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjEwMDIzMzUsImV4cCI6MTc2MzU5NDMzNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.1dax2x8vuOGCMnxQR_-uKEHNdcTIk3LyKSTTStTJyNs)

| | [](https://substack..xIQKEARaxjzOdrqEAxxnI4siVqDBuTL2WStIcQa8z4A?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/blueamp/p/trumps-worst-nightmare-the-no-kings?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7d08dd2c-9301-4837-98c9-f2abcfb79e29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
New York City. REUTERS/Eduardo Munoz
Yesterday, the country sent a message that will echo through history: **We will not bow to a king.**
_**Want to Know Your Rights?
Download a free digital copy of the U.S. Constitution--the same document Trump is trying to bulldoze. Learn exactly what he's breaking... and how to fight back.**_
[GET FREE POCKET CONSTITUTION](https://substack.com/redirect/471e3584-ae48-4f91-a0ad-56f7939f760b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The **No Kings March** saw an estimated **seven million Americans** across every state--and even abroad--take to the streets in defiance of Donald Trump's authoritarian ambitions. From Jefferson City to Washington, D.C., from Knoxville to London, the people stood under thunder and rain to defend democracy itself.
Seven million strong, the people marched in thunder, rain, and raw determination. Not one riot. Not one window smashed. Just nurses, teachers, veterans, parents, and workers standing shoulder to shoulder for the Constitution, democracy, and the idea that no one--not even a wannabe dictator in a red tie--is above the law.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cf571bf1-ab2b-47a6-b8e1-9098d76515e8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Washington, D.C. REUTERS/Kylie Cooper
These weren't paid agitators or "Antifa mobs," as Trump's cronies would have you believe. They were nurses, veterans, teachers, parents, and workers--all holding handmade signs that read _" No Kings, No Tyrants"_ and _" This Is How Hitler Got Started."_ Even in deep-red strongholds like Tennessee and Alabama, thousands marched in unity.
The movement is rising, and in the process, we are seeing [candidates like Ohio's Greg Landsman standing strong](https://substack.com/redirect/a40c6d79-f9ef-4402-b786-0e4dc60344eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [newcomers like Fred Wellman challenging the GOPs stranglehold on the throat of Liberty](https://substack.com/redirect/533e73f2-f64e-4ba3-b593-b50b6d5dd52f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Americans know that Trump and his fanatic loyalists like Russ Vought are more than HALF DONE implementing Project 2025, [which we talked about with our friend Wayne Besen last week](https://substack.com/redirect/4f0d3b48-4c93-47a5-a922-ab949da5b0da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
While Trump's MAGA loyalists hid behind cable news spin, the world saw the truth: **the people have had enough.**
Enough of warrantless arrests. Enough of racist policing. Enough of Trump's war on the Constitution. Enough of the insane tariffs that are [crashing the American economy, just like we spoke about with Marlon Weems](https://substack.com/redirect/3b31a551-d50a-40d9-a94f-985ee028ad4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b658bddb-e905-4f73-a529-056c11568103?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Portland, Oregon. REUTERS/John Rudoff
And for the first time, the fear wasn't on our side--**it was on his.**
If you marched, watched, or simply felt the spark--**don 't let it fade.**

We know times are tough--Trump's economy has made sure of that. But this moment is bigger than one paycheck or one protest. It's about saving the country we love, together.
