name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: URGENT Call to Action: Only U.S. citizens should vote
body:
Last chance to require documented proof of citizenship to register and vote in American elections
[](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org/1/0100019a03eb47a7-018d25f0-8956-4105-8f60-ae988407e79f-000000/WmYTCmiKjnMbXNCMGvFDzRUg0Kwagk4xqMuYKOC0-ZI=427)Patriot–**Today** is the final day to submit your comments to the U.S. Election Assistance Commission (EAC) petition to require documentary proof of U.S. citizenship for federal voter registration.Requiring potential voters to physically verify their U.S. citizenship can **stop illegal voting** and protect our elections.Thousands of supporters have already signed the petition, but we still need your help!
* If you haven’t yet, [_**submit your comment supporting**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Faction.teapartypatriots.org%2Fpetition%2Feac-comment%2F/1/0100019a03eb47a7-018d25f0-8956-4105-8f60-ae988407e79f-000000/9nSq_SLWpGtAN77bcEcuUL1XnBs3r9Dq31Btk4cvS-w=427)documented proof of citizenship
* Share our easy-to-use [_portal_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Faction.teapartypatriots.org%2Fpetition%2Feac-comment%2F/2/0100019a03eb47a7-018d25f0-8956-4105-8f60-ae988407e79f-000000/YeMCSmk6iXQ1JBg9UcZ2Cs83DmwjNFtyWqdcKYoZz1Y=427)with your friends and family so they can also submit comments

[SECURE OUR ELECTIONS](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Faction.teapartypatriots.org%2Fpetition%2Feac-comment%2F/3/0100019a03eb47a7-018d25f0-8956-4105-8f60-ae988407e79f-000000/hKu4i_thbNGircN5bxZuqLOegF_Y-gJbfQEYXHsskB8=427)Americans will not sit back and watch as our votes continue to be diluted by noncitizens. **Stand up** and make your voice heard, today![_**Submit your comments**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Faction.teapartypatriots.org%2Fpetition%2Feac-comment%2F/4/0100019a03eb47a7-018d25f0-8956-4105-8f60-ae988407e79f-000000/oVZPrcw-cHo1de-Mz0FexDfcKDpOIYLocicx1LGCGWo=427) before the midnight deadline to require documented proof of U.S. citizenship to register and to vote.In liberty,Jenny Beth Martin [CONTRIBUTE](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/1/0100019a03eb47a7-018d25f0-8956-4105-8f60-ae988407e79f-000000/fqBVw4LzqZNK_TAGMjtPuDwQ96g4NpJSRtSjaVyFwUM=427) _This email list is a joint venture of the following separate organizations: Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc., Tea Party Patriots Foundation, and Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund. All rights reserved.__Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes._ To donate by mail, send your check made payable to:[_**Tea Party Patriots Action**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/2/0100019a03eb47a7-018d25f0-8956-4105-8f60-ae988407e79f-000000/GKgDMqGr6FX6niMcekR0MfrTmgyUOMugZsZanRJIyag=427)

If you haven’t yet, proof of citizenship Share our easy-to-use your friends and family so they can also submit comments will not sit back and watch as our votes continue to be diluted by noncitizens. Stand up and make your voice heard, today before the midnight deadline to require documented proof of U.S. citizenship to register and to vote.In liberty,Jenny Beth Martin This email list is a joint venture of the following separate organizations: Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc., Tea Party Patriots Foundation, and Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund. name: Sarah McBride
subject: An unholy and corrupt alliance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
We rallied together to show Trump: No Kings.
#
I attended three No Kings rallies on Saturday — in Dover, Georgetown, and Rehoboth Beach — where _thousands_ of Delawareans stood shoulder to shoulder with millions across the country to send one clear message to Donald Trump:
**In America, we have no kings.**
[](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251020-1.MeqGSM&refcode=em20251020-2421&amount=5&t=1&akid=2421%2E21716%2EUF8u9F)
**This wasn’t just a protest — it was a declaration of who we are, what we stand for, and what we refuse to become.**
Trump and MAGA Republicans are calling the millions of Americans who turned out this weekend “criminals” — but I saw the truth. Workers, families, grandparents, and people from every walk of life came together with one shared purpose: defending freedom.
**🇺 🇸 The freedom to make decisions over our own bodies and healthcare.**
**🇺 🇸 The freedom to be safe in our communities — without fear of masked agents abducting people without due process.**
**🇺 🇸 The freedom to control our own destiny — not to be ruled by a despot, whether they wear a gold crown or sit in a gilded Oval Office.**
Trump built an unholy and corrupt alliance with billionaire donors, promising them tax breaks in exchange for funding his authoritarian power expansion. Now he’s raiding our health care and ripping coverage from working people to pay them back.
**We’re not standing by, and we won’t be intimidated.** We’re fighting to reverse health care cuts, extend ACA subsidies, and protect our freedoms. Lives are on the line — and so is our democracy.
**If you’re ready to keep up the fight, defend care, and show Trump this movement isn’t going anywhere,[will you pitch in $5 — or any amount that works for you — to power our grassroots fight and protect our democracy?](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251020-1.MeqGSM&refcode=em20251020-2421&amount=5&t=2&akid=2421%2E21716%2EUF8u9F)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251020-1.MeqGSM&refcode=em20251020-2421&amount=5&t=21&akid=2421%2E21716%2EUF8u9F)**
Let’s keep up the energy from this weekend — and continue showing up for our country, our communities, and each other. Because our future belongs to us.
In solidarity,
Sarah McBride
[](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251020-1.MeqGSM&refcode=em20251020-2421&amount=5&t=22&akid=2421%2E21716%2EUF8u9F)
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20251020-1&t=23&refcode2=2421_21716_UF8u9F&akid=2421%2E21716%2EUF8u9F)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=24&akid=2421%2E21716%2EUF8u9F)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=25&akid=2421%2E21716%2EUF8u9F)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2421%2E21716%2EUF8u9F)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

name: Jane Fonda
subject: We need to flip these seats:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
This is when your support matters most.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117663725/577222083/1328794144?refcode=ea.09a8a0f3-0bae-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.09a8a0f3-0bae-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA5YThhMGYzLTBiYWUtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EywgG_rErYIpGHa3hf7RpbsuCSFhs7pNvtal6JLutQs=&emci=07a8a0f3-0bae-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=09a8a0f3-0bae-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)
---
**In exactly fifteen days, Virginia voters will decide the fate of the Commonwealth’s climate future.** We have a real chance to _expand_ the Democratic majority in the House of Delegates — the very body that’s been a firewall of defense against Republican attempts to roll back the progress we’ve made on climate. Right now, three highly competitive Republican-held seats are within our reach, and each one could be decided by just a few hundred votes: _In House District 82,**Kimberly Pope Adams** lost by only **53 votes** last time she ran._ _In House District 41,**Lily Franklin** came within **183 votes** of flipping this seat._ _And in House District 30,**John McAuliff** is running in one of Virginia's **most fiercely contested** Republican-held districts._ **These aren't impossible races.** **[These are winnable seats currently held by Republicans that we can flip if, and only _if,_ we reach enough voters before November 4th. Will you split a donation of any amount between all three candidates to help them win this time?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117663726/577222084/1561008017?refcode=ea.09a8a0f3-0bae-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.09a8a0f3-0bae-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA5YThhMGYzLTBiYWUtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EywgG_rErYIpGHa3hf7RpbsuCSFhs7pNvtal6JLutQs=)** | [**SPLIT A DONATION →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117663727/577222085/1561008017?refcode=ea.09a8a0f3-0bae-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.09a8a0f3-0bae-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA5YThhMGYzLTBiYWUtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EywgG_rErYIpGHa3hf7RpbsuCSFhs7pNvtal6JLutQs=)
---
These next 15 days are when elections are won or lost. This is when campaigns deploy their final get-out-the-vote operations. When they make their last push to reach undecided voters. When every conversation, every door knock, every phone call could tip the race. And that work costs money.
**Your donation today will help Kimberly, Lily, and John reach undecided voters through door-knocking, phone banking, and get-out-the-vote efforts in these final 15 days — the exact work that wins races decided by hundreds of votes.**
**[Virginia's future is on the line in 15 days. clean_body: This is when your support matters most. | In exactly fifteen days, Virginia voters will decide the fate of the Commonwealth’s climate future. We have a real chance to expand the Democratic majority in the House of Delegates — the very body that’s been a firewall of defense against Republican attempts to roll back the progress we’ve made on climate. Right now, three highly competitive Republican-held seats are within our reach, and each one could be decided by just a few hundred votes: In House District 82,Kimberly Pope Adams lost by only 53 votes last time she ran. In House District 41,Lily Franklin came within 183 votes of flipping this seat. And in House District 30,John McAuliff is running in one of Virginia's most fiercely contested Republican-held districts. These aren't impossible races. = | = These next 15 days are when elections are won or lost. This is when campaigns deploy their final get-out-the-vote operations. When they make their last push to reach undecided voters. When every conversation, every door knock, every phone call could tip the race. And that work costs money. Your donation today will help Kimberly, Lily, and John reach undecided voters through door-knocking, phone banking, and get-out-the-vote efforts in these final 15 days — the exact work that wins races decided by hundreds of votes. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We're so close. Let's bring this home. ✊ In solidarity, Jane Fonda = | Follow along: | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Dear Fellow American, Trauma. Addiction. Depression. Personality disorders.

This world is full of people who need a trusted person to guide them through their mental health issues.

Kaley Chiles is a licensed counselor and committed Christian. Many of Kaley's clients come to her because they share her Christian worldview and faith-based values.

But Colorado law bans counselors from having private conversations with young clients that could help them regain comfort with their God-given sex--rather than pushing them one step closer to dangerous gender-transition drugs and surgeries.

Kaley has already had to start censoring herself to avoid potential fines of $5,000 for each offense and even the loss of her license.

This law violates freedom of speech. The government has no business censoring conversations between clients and counselors.

We are working with Kaley and other counselors to stop this government censorship. We're excited the U.S. Supreme Court heard oral arguments for this case on October 7th.

Will you stand with Kaley?

Click this link to stand with Kaley Chiles and her constitutional right to speak with clients about their shared faith-based values.

clean_body: This world is full of people who need a trusted person to guide them through their mental health issues. The fight to keep men out of women's sports isn't over. | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | | Dear Fellow American, Trauma. Addiction. Depression. Personality disorders. This world is full of people who need a trusted person to guide them through their mental health issues. Kaley Chiles is a licensed counselor and committed Christian. Many of Kaley's clients come to her because they share her Christian worldview and faith-based values. But Colorado law bans counselors from having private conversations with young clients that could help them regain comfort with their God-given sex--rather than pushing them one step closer to dangerous gender-transition drugs and surgeries. Kaley has already had to start censoring herself to avoid potential fines of $5,000 for each offense and even the loss of her license. This law violates freedom of speech. The government has no business censoring conversations between clients and counselors. We are working with Kaley and other counselors to stop this government censorship. We're excited the U.S. Supreme Court heard oral arguments for this case on October 7th. Will you stand with Kaley? Click this link to stand with Kaley Chiles and her constitutional right to speak with clients about their shared faith-based values. For freedom, Jake Warner Senior Counsel Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: (Urgent) Donald Trump just endorsed my opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Will you split a contribution between my campaign and Heartland Patriots to help me defeat Donald Trump's hand-picked candidate in the biggest election of 2025?
Peter, I'm going to lay this out as clearly as I can:
**Donald Trump endorsed my opponent Winsome Earle-Sears late last night.**
I'm the only Democrat running for Governor this year in a state controlled by Republicans, and I need each person reading this to join our donor list by midnight. It's urgent so that we can continue standing up to President Trump, turning out voters, and demonstrating the strength of this campaign.
**[Will you split a $10 contribution between my campaign and Heartland Patriots to help me defeat Donald Trump's hand-picked candidate in the biggest election of 2025? It's only a matter of time until Trump's billion-dollar war chest is spent to attack us here in Virginia, and we need to be ready to respond.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96813?refcode=em20251020-9605&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9605%2E614464%2EhY36CF)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, we will process your contribution to Abigail Spanberger and Heartland Patriots instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96814?refcode=em20251020-9605&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=9605%2E614464%2EhY36CF) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96814?refcode=em20251020-9605&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=9605%2E614464%2EhY36CF) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96814?refcode=em20251020-9605&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=9605%2E614464%2EhY36CF) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96814?refcode=em20251020-9605&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=9605%2E614464%2EhY36CF) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96814?refcode=em20251020-9605&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=9605%2E614464%2EhY36CF) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96814?refcode=em20251020-9605&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=9605%2E614464%2EhY36CF) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96813?refcode=em20251020-9605&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=9605%2E614464%2EhY36CF)
---
This whole year, my opponent has spent more time groveling for Trump's endorsement than standing up for Virginia.
In fact, Winsome admits that she met privately with Trump to plead for his support.
This came at a time when the President was firing thousands of federal workers, driving up prices, and planning to cut funding for healthcare and public schools — actions which have devastated Virginia's economy and threatened the livelihoods of so many.
It's clear that Winsome places her loyalty to Trump above everything else.
_Now, I'm using every tool at my disposal to make sure voters know the truth about Winsome._ But we're in the heart of early voting now, and sharing our message on TV, at the doors, and over the internet is so incredibly expensive.
_So, can I count on your support today, Peter?_
**[If you've been waiting for the moment when you can have the greatest impact on our campaign for Governor, this is it. Please use this link right now to make your split donation →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96813?refcode=em20251020-9605&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9605%2E614464%2EhY36CF)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96813?refcode=em20251020-9605&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9605%2E614464%2EhY36CF)**
Thank you for standing with me. Let's win this together.
Abigail Spanberger
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96813?refcode=em20251020-9605&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9605%2E614464%2EhY36CF)

Hey folks,
This was supposed to be a normal show, but breaking news made it an emergency live session with Simon Rosenberg. Don't miss this one.

* **[00:07:01]** We talk about why these texts matter--and what it says about the culture inside today's Republican Party.
* **[00:18:05]** Simon reacts to the bulldozing of the White House and how it represents Trump's monarchical ambitions.

We dug into the shocking texts from a Trump nominee--and it only got more intense from there. This is a must-watch if you want to understand just how deep the rot goes and how we push back. Don't miss this one. [00:01:08] Simon joins live as we pivot the show to breaking news: racist texts from Trump's nominee for the Office of Special Counsel. [00:03:04] Simon breaks down the Southern Strategy and how it evolved into the open white supremacy we're seeing in today's GOP. [00:07:01] We talk about why these texts matter--and what it says about the culture inside today's Republican Party. [00:18:05] Simon reacts to the bulldozing of the White House and how it represents Trump's monarchical ambitions. [00:24:39] New polling in Alaska, Ohio, and North Carolina shows real momentum for Democrats--and a path to flip the Senate. ** With urgency, --Mike | A guest post by| Political Analyst, Strategist and Commentator. 2 Presidential campaigns (incl Clinton War Room), senior roles at DNC, DCCC, NDN. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy. I am stunned. My opponent, Congressman Scott Perry, just got even more extreme. **On a conservative talk radio show, he accused Democrats of “hating the military.” Even worse, he accused Democratic service members of only serving as a “credential” so that they can run for office.** “They don’t care about the Constitution or the nation’s defense,” he said. I find his remarks deeply offensive, especially to the brave Americans who have stepped up to serve this country. And frankly, I think he should apologize immediately. This is just one more example of Scott Perry’s extremism — this time at the expense of the men and women who protect our freedoms at home and abroad. I’m running for Congress to fire Scott Perry. Patriotism means a lot of things – including fighting to protect women’s reproductive freedoms, our neighbors’ healthcare and the right to vote. And patriotism means fighting to make this great country even greater. **[Perry lost this race by 1% in 2024. Now is our chance to flip PA-10 and win back our Democratic majority in the U.S. House. clean_body: Scott Perry just accused Democrats of “hating the military.” Janelle Stelson is running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Team, it’s Janelle Stelson — the Democrat running to flip PA-10 from red to blue in one of the closest U.S. House races in the entire country. I am stunned. My opponent, Congressman Scott Perry, just got even more extreme. On a conservative talk radio show, he accused Democrats of “hating the military.” Even worse, he accused Democratic service members of only serving as a “credential” so that they can run for office. “They don’t care about the Constitution or the nation’s defense,” he said. I find his remarks deeply offensive, especially to the brave Americans who have stepped up to serve this country. And frankly, I think he should apologize immediately. This is just one more example of Scott Perry’s extremism — this time at the expense of the men and women who protect our freedoms at home and abroad. I’m running for Congress to fire Scott Perry. Patriotism means a lot of things – including fighting to protect women’s reproductive freedoms, our neighbors’ healthcare and the right to vote. And patriotism means fighting to make this great country even greater. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Let’s show Scott Perry just how patriotic we can be. Janelle | | | ---|---|--- = Janelle Stelson is someone we can trust. She has been speaking directly to the people of Central Pennsylvania for over three decades as an Emmy Award-winning journalist. Peter -
This weekend, people all over the country came together to affirm that our country will never be ruled by a king and that we will stand up to threats against our democracy. Jena was one of the thousands using her voice to speak out against the threats in our country.
Jena proudly joined Coloradans at No Kings rallies in Boulder and Fort Collins. Jena knows that the people have the power, and that we will never be silenced.

Can we count on you to support Jena today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2510-q4-jg?refcode=251020-email]
Jena will always stand with Coloradans for fairness, freedom, and justice for all. The peaceful protests yesterday showed Donald Trump that we are denouncing his illegal and cruel actions and that we will stand for democracy and rule of law.
Chip in today to help Jena continue to fight for our nation. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2510-q4-jg?refcode=251020-email]
We will never stop fighting for the country we believe in.
—Team Jena

name: Team Conroy
subject: SIGN ON: Keep the National Guard out of our cities
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONROY FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | | | | _You're receiving this message because you stood with us during the 2024 election, or a mutual friend shared your information with us. We’re proud to have you in our network, but if you'd prefer not to receive these updates, you can unsubscribe_[ _here_](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=2c7cc2a69f&t=b&e=a7b299e420&c=5a7a2116f2) _._
---
[|
---](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=ca9a3cf5dd&e=a7b299e420)
| | **Peter – the executive branch of the federal government is looking for reasons to send National Guard troops into American cities, including to Spokane.**

We’ve already seen it happen in Los Angeles, Washington D.C., Chicago, and most recently in Portland. This should alarm every one of us.

They claim it’s about safety. But the truth? It’s about power and intimidation. Local law enforcement is already doing its job. This is political theater that mirrors the authoritarian playbook.

**Carmela Conroy knows what that looks like.** She’s seen firsthand what happens when leaders use fear and force to silence dissent, during service in Afghanistan and Pakistan. As a former U.S. Consul General and Spokane County Deputy Prosecutor, she has spent decades defending American values, democracy, and the rule of law, both abroad and at home.

Now, she’s sounding the alarm, while our freshman representative cozies up to extreme national GOP leaders, slashes funding for education and healthcare, and looks the other way as the executive branch reaches for more power.

**Eastern Washington deserves better. We deserve a leader who will stand up for** _**us**_**– for our democracy, our freedoms, and our community – not for extreme partisan politics or special interests.

**[**It’s absolutely critical we make our voices heard. Add your name today – tell the federal government to keep the National Guard out of Washington State.**](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=4439bf9d6c&e=a7b299e420)
---
| **[SIGN ON](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=5f08ff2f15&e=a7b299e420)**
---
| | This is not normal. And staying silent is not an option.

Thanks for taking action today.

– Team Conroy

---
|
---
| | | | |
---

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: Haaland WASTED $4 Million on DC Consultants Already!
body:
Plus, Tim Keller told debate audience that people looking to mayors to fix problems is "part of the problem." You're the MAYOR... | New for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=f5e2d539eb&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | |
Deb Haaland just raised a record-breaking $6.9 million for New Mexico Governor. Impressive, right?
[There's just one problem: **she's already WASTED $4 million of it** \- with $2 million going to a single DC digital firm.](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=72ae93d88d&e=567664f14c)
**Meanwhile, Tim Keller essentially told Albuquerque voters not to look to him to fix crime during this week's mayoral debate.
** Happy 17th birthday to our daughter Ella! 🎉
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ff3de3afb4&e=567664f14c)
| |
💰 **HAALAND: $6.9M RAISED, $4M WASTED
**
The campaign finance reports are out and Deb Haaland raised a record-breaking $6.9 million. Impressive until you see she's already burned through $4 million of it - including $2 million to a single DC digital firm called "Middle Seat."
Mark's take? **"DC consultants rip you off if you let them. They don't know New Mexico - they just cash checks."**
Meanwhile, Greg Hull has only raised $329K as the lone Republican in the race. Those are non-competitive numbers. He needs to raise at least $1 million by December or he's done.

💀 **KELLER: "DON'T LOOK TO POLITICIANS"**
Tim Keller's debate performance was stunning. He told the audience that "part of the problem is that we look to mayors and politicians to fix it" when discussing crime. He also said he fights crime "with technology and civilians" instead of actual police officers.
The murder stats tell the real story: 30 murders in 2014 before Keller took office. 106 murders in 2022. That's a 3X increase.
Darren White destroyed him with one line: "That is not progress, Mayor. That is a crisis."
Louie Sanchez also struggled badly, rambling incoherently when asked about his crime plan.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=68f20d1fd2&e=567664f14c)
---
| |
🚨 **SANCTUARY CITY KILLED SOMEONE**
Keller bragged during the debate that his sanctuary city policy works because "we don't collect ANY information" to share with ICE.
Here's what that policy cost: Adan Munoz was arrested for choking his wife and threatening to kill her and their child. He was released on an ankle monitor. Keller's policy meant zero information was shared with ICE. Munoz then murdered Mikhail Romero at a party.
Had Keller shared the information, Munoz would have been deported to Venezuela. Someone would still be alive today.
📊 **DEMS PLOT FETTERMAN OUSTER**
Senator John Fetterman warned Democrats they're losing white men because "the other side seems like men are the problem, masculinity is toxic."
Twenty-four hours later, Axios reported that top Pennsylvania Democrats are already maneuvering to primary him in 2028. Mark's response? "Fetterman votes with Democrats 90% of the time. Push him out, you get a Republican who votes with you 0% of the time. You're crazy."
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=0888becb56&e=567664f14c)
---
|
---

Those are non-competitive numbers. He needs to raise at least $1 million by December or he's done. 💀 KELLER: "DON'T LOOK TO POLITICIANS" Tim Keller's debate performance was stunning. He told the audience that "part of the problem is that we look to mayors and politicians to fix it" when discussing crime. He also said he fights crime "with technology and civilians" instead of actual police officers. The murder stats tell the real story: 30 murders in 2014 before Keller took office. 106 murders in 2022. That's a 3X increase. Darren White destroyed him with one line: "That is not progress, Mayor. That is a crisis." Louie Sanchez also struggled badly, rambling incoherently when asked about his crime plan. | | | 🚨 SANCTUARY CITY KILLED SOMEONE Keller bragged during the debate that his sanctuary city policy works because "we don't collect ANY information" to share with ICE. Here's what that policy cost: Adan Munoz was arrested for choking his wife and threatening to kill her and their child. He was released on an ankle monitor. Keller's policy meant zero information was shared with ICE. Munoz then murdered Mikhail Romero at a party. Had Keller shared the information, Munoz would have been deported to Venezuela. Someone would still be alive today. 📊 DEMS PLOT FETTERMAN OUSTER Senator John Fetterman warned Democrats they're losing white men because "the other side seems like men are the problem, masculinity is toxic."
